This seems like something out of a twisted novel, folks, but **the new top voting lawyer at the Department of Justice was until recently an attorney and activist for a leading anti-voting legal group** that has worked for years to spread fear about unproven illegal voting and press election officials to implement stricter, suppressive voting rules. The lawyer, Maureen Riordan, worked side-by-side with Cleta Mitchell — the right-wing activist who played a key role in President Donald Trump’s failed bid to subvert the results of the 2020 election — following Mitchell’s pledge to “ _reclaim our election systems from the left._ ” This appointment, along with the posting of Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon as head of the Civil Rights division, shows how DOJ has gone from a largely consistent defender of voting rights to instead working actively to undermine our fundamental rights. **Again, are we surprised? No.** But these moves from the administration highlight how badly **we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens** , from the outside of government. **[Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108927165/549456331/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=ItTOLdVnvx+abIo279q3ABq+Bki3+WV3BMvV6ZVxH1fhZIkZ2eGv4R9mTBMOXD718YTKpkRJ1GpkMR5a+ZX5ZQMq7oYkNThhuccMuo2et/I=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0Y2Q1N2U1LWQ2NDAtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Zjm-Xl4ksNe1AB5991wFx-grN01O3k7bpo2KuB4-20=&emci=827caf21-9240-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=44cd57e5-d640-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

| | Riordan's first lawsuit at her new job? Filed recently against North Carolina, it cites Trump’s March anti-voter executive order and aims to strip legitimate voters from the rolls and force North Carolina to do more to collect unnecessary information that’s required by new, suppressive state laws, all from people newly registering to vote. This follows her work at the harmless-sounding Public Interest Legal Foundation (PILF), which is anything but. PILF specializes in pressuring states and counties — _by threatening and bringing expensive and frivolous lawsuits_ — to more aggressively remove voters from the rolls. As part of that effort, PILF has worked to stoke fear about the threat of non-citizen voting, which is extremely rare. Remember, the civil rights division of DOJ was created in 1957 -- often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the department -- has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote, not suing to restrict it or cut off access for voters seeking to exercise their rights. But Trump's nominees to DOJ have**sent out “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities and anti-voting conspiracy theories.** This administration is seemingly going to do everything in their power to attack our right to vote until they ensconce their control forever. What follows is a broad update on recent lawsuits, developments out of D.C., and a powerful new program we’re launching later this week. Let’s jump in!
### **On Lawsuits— and Where to Draw the Line**
You may recall that a few weeks ago, True the Vote presented oral arguments before the 11th Circuit Court of Appeals in _Fair Fight v. True the Vote_. We previously won this case in federal district court, but Fair Fight appealed. Their lawsuit, filed in December 2020, was a clear attempt to block citizens from helping counties lawfully maintain clean and accurate voter rolls. The case is now in the hands of appellate judges. A decision may take months, but we remain confident in both our position and our right to engage in this essential work.
During that same season, three additional lawsuits were filed against us— all of which have since been won, withdrawn, or dismissed— but not without incurring significant collateral damage in the form of lost time and resources. That, of course, is the intended outcome of lawfare: not justice, but exhaustion.
This Friday, we return to court in _Mark Andrews v. True the Vote, Catherine Engelbrecht, Gregg Phillips, et al_ , a case filed in 2022 over a 1.8-second video clip used by the filmmaker of ‘ _2000 Mules’_.
Also in 2022, we were sued by Konnech, a CCP-aligned provider of U.S. election administration software. That case resulted in Gregg and me being imprisoned for protecting a confidential source, then released by emergency order of the Fifth Circuit. Konnech eventually dropped the case entirely. It’s making headlines again, following a newly published article by one of the researchers who helped us on the project.

### **But Wait... There’s More**
Only recently did we learn that, during that same period in 2022, a Grand Jury was convened against us in the Northern District of New York. The Biden Administration was seeking criminal indictments against Gregg and me. We were labeled “flight risks” by the U.S. Attorney, which allowed the case to be sealed— kept entirely hidden from us.
Without our knowledge, Google, Apple, and potentially others were subpoenaed and compelled to turn over every digital record we had, going back to 2017. We only learned of this after both companies sent us notifications, years later. Had they not, we likely never would have known.
I rarely speak about these experiences, because dwelling on them does not move us forward. Still, they must be shared— not for sympathy, but as a warning. They show how quickly a government can veer off course when left unchecked. And while lawfare is real— weaponized litigation intended not to win, but to wear you down— it’s just one front in a much broader battle.
### **Technology Moves Faster Than Truth**
Today, technology multiplies the speed and reach of abuse. Surveillance, censorship, data profiling, AI-generated narratives— these tools can be deployed instantly and invisibly. What once took years now takes seconds. What once required warrants now happens behind closed doors. If it can happen to us, it can happen to anyone.
We are entering a time for choosing. An era of both peril and promise. The technical reality of Voter Singularity— the resolution of identity, citizenship, and residency in real time— offers a path to transparent, accurate elections that remain locally controlled and citizen-led. We’re excited! But the very tools that can preserve liberty can also be used to destroy it. The line between empowering free people and surveilling them is razor thin— and far too easy to cross.
### **Two Stories, One Warning**
Last week, Louisiana became one of the first states to access the Department of Homeland Security’s enhanced[ SAVE database](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4j0zB6Fn0a9bbc4RdX_e19-08CNP8hBfS48G4oDrwJeXRfa6S7-GaIQ1CuIuWRHNdZ7y11bzJ_9nIlPaub7PIgW5js_7c6LbuUDZjsGMuf-C7KxJVCfxkJwdI85WKc33lOUy7r2L2CLTOCSI4n1sPtApkr69JEGz0zXeUAO185tf9D041mnH4-u7OSVi7MWFy6zp0fpNSe8MJ9rdxoHVOBJB-EJVT69HNbIAbHq6x96MkiJ1krg8N1sKx6a1Jao-St70dc4s7ebnOYoRRR9CnTo4gYYE0PqaYK-4dJX7qlex72eMoroyIr88pSfU7MT8_rIlclFHEMuLdT26yuT92ntDrq69bgg5MCouzwZtpRmJ/4h2/esk0COHER0qWdt3aIrrE1Q/h6/h001.XS0C3HZrwluy6dsvJTXXXRkCTDg1PvBtgfpl-c24a-0)— a major step forward in enabling states to verify citizenship based on federal records. This is the kind of decentralized access states should have had long ago. Great news!
But in that same week, it was also reported that the Department of Government Enterprises (DOGE), which developed the enhanced SAVE system, has turned over vast amounts of data to [Palantir— a company with a clear agenda to build a centralized digital identity ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.0WrCDK40KJSxvZRd_3SAdHq6uSiNySKKMiBeU7LLBnTRTzvzwDVAUNsIGWivhqXuQgJNJwLYMtStgPhHCk20dV41CWHEAHN-3-ip4n--e8kl8RsQQBtWea609Tk0jxhUu1-HjijqPfB-N3fpza5HWjEZQ_UGllchHL48ur_tSX7eh6_mvGzk6XvEh5uuekOzMKja1cXdNiVHdjgNzHytH_MW4II7qIDTokc_QThMTiMRbfYeqoZ_bLnpk767xgobYcnDJXydRMPb4sGYN5jX6USFAmFWi9pekOpNV5YoINhHkbrj3qJKH5cXKi63KxYqiotQcJl4koYLH4W4UNSCPoylKdWjUo_Gvy84LevxujpLSNTHwDoksFqR83L0t9dSZ3iXv0-TBEyrkW8qrfVTNSWoTZxPsTWGrbNSQTp253YiYHFDyxDCrNSX7MCv0TX_1gnb9dt0Sgtvz3NA1h_Epur6xBxPTxe1gOWZhDOYOALzvK0bgnx_s3hEH_yKcAltjkRt-r5vBrs6EMxHT7qEbQ/4h2/esk0COHER0qWdt3aIrrE1Q/h7/h001.Lct_WFjnuQJ6KEaIBHYE8YnZT92S0KqBh1G4VcXKWfE)infrastructure, consolidating IRS, Social Security, immigration records, and much more, all in a single platform. Such centralization of data poses a threat to individual freedoms and privacy. Surrendering our data to unchecked power isn’t just a technical risk— it’s a moral failure. God didn’t grant us free will so we could trade it for convenience or fear.
### **We Are Many**
Technology is not neutral. It will either preserve our freedoms—or monitor our every move. But it can never replace what we have when we stand together. It can never replicate the strength of a free people, united in purpose, grounded in truth.
We are not powerless. We are not alone. **We are many.** And when we rise— together— we become a force no government, no algorithm, no agenda can silence.
So get involved. In your local elections. In your church. Your school. Your community. Choose one place to start. Shake a hand. Ask a question. Offer help. Build trust.
This is how we reclaim what matters. This is how freedom wins—not in sweeping headlines, but in thousands of small, everyday acts of courage by people who refuse to give up. Let them see that we are awake. That we are alert. That we are together—and by God’s grace, we are unafraid.
### **Introducing: LegiTrack**
Later this week, we’re launching **LegiTrack** , a new citizen tool designed to help you follow election integrity legislation in your state and in Washington, D.C.. With LegiTrack, you’ll be able to track bills, receive alerts, and take action when it matters most. We’ll host regular conference calls to break down legislative trends, explain how to make your voice heard, and equip you to spread the word when we need others to stand alongside.
| | _“A dead thing can go with the stream, but only a living thing can go against it.”_

They wouldn’t take it. It was about that time when we learned we were their targets.\- Subpoenas from Google and Apple, revealing the Biden DOJ’s demand for all my accounts and archives in a sealed, years-long Grand Jury probe by the Northern District of New York—part of a secretive effort to criminally indict Gregg Phillips and me.\- Full texts and emails with all FBI agents we dealt with—names, contacts, all of it.

clean_body: Election Intelligence. | | | | June 03, 2025 | | | | | | | | Hi Friend — What follows is a broad update on recent lawsuits, developments out of D.C., and a powerful new program we’re launching later this week. Let’s jump in! On Lawsuits— and Where to Draw the Line You may recall that a few weeks ago, True the Vote presented oral arguments before the 11th Circuit Court of Appeals in Fair Fight v. True the Vote. We previously won this case in federal district court, but Fair Fight appealed. Their lawsuit, filed in December 2020, was a clear attempt to block citizens from helping counties lawfully maintain clean and accurate voter rolls. The case is now in the hands of appellate judges. A decision may take months, but we remain confident in both our position and our right to engage in this essential work. During that same season, three additional lawsuits were filed against us— all of which have since been won, withdrawn, or dismissed— but not without incurring significant collateral damage in the form of lost time and resources. That, of course, is the intended outcome of lawfare: not justice, but exhaustion. This Friday, we return to court in Mark Andrews v. True the Vote, Catherine Engelbrecht, Gregg Phillips, et al , a case filed in 2022 over a 1.8-second video clip used by the filmmaker of ‘ 2000 Mules’. Also in 2022, we were sued by Konnech, a CCP-aligned provider of U.S. election administration software. That case resulted in Gregg and me being imprisoned for protecting a confidential source, then released by emergency order of the Fifth Circuit. Konnech eventually dropped the case entirely. It’s making headlines again, following a newly published article by one of the researchers who helped us on the project. | But Wait... There’s More Only recently did we learn that, during that same period in 2022, a Grand Jury was convened against us in the Northern District of New York. The Biden Administration was seeking criminal indictments against Gregg and me. We were labeled “flight risks” by the U.S. Attorney, which allowed the case to be sealed— kept entirely hidden from us. Without our knowledge, Google, Apple, and potentially others were subpoenaed and compelled to turn over every digital record we had, going back to 2017. We only learned of this after both companies sent us notifications, years later. Had they not, we likely never would have known. I rarely speak about these experiences, because dwelling on them does not move us forward. Still, they must be shared— not for sympathy, but as a warning. They show how quickly a government can veer off course when left unchecked. And while lawfare is real— weaponized litigation intended not to win, but to wear you down— it’s just one front in a much broader battle. Technology Moves Faster Than Truth Today, technology multiplies the speed and reach of abuse. Surveillance, censorship, data profiling, AI-generated narratives— these tools can be deployed instantly and invisibly. What once took years now takes seconds. What once required warrants now happens behind closed doors. If it can happen to us, it can happen to anyone. We are entering a time for choosing. An era of both peril and promise. The technical reality of Voter Singularity— the resolution of identity, citizenship, and residency in real time— offers a path to transparent, accurate elections that remain locally controlled and citizen-led. We’re excited! But the very tools that can preserve liberty can also be used to destroy it. The line between empowering free people and surveilling them is razor thin— and far too easy to cross. Two Stories, One Warning Last week, Louisiana became one of the first states to access the Department of Homeland Security’s enhanced— a major step forward in enabling states to verify citizenship based on federal records. This is the kind of decentralized access states should have had long ago. Great news! But in that same week, it was also reported that the Department of Government Enterprises (DOGE), which developed the enhanced SAVE system, has turned over vast amounts of data to , consolidating IRS, Social Security, immigration records, and much more, all in a single platform. Such centralization of data poses a threat to individual freedoms and privacy. Surrendering our data to unchecked power isn’t just a technical risk— it’s a moral failure. God didn’t grant us free will so we could trade it for convenience or fear. We Are Many Technology is not neutral. It will either preserve our freedoms—or monitor our every move. But it can never replace what we have when we stand together. It can never replicate the strength of a free people, united in purpose, grounded in truth. We are not powerless. We are not alone. We are many. And when we rise— together— we become a force no government, no algorithm, no agenda can silence. So get involved. In your local elections. In your church. Your school. Your community. Choose one place to start. Shake a hand. Ask a question. Offer help. Build trust. This is how we reclaim what matters. This is how freedom wins—not in sweeping headlines, but in thousands of small, everyday acts of courage by people who refuse to give up. Let them see that we are awake. That we are alert. That we are together—and by God’s grace, we are unafraid. Introducing: LegiTrack Later this week, we’re launching LegiTrack , a new citizen tool designed to help you follow election integrity legislation in your state and in Washington, D.C.. With LegiTrack, you’ll be able to track bills, receive alerts, and take action when it matters most. We’ll host regular conference calls to break down legislative trends, explain how to make your voice heard, and equip you to spread the word when we need others to stand alongside. | | “A dead thing can go with the stream, but only a living thing can go against it.” — G.K. Chesterton We will continue to go against the current. We will continue to stand strong, speak truth, and fight for liberty—for as long as it takes. Keep the faith. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever onward - | P.S. One more thing ... please see below and share as you see fit. Our team has decided to print this list in every newsletter we publish until our offer is accepted. | | We continue to offer the following to the Trump Administration 👇.\- Evidence given by us to (and buried by) the FBI from 2020–2022, including geospatial proof of ballot dropbox abuse. \- Info on the non-citizen database first reported by Gregg Phillips in 2016 and buried under unfulfilled whistleblower protections.\- Approx 10k documents on Konnech, the CCP-affiliated election software company (docs currently on and ) and our investigation timeline, including my and Gregg Phillips’ imprisonment—while the FBI, despite knowing the truth, watched us be taken away in chains to solitary confinement— and did nothing.\- Banking records tied to a suspected multi-state ballot trafficking ring—evidence we tried to give the FBI. They wouldn’t take it. It was about that time when we learned we were their targets.\- Subpoenas from Google and Apple, revealing the Biden DOJ’s demand for all my accounts and archives in a sealed, years-long Grand Jury probe by the Northern District of New York—part of a secretive effort to criminally indict Gregg Phillips and me.\- Full texts and emails with all FBI agents we dealt with—names, contacts, all of it. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128 Houston, Texas 77098-4520, United States of America

body:
Joni Ernst and the GOP

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108927272/549458103/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhOTJjMDgtZDc0MC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iDkeOCWB5LqLJ4m1YJvtWuRt1HOzu1mlSvCzVfp3DJc=) | Peter, Trump’s “big beautiful bill” is such a disaster that even his allies are turning on it. Just today, Elon Musk tweeted that the bill is a _**“disgusting abomination.”**_ And did you see what Senator Joni Ernst said at her now viral townhall last week about Medicaid cuts? _**”We are all going to die.”**_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108927273/549458104/-945437762?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhOTJjMDgtZDc0MC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iDkeOCWB5LqLJ4m1YJvtWuRt1HOzu1mlSvCzVfp3DJc=&emci=2102ba0f-ba40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ea92c08-d740-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=6455652)** Talk about having zero empathy for actual human beings. When did the Republican party get this bad? Let that sink in, Peter. Republicans are trying to gut people’s healthcare, and they’re openly admitting it will kill people. **Even Trump’s biggest allies can’t defend these cuts. It’s so bad they’re saying the quiet part out loud.** This isn’t just politics — it’s people’s lives we’re talking about here. The GOP’s bill slashes Medicaid, strips healthcare from working families, and funnels tax breaks to billionaires. And the worst part is - they told us they were going to do this. This isn’t a surprise. [_**We need to send a message loud and clear: these Medicaid cuts must be stopped. Please add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to oppose this cruel bill!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108927274/549458105/-945437762?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhOTJjMDgtZDc0MC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iDkeOCWB5LqLJ4m1YJvtWuRt1HOzu1mlSvCzVfp3DJc=&emci=2102ba0f-ba40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ea92c08-d740-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108927275/549458106/-945437762?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhOTJjMDgtZDc0MC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iDkeOCWB5LqLJ4m1YJvtWuRt1HOzu1mlSvCzVfp3DJc=&emci=2102ba0f-ba40-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ea92c08-d740-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=6455652) Stay in the fight,
— Josh

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Killed while waiting for food for their starving families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

For the third time in three days, Israeli soldiers massacred Palestinians
simply trying to get the only food that Israel has allowed to enter Gaza.
Yesterday, they killed 27 Palestinians, the day before they killed 3, and
on Sunday they killed at least 31—all for trying to feed their families.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250603-signup-gazaaidmassacres?source=em20250603-36732&akid=36732%2E1203867%2Eb_Jxwn ]The New York Times: Israeli Soldiers Open Fire Near Gaza Aid Site. Gaza
Officials Say 27 Are Killed. It was the second large-scale shooting by
Israeli forces in three days near a food distribution center, which is
part of a contentious new Israeli and American-backed initiative.

These aid massacres are just the latest violent actions taken by the
Israeli military after Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu broke the
ceasefire deal a few months ago, with Donald Trump’s full support.

They are shooting starving people desperately trying to access food,
continuing to drop bombs on tents and schools housing refugees, including
children and infants, and causing a man-made famine that could kill
millions of Palestinians.

Any of our elected leaders who continue to support this deserve to be
challenged in the upcoming primary elections — there is no excuse that
justifies this genocide and ethnic cleansing.

We need an arms embargo NOW. Justice Democrats’ members like Rashida
Tlaib, Delia Ramirez, Ilhan Omar, and Summer Lee are leading the call
against these war crimes, but we need to demand every Democrat stand up
and do what’s in their power to stop this.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, For the third time in three days, Israeli soldiers massacred Palestinians simply trying to get the only food that Israel has allowed to enter Gaza. Yesterday, they killed 27 Palestinians, the day before they killed 3, and on Sunday they killed at least 31—all for trying to feed their families. [ ]The New York Times: Israeli Soldiers Open Fire Near Gaza Aid Site. Gaza Officials Say 27 Are Killed. It was the second large-scale shooting by Israeli forces in three days near a food distribution center, which is part of a contentious new Israeli and American-backed initiative. These aid massacres are just the latest violent actions taken by the Israeli military after Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu broke the ceasefire deal a few months ago, with Donald Trump’s full support. They are shooting starving people desperately trying to access food, continuing to drop bombs on tents and schools housing refugees, including children and infants, and causing a man-made famine that could kill millions of Palestinians. Any of our elected leaders who continue to support this deserve to be challenged in the upcoming primary elections — there is no excuse that justifies this genocide and ethnic cleansing. We need an arms embargo NOW. Justice Democrats’ members like Rashida Tlaib, Delia Ramirez, Ilhan Omar, and Summer Lee are leading the call against these war crimes, but we need to demand every Democrat stand up and do what’s in their power to stop this. [ ]Add your name to our petition urging EVERY Democrat in Congress to stop enabling genocide and support an arms embargo against the Israeli military ASAP! name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: We must stay focused on local.
body:
Upstate Tea with Rep Justin J. Pearson-Wednesday.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b704e8321a91/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6419811?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# We must stay focused on local
---
| | | | | There has rarely been a more critical moment to stay engaged in local government. Together, we have the power to shape our future, and it is our duty to see that every one of our Upstate representatives leads with integrity and transparency.
School board and municipal races are on the ballot this year, Greenville is defending their democratic majority on City Council with [Tina Belge](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=59540e2817&e=edbde6c9b1), and just last week two Spartanburg County races opened for November as our County Councilman for District Three and the Sheriff resigned.
Each race is a chance to expand fair representation and demand responsive leadership. Across the country we see norms tested and trust in institutions strained. The surest remedy is active, informed citizenship right here at home. We are the change agents we’ve been waiting for, so please pay attention to local races this year. Consider a run, support a candidate and get out and vote!
---
| [2025 Races ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=73b153b046&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
# Spilling the Tea with Rep Chandra Dillard
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=18600e0840&e=edbde6c9b1)
| What’s really going on under the dome in Columbia? I had the honor of interviewing Representative Chandra Dillard for last week’s episode of **The Upstate Tea — Wednesday’s edition of Frogmore Stew, SC’s pop-political podcast.** to break down the highs and lows of the latest South Carolina legislative session. From the challenges of working within a Republican supermajority to key battles over DEI, school vouchers, affordable housing, and tax reform, Rep. Dillard gives us an unfiltered look at policymaking in real time. She also highlights the power of civic engagement and the critical role local elections play in shaping our communities. Tune in for a conversation full of insight, experience, and straight-up truth from one of Greenville’s most seasoned public servants.
---
| [Click here to listen to Chandra’s episode!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2181b6d0c1&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Juneteenth in The City of Spartanburg** Spartanburg Juneteenth Inc.’s mission is to educate the Spartanburg community about African American history primarily through an annual Juneteenth celebration. Beginning on May 31st, there are multiple community-wide events.
---
| [Click here to see all of the events!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=98078f7e16&e=edbde6c9b1)

| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=77ad741249&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | **SPCDP Tiny Town Hall****Trinity Methodist****June 10 at 6:00pm** Join the SPCDP for a Tiny Town Hall in Converse Heights as we organize the Trinity Methodist Precinct ahead of the 2025 elections. We'll discuss the upcoming races in Spartanburg County, the current state of politics and actionable way to get engaged. The address will be provided closer to the event date.
---
| [Click here to RSVP!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9e6cb35208&e=edbde6c9b1)

| | | | | | | | | | | **Emerge SC - Greenville****Meet the Class of 2025****June 21 at 4:30pm** I’m honored to be a cabinet member for Emerge SC this year. We have 19 women from 12 counties including Spartanburg and Greenville training to be future leaders in politics. Please join me in June to support this wonderful cohort!

Raskin.[ RSVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=38a545216a&e=edbde6c9b1)June 10 Tiny Town Hall at Trinity. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3d1598f159&e=edbde6c9b1)June 14 Indivisible Upstate Veterans Rally.[ Stay tuned!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e360edf879&e=edbde6c9b1)June 14 Southside Cultural Monument Unveiling. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3bf667d03b&e=edbde6c9b1)June 17 Black Market Tuesday in Spartanburg.[ L](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=02d9996454&e=edbde6c9b1)[earn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0e38414a66&e=edbde6c9b1)June 20 BEC Freedom Gala. [Purchase tickets here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=166e2943e4&e=edbde6c9b1)June 20 Juneteenth Block Party in Downtown Spartanburg. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=44a3681826&e=edbde6c9b1)June 21 Juneteenth Festival at Barnet Park. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=faba0acad5&e=edbde6c9b1)June 21 Emerge SC Meet the Fellows in Greenville Get Tickets June 22 Jubilee Juneteenth Worship Service at Macedonia. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=031e4b08ad&e=edbde6c9b1)June 28 Greenville Black Pride Festival. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1523df174c&e=edbde6c9b1)

|
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6f7898787a&e=edbde6c9b1)
| Tune-in Wednesday afternoon to my interview with Rep. Pearson on the Upstate Tea with Kathryn Harvey, part of the [Frogmore Stew Podcast](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c7b749b1b7&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
|
---
|
---
|
**What’s at stake with the Big Beautiful Bill?**| In South Carolina alone, 1.1 million people rely upon Medicaid or CHIP for healthcare while 581,000 South Carolinians rely upon SNAP for daily food purchases.

Congressional GOP members voted to strip away funding for these critical programs — all for billionaires in this country to receive tax cuts. The Upstate’s very own [Ralph Norman fell asleep during the budget hearing, and then cast the deciding vote](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=55ef0e6326&e=edbde6c9b1) on this “Big, Beautiful Bill.”
The time is now. [**Call your senators**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0a6094943f&e=edbde6c9b1) and join us in fighting for working-class families across South Carolina. They need to hear from all of us.
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| Thank you to all who supported and celebrated the Freedom Fundraiser alongside me last night. What an honor to host our keynote speaker, [Justin Pearson](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=17e4622a33&e=edbde6c9b1) alongside so many other amazing elected officials and change makers in our community. We are feeling more inspired than ever. Congratulations to all the Young Democrats of Spartanburg County SPARK Award recipients.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| A Dem Good Weekend! The South Carolina Democratic Party’s 2025 convention was incredible this past weekend. The Spartanburg delegation had the opportunity to hear from Governor Wes Moore, Governor Tim Walz, Congressman Jim Clyburn, & more. Congratulations to the new leadership and what a year we have ahead.

name: Team All On The Line
subject: Thank you (and a quick survey!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Let us know what issues are on your mind as we set our priorities for the months ahead.
|
---

Peter,
The outpouring of grassroots support ahead of our May deadline was incredible to witness. And now, we’re heading into a critical month for the fair maps movement, ready to fight with everything we’ve got — _thank you._
From responding to upcoming court rulings to efforts to protect the integrity of the census, the months ahead are huge for this movement. If you have a minute or two, we’d love to hear from you about what issues are at the forefront of your mind and what priorities we should be focusing on. [**Take our supporter survey to help inform our priorities as we move into the next phase of this fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108927866/549464112/-700774942?refcode=eng_aotl_tier1_email_SurveyLift_email_20250603-AOTL-Tier1-SurveyLift_nd&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250603-AOTL-Tier1-SurveyLift_nd&utm_campaign=SurveyLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxYzc0ZDQ5LWQ4NDAtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dja8Hri-GbC7oilbzc0h0q3QBXiOC6GS1r7psNXafgY=&emci=79dfff28-f83f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=91c74d49-d840-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)

\--------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Vic, All On The Line
Date: May 29, 2025
Subject: Take our priorities survey
Hey there,
One of the best parts of my role at the All On The Line campaign is getting to directly engage with supporters like you. So today, **[I’m excited to ask you to please take our priorities survey — I promise, it’s quick!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108927873/549464119/-700774942?refcode=eng_aotl_tier1_email_SurveyLift_email_20250603-AOTL-Tier1-SurveyLift_nd&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20250603-AOTL-Tier1-SurveyLift_nd&utm_campaign=SurveyLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxYzc0ZDQ5LWQ4NDAtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dja8Hri-GbC7oilbzc0h0q3QBXiOC6GS1r7psNXafgY=&emci=79dfff28-f83f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=91c74d49-d840-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)**
All of us at All On The Line want to know what brings you to the fair maps movement — because redistricting affects EVERY issue that impacts our day-to-day lives.
We also want to hear anything else you’d like to share about how you’re feeling at a time when free and fair elections are constantly under attack. What are you most concerned about? Are you satisfied with how you’re represented in Congress? Other thoughts?
**Your response to our survey helps shape how All On The Line shows up in this work, including how we galvanize more people to join the movement, communicate with supporters, and build momentum around the issues that matter most to you. So, while the survey is quick and simple, the impact is powerful.**
[**Please, if you’re able to, take a moment to fill out this survey and let us know what’s on your mind right now. It’s only a few questions, and it won’t need to take longer than a few minutes. clean_body: Let us know what issues are on your mind as we set our priorities for the months ahead. | Peter, The outpouring of grassroots support ahead of our May deadline was incredible to witness. And now, we’re heading into a critical month for the fair maps movement, ready to fight with everything we’ve got — thank you. From responding to upcoming court rulings to efforts to protect the integrity of the census, the months ahead are huge for this movement. If you have a minute or two, we’d love to hear from you about what issues are at the forefront of your mind and what priorities we should be focusing on. Thank you again! The team at All On The Line If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = \--------- Forwarded message --------- From: Vic, All On The Line Date: May 29, 2025 Subject: Take our priorities survey Hey there, One of the best parts of my role at the All On The Line campaign is getting to directly engage with supporters like you. So today, All of us at All On The Line want to know what brings you to the fair maps movement — because redistricting affects EVERY issue that impacts our day-to-day lives. We also want to hear anything else you’d like to share about how you’re feeling at a time when free and fair elections are constantly under attack. What are you most concerned about? Are you satisfied with how you’re represented in Congress? Other thoughts? Your response to our survey helps shape how All On The Line shows up in this work, including how we galvanize more people to join the movement, communicate with supporters, and build momentum around the issues that matter most to you. So, while the survey is quick and simple, the impact is powerful. Thank you for sharing your thoughts with us, team, and thank you for informing our fight for a truly representative democracy. I appreciate y’all! Vic Vic Barreras Torres Senior Mobilization Strategist, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Rob Bonta
subject: The CA Democratic Party Convention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
This weekend, I had the honor of speaking at the California Democratic Party Convention.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250603&t=1&akid=1814%2E1088799%2Eo6_OhK)
Last weekend, I had the honor of speaking at the California Democratic Party Convention, and I wanted to share my remarks with you.
**[Before I do, can you chip in any amount to keep our people-powered campaign fueled this summer and beyond?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250603?refcode=em20250603-1814&amount=5&refcode2=1814_1088799_o6_OhK&akid=1814%2E1088799%2Eo6_OhK)**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250603?refcode=em20250603-1814&refcode2=1814_1088799_o6_OhK&akid=1814%2E1088799%2Eo6_OhK)
It’s so important that we come together during these difficult times, unified in our fight for progress, justice, rights, and freedoms.
My earliest years were spent in the farmworkers movement.
I watched my parents fight for the hardworking people who grow our nation’s food. Watched my dad set up health clinics and work with Cesar Chavez in the front office. Watched my mom work in the preschool with the inimitable Dolores Huerta. Watched them and their friends march, protest, and raise their fists in the air, demanding better.
Those years taught me many lessons, but one in particular speaks to me right now: **People power is the most potent power there is.**
I saw firsthand that we the people can unite against bullies and bad actors. We the people can stand up for the downtrodden and speak up for the voiceless. We can demand justice, equity, and safety for ALL people.
You’ve got my word: I’ll always stand with you, the California people.
We’re only 18 weeks into Trump 2.0 — 18 very long weeks — and I’ve already had to take Trump to court 23 times.
That’s more lawsuits than weeks in his term. Lawsuits that:
* Defend birthright citizenship;
* Fight unlawful tariffs that are hurting California families, workers, and businesses;
* Protect funding for Head Start, Medi-Cal, and services for seniors and people with disabilities;
* And lawsuits that keep unelected, private citizen Elon Musk and DOGE in check.

And that’s the shortlist!
Fortunately, at the Department of Justice, we’ve got a full tank of gas, a ton of energy, and we’re ready for the road ahead. You’ve got my word: EVERY time Trump breaks the law, violates the Constitution, and puts our people in harm’s way, I’ll be here to take him to court.
I’m not naive. The next four years will be trying, no doubt about it. But no matter how exhausting it might be, we can’t become complacent. **We can’t let ourselves become numb.**
We’ve got to stay engaged, stay enraged by the flagrant abuse of power, and stay outraged by Trump’s complete and total disregard for the Constitution. We’ve got to stay in this fight.
Whatever Trump and his billionaire buddies throw our way, we ought not be hopeless, because we are not helpless — not when we stand united, shoulder to shoulder in the fight for what’s right, in the fight for our rights and our country.
As California Democrats, I have no doubt you will! **As your California Attorney General, I’ll be beside you, every step of the way.**
**[Our campaign directly depends on support from people like you, and we need to consistently build the resources needed to keep up these critical fights throughout the next four years. Pitch in $5 or more to help us do just that.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250603?refcode=em20250603-1814&amount=5&refcode2=1814_1088799_o6_OhK&akid=1814%2E1088799%2Eo6_OhK)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250603?refcode=em20250603-1814&amount=5&refcode2=1814_1088799_o6_OhK&akid=1814%2E1088799%2Eo6_OhK)**
Thanks for all you do,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250603&t=3&refcode2=1814_1088799_o6_OhK&akid=1814%2E1088799%2Eo6_OhK)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1814%2E1088799%2Eo6_OhK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1814%2E1088799%2Eo6_OhK)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)

Friend, if there's one thing the Left fears, it's a conservative woman.

Hillary Clinton and other Democrats say they're pro-women... until they find out we have an "R" by our name.

Hillary and the rest of them can say whatever they want. I'm a conservative mama on a mission, I'm not backing down, and I know that millions of other women across the country feel the same way.

**[Will you stand with us?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/co6BpSt3cSQzm4gp_76-9Q~~/AAVLBhA~/ufeOkMUYpLRactdHTUh-aJP3Iz5lTHpUPQiCNhsOrb4Qg3sip_hEqyYDrqUVqrroYyH6R0NH-KevYhIFB6lWJPhD3E3ybxzzRInJqaB_wvywLOUeKCaylH_WFY8H4KZLu8j6gApWcHyvr1_FgJhQtrMjH9-cOyCqfOhnxx1NVenw1nwLzeSroysfpkBkHrCQ9D7I3rRYRS-XrZABLa93RyUOzzF1h_0L3w3hcCxe6GBvkHgAyOAQaqCKZb56ejLrSZwqF0obNH5WHchfe5N-hH4ziEGD_rN3LYwpXzrj4Mnazp7ZHtAd6E0Pdhgi9M-073V9fN9DgQJ-o-ko5a-2XgZ_ghVF3mFCO6ZO0WXDgU5BgsTy_gaMRS9vC87MOZSw9CnJ8iWzvjSljoCZZtTmNnO01_oxStq11rmY-ZocsbY~)**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Republicans in Congress have no idea why we won the Election
body:
| | | | |
---
Peter,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/rAoqie2EaLqVOW7L7DvH0VXuTVhOjqRrK2iKFLYKblM8S15OyxxnkDy9wuxJKA1_u3mfxzCm3MeRs6T-01AYWX9rxGwKIj4w8udUtPMX_fkxc-h_A6pv3MjzbU5jRjj0wjHFJxTQNC4ggiEcHlOwzmQabvCiznm1-NfEbPgZirmYaUNYdOgToNUiah_g40FIN4kvbdNrGwpsCh_TuoQXsmDcf_cwRIKhUaBLaPM2pekRgULZq31ujiC2To4WUxvQ9WSuKeDmoFoMjWWiD0Arufl1vfPT0WLbVs5lOnqoUQ7SQ5jzSrGRSu2i6XIi3nncualHn4bfjtSKrYg7EyWK77l_4G5XBGdGlFEoEq-zdiGCofjq3M_1GXt3H6jX_cmtJbNrq4faPYqEohhZho14CKDMu23BIpmePeNPvAK3ak0hdWcKxoEaOsgB_GjYW8jMTP6TOVcEMbNYed2x6Pb5/UIQ8PiEv9j__SmtsTH3kJPAV1UMQMLEC/9)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: **
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, and $50 at a time from patriots across this country like you who are sick and tired of the status quo](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ZbFLNhysuf1-wL8FqZoRIfs6VoFNgWRZS0Fb960KyY83Eysq09RYsaJqgQB55p70Uach5ONBUz4aQoQL4tBLPSVXpYSuZuFdX7AaV2L5xT9UTaMdfHeEjS8s-fEsdtpZowOHOJQ1Er05REP01lT-pXYmig1BNNhsmhRcGwzSx3jW-LSOzKA2c0SVfpImQUJ7yGht0lW9iCj-r2oeaLq-QXivSpqe5lcD6mC-SDM5GIn2UeTyotCilDXl1ez7S3YxetMmRU7Q8hoFIsj9wmnI8Rm7tw6QIOUafHu1UmfbPcKy68M2vkGkiBDQKAHgsVaoWeQFAGTwLmDoI2hMy35Md5z3jenSMOo5Bbe4afx-xJ2Tv5_txTrf7JmITT2qtrlgUPQYJzbrlguqjzGJdJfFK-Qr1b61DgearYc2tLajMGcSLfj_nc_GYtLNGNJHJ-XCiiU3U83gXUVnzSNv_svm/BQYxcTTqLJ8QzvZ4Z5tIW7PB0Wyjb5_j/9)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here.
I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.
**_[And that’s exactly what I’m doing](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/_SDRH9X6vNQPF_BLqwunwA8HbhyVxNeWeYEn395jlxaogWVCsqpJcWq32icki1ZSkZsQj1Y-bNxnQQMTzA0VLPN_YXZWhZ3zX-IDp6DLNrVpXf6XOBttIy-ihiIWDzLsqvhRT1iQlTu5iroLyw83RXna-iPNa1DuysWpFO1Qqj9m_aJdjsbKoxRyXqrnBJ3B2Em8DRpMPDlEhzJug9O3ujlrvrwaOEvAanRjjhMHL-r2GxgADKCtQiGAlpNTNyWKFqvLbaneTxqajga_bop_CQAHueH6_lvLlSagANY2INleehPhCP8yjmkGiGC-OHJSJ1gpq6Tw7nyoSCIRr5zY8rRxVegY4thit3d0l2wReHQooZ9jTUMtr1t3RgbUFiL4mmPmHKzwkx4qhd3T-50QHWZRB8np_oOs-CDBHqrWupAFkIVNDIj--fJXRpJtBvC-ZkioqULtXi_oG_6rn5yf/y0tMw5X-Ih2smlbagWDrq_qKUcxGhhZr/9)_.**

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, If you’re sick and tired of do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws ... If you’re sick and tired of RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins ... If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC ... Then you feel exactly the way I do. It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action. Republicans need to get serious about: Making the DOGE cuts permanent. Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children. Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies. Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine. Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable. Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security. Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary. If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections. I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: When MTG is upset, the base is upset. We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election. That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda. The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. I work for YOU. . I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here. I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of We The People. . With urgency, Marjorie Taylor Greene ** |

| _**The Guardian: White House stunned as Hegseth inquiry brings up illegal wiretap claims**_ Pete Hegseth is a threat to our national security—he’s sown chaos at the Pentagon and put lives at risk. Donald Trump’s weak refusal to fire him is hurting our military. Enough already. Hegseth must resign. [_**Join Chris Deluzio and sign the petition demanding Pete Hegseth resign →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108928624/549496064/2004507504?refcode=email_060325_hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5ZGU3Ny1lMzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ycexwCI2_0sd0YodT3Ic2toZqEHY9HZkQDnBcuHo-Ng=&emci=c8003c10-e93f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a2a9de77-e340-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894) | | [Sign The Petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108928626/549496067/2004507504?refcode=email_060325_hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5ZGU3Ny1lMzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ycexwCI2_0sd0YodT3Ic2toZqEHY9HZkQDnBcuHo-Ng=&emci=c8003c10-e93f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a2a9de77-e340-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894)

Derek, once again Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is causing chaos at the Pentagon.

Last month, three high-level Pentagon staffers were removed from their posts over suspected ties to leaks about military plans. But an investigation into their removal revealed something even more troubling: the aides had been exposed through a warrantless wiretap.

This underscores the dysfunction at the Department of Defense under Hegseth’s leadership—which has seen ongoing vacancies, infighting between top aides, and Hegseth’s failure to maintain order.

**And this isn’t the first time Hegseth’s leadership has come under fire.**

Just months ago, he shared _highly classified information about a U.S. military strike in Yemen_ in two Signal group chats—one which accidentally included a journalist and another with his wife and brother.

Despite this major national security breach and Hegseth’s continued incompetence, Trump has refused to fire him— _and it’s hurting our military, Derek._

**That’s why Chris Deluzio is demanding Pete Hegseth resign as Secretary of Defense in order to protect our military and restore trust in our national security—and he needs your support.**
**[_**Stand with Chris today and sign his petition to demand Pete Hegseth resign →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108928628/549496069/2004507504?refcode=email_060325_hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5ZGU3Ny1lMzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ycexwCI2_0sd0YodT3Ic2toZqEHY9HZkQDnBcuHo-Ng=&emci=c8003c10-e93f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a2a9de77-e340-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894)**
| ****[Sign The Petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108928630/549496071/2004507504?refcode=email_060325_hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5ZGU3Ny1lMzQwLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ycexwCI2_0sd0YodT3Ic2toZqEHY9HZkQDnBcuHo-Ng=&emci=c8003c10-e93f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a2a9de77-e340-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894)****

| | Hi Friend, In Oakland, Pride runs deep. Our city is home to the White Horse Inn — one of the oldest continuously operating gay bars in the country and a symbol of joy, defiance, and community. And our city is home to trailblazing pioneers like Glenn Burke, the first openly gay Major League Baseball player. From decades of grassroots activism to today’s marches for justice, Oakland has always led with love. As we begin Pride Month, I’m holding close the lessons I learned in this city: that our liberation is collective, and that visibility must be matched by action. That’s why I’m proud to serve as a Vice Chair of the Equality Caucus and support the Equality Act — a bill reintroduced in Congress to finally secure comprehensive protections for LGBTQ+ Americans in housing, education, public spaces, and more. It’s time to make equality the law of the land. Add your name if you agree 👉 | [**SIGN TODAY →** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108928637/549496379/-456266285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFmMmQ3YmMtZTM0MC1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m-CdnoSdUgZa2b5WoG1GXEcS2hYzan9B5lY6OzdanB8=&emci=690798df-b840-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e1f2d7bc-e340-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22554739)
---
With pride,
Lateefah

name: Andrea Guzman
subject: Tim Walz + you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Hi there — I just wanted to quickly follow up on this:
After Governor Tim Walz fired up the California Democratic Convention last weekend and reminded everyone that the path to the House Majority runs straight through California, we knew we had to answer his call and act fast to turn that energy into resources.
We set an ambitious $15,000 target for our Swing Seat Fund — and right now, we’re still short.
Every dollar helps us reach undecided voters in the purple districts that will decide this election. That’s why I’m asking:
Will you chip in a donation right now and help us close the gap? I’m dropping my personal link below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=25]
Gracias,
- Andrea
----- Forwarded message -----
From: California Dems
Date: Mon, Jun 2, 2025 at 3:07 PM
Subject: Tim Walz: “House Majority goes right through CA”
Hi there! Gov. Tim Walz just left California, and we couldn’t be more excited about the message he shared on the California Democratic Party convention stage.
Here’s the gist: Democrats have the momentum, we will take back the U.S. House in 2026, but it will come down to swing seats in California and it will require each and every one of us to be on the field.
Will you answer Tim Walz’s powerful call-to-action by rushing a donation to our Swing Seat Fund right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?refcode=&amount=]Here’s a little more of what Gov. Tim Walz told the California Democratic Convention in Anaheim this past weekend:
“I'm optimistic because our path back starts with winning elections this year...
Then in 2026, we fire that merry band of dipsh*ts that are backing Trump on everything.
We will take back the House Majority — and it goes right through California .
Our fight is now... Everybody is going to need to be on the field. Every lane is going to need to be full.
So, California, thank you for what you do. Thank you for leading. Let’s get ready to kick their ass!”💥 Coach Walz is absolutely right.
Control of the U.S. House will come down to tossup districts right here in California. And if we want to flip them, we need to take action immediately.
That’s why we’re activating our California Swing Seat Fund — and we need to raise $15,000 this week to supercharge our grassroots programs and turn red districts blue. Will you pitch in a donation now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you,
- CADEM

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=footer&amount=5]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=GBuXkxA5a3qvZNQD5RcAybFyqQaAgniKYMoO8w8%2Fwqg8n%2F6tAdwDGGq94j3kswc5sQpS8sa9UEBaxtDAXnR7Q6E0cPQqhgunjX7eyxh8fL2OaoyuQE9lX9Y3fAYDL1hdKKOERGdcGTl4Emvz5B2Qb4mY8XIHpHNeP1r4qWLBz%2ByWy8%2F7E446OqrffoPa7Nwua%2FQKcE4PdR%2F8FaDAkAWh0%2F5NUNydQ%2F6CZRIpI52YZpKE8%2Fmm%2B2qm9tqDMBCJ35K1sg%2BuSasohVkKVl8W6PXC%2B3VOhhliomdYoC44x8mESWiwjStwPMDAtDncJWa%2FTvaG0GOfmQjFsajD87XFSf70caIfxLFHTAalXaJIHx7oWE0s%2BY1FeFZCEgo7XsPGg12atXgNxGo9iUBp0aOqUQlXJif6yKb9ojHzO60gjjeXOdI%3D .

name: Kerry McQuisten (Newsletter)
subject: Knocking it out of the park!
body:
| | | | |
# Our OCC event knocked it out of the park!
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| The month of May started off busy and didn't slow down. On the 8th, I accepted an invitation to speak at the Capitol City Republican Women's luncheon in Salem. Thank you to Pam, Brenda, the Good Carols, et al. for having me and Solomon there! Several candidates were in the house including Oregon Conservative Caucus (OCC) members Yvonne and Michael Stoffey who won positions on two local fire and water district boards. It doesn't appear the very nice school board candidates I met there won their races as I'd hoped. Marion County fared very badly during the special election - there's no sugarcoating it. And that's a shame. The low voter turnout everywhere in Oregon for that special election also stunk.
---
Know what didn't stink?! The OCC's first annual event in The Dalles on the 17th. Solomon and I were happy to welcome keynote speaker Steve Yates with his wife, Michelle, in from Florida. Though it was "the wee hours of the night" their time, we ended up sitting around the dining room table catching up before Steve got some shuteye prior to a big Newsmax interview that morning. These interviews look so professional on TV, but if you could see what they really look like behind the scenes when you're not in a studio, you'd laugh. I crawled out of bed and threw on a robe in time to grab some candid photos while Solomon dug out my lightboxes from storage. We used the garbage bag box from Costco to prop up Steve's camera ... and were ready to roll! Then Newsmax switched his topic from Chinese tariffs to the Ukraine at the last minute. Very random.
_Oregon Rising_ , the official newsletter of the OCC, will get into more details about the event itself, so I won't duplicate too much here. (Subscribe at [www.oregonconservativecaucus.com](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/bZjxt4hnPeGyBiUwGKT2Lg~~/AAAHURA~/zM7toV7jhaYdOj3LFTGO0JDosLRuBFadkZm4eFkr8gLDfA5kH830XV8OGNwDPfhLzrBzn0Jv2yhyEH7CESGrc9cMuxwBLBS8gmNdRDRyp-19YJGG1JaLMGHy6nvJwBwj-iPOzQGaw9CQirYvIUZjDFHi9n179PmWnS0TQRxECqLh9thytyqEXwi6xzjSiT18).) What I will say is Steve Yates and also Ray Hacke from Pacific Justice Institute were fabulous speakers. Ray is one of Oregon's hidden legal gems, as the audience quickly learned. We enjoyed having Taiwan Consul General Daniel Chen down from Seattle before he heads back to assume a senior-level position in Taipei's equivalent of the U.S. State Department. It's not every day you get a foreign dignitary to pop in to your event! What's the most impressive to me, though, was that we created a family-friendly environment where adults could learn and kids felt welcome. The room was packed. We raised money. No one was trying to stab anyone in the back. And it was just a pleasant event all the way around. Imagine that!
Solomon and I have been busy with Republicans Overseas (RO). We have a new [website](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/a35KPBIOeCVRSRjaMhBwWw~~/AAAHURA~/U44iDWQcxESLzJ3-WIaWjv8bD4MYqG1JaIjy6CI8NqD_u7BaWS8VPPet_GliXis9YWbxGXNOx5ptse8tzw24TsvaznmOkcUcDX-Uo_VcnsFpUOHnpe53gtT3eX0QWoZP6u1PEl5IQWJAbg_fpx1S8qbS1XLqVdRDFVxtX8wwVk4~). Kym, our communications director, has been cranking out press releases right and left lately. New chapters opening. New chapter presidents. A new board member. New projects. And if you think the policy work that started with President Trump's campaign promise to RO is over... nope. We're right in the thick of it and waiting week to week to learn when we'll have to take off to D.C.
Anyway - go to the OCC [website ](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/bZjxt4hnPeGyBiUwGKT2Lg~~/AAAHURA~/zM7toV7jhaYdOj3LFTGO0JDosLRuBFadkZm4eFkr8gLDfA5kH830XV8OGNwDPfhLzrBzn0Jv2yhyEH7CESGrc9cMuxwBLBS8gmNdRDRyp-19YJGG1JaLMGHy6nvJwBwj-iPOzQGaw9CQirYvIUZjDFHi9n179PmWnS0TQRxECqLh9thytyqEXwi6xzjSiT18)if you want to see news, a ton of photos and upcoming events. We've added to the site quite a bit since last month. And... We'll be registering voters like crazy this summer!
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | | [](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/qB-1kUaqm1-w4PsbfK_W0g~~/AAAHURA~/3fRlqR_CYe3VB9jViXTLMHrDklHRZwbmdEsTOyAovQF6Ju5UG18Y1k-0_PWJFhmCI4R-9pN5O3kmKYEEAH_p1vNWiGSKzuMwhU03xCNbMOBu8mpZgPcqrrq4omWplSWpyuUqPNdsFRw-jseP6-ScijdVJRhXLmfj7kDYxztEgf2HUHyXOVMR5L6f5qfcX1zF)
---
| | |
---
The podcast is picking up steam! You can listen [here ](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/qB-1kUaqm1-w4PsbfK_W0g~~/AAAHURA~/3fRlqR_CYe3VB9jViXTLMHrDklHRZwbmdEsTOyAovQF6Ju5UG18Y1k-0_PWJFhmCI4R-9pN5O3kmKYEEAH_p1vNWiGSKzuMwhU03xCNbMOBu8mpZgPcqrrq4omWplSWpyuUqPNdsFRw-jseP6-ScijdVJRhXLmfj7kDYxztEgf2HUHyXOVMR5L6f5qfcX1zF)if you'd like. The latest is Ep. 7: Episode of Deception. AKA The Don Powers Episode.

clean_body: | | | | | Our OCC event knocked it out of the park! | | | | | | | | | | | The month of May started off busy and didn't slow down. On the 8th, I accepted an invitation to speak at the Capitol City Republican Women's luncheon in Salem. Thank you to Pam, Brenda, the Good Carols, et al. for having me and Solomon there! Several candidates were in the house including Oregon Conservative Caucus (OCC) members Yvonne and Michael Stoffey who won positions on two local fire and water district boards. It doesn't appear the very nice school board candidates I met there won their races as I'd hoped. Marion County fared very badly during the special election - there's no sugarcoating it. And that's a shame. The low voter turnout everywhere in Oregon for that special election also stunk. Know what didn't stink?! The OCC's first annual event in The Dalles on the 17th. Solomon and I were happy to welcome keynote speaker Steve Yates with his wife, Michelle, in from Florida. Though it was "the wee hours of the night" their time, we ended up sitting around the dining room table catching up before Steve got some shuteye prior to a big Newsmax interview that morning. These interviews look so professional on TV, but if you could see what they really look like behind the scenes when you're not in a studio, you'd laugh. I crawled out of bed and threw on a robe in time to grab some candid photos while Solomon dug out my lightboxes from storage. We used the garbage bag box from Costco to prop up Steve's camera ... and were ready to roll! Then Newsmax switched his topic from Chinese tariffs to the Ukraine at the last minute. Very random. Oregon Rising , the official newsletter of the OCC, will get into more details about the event itself, so I won't duplicate too much here. (Subscribe at .) What I will say is Steve Yates and also Ray Hacke from Pacific Justice Institute were fabulous speakers. Ray is one of Oregon's hidden legal gems, as the audience quickly learned. We enjoyed having Taiwan Consul General Daniel Chen down from Seattle before he heads back to assume a senior-level position in Taipei's equivalent of the U.S. State Department. It's not every day you get a foreign dignitary to pop in to your event! What's the most impressive to me, though, was that we created a family-friendly environment where adults could learn and kids felt welcome. The room was packed. We raised money. No one was trying to stab anyone in the back. And it was just a pleasant event all the way around. Imagine that! Solomon and I have been busy with Republicans Overseas (RO). We have a new ~. Kym, our communications director, has been cranking out press releases right and left lately. New chapters opening. New chapter presidents. A new board member. New projects. And if you think the policy work that started with President Trump's campaign promise to RO is over... nope. We're right in the thick of it and waiting week to week to learn when we'll have to take off to D.C. Anyway - go to the OCC you want to see news, a ton of photos and upcoming events. We've added to the site quite a bit since last month. And... We'll be registering voters like crazy this summer! | | | | | | | | | | | | | The podcast is picking up steam! You can listen you'd like. The latest is Ep. 7: Episode of Deception. AKA The Don Powers Episode. Past Newsletters ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ At the ~ s ~ Again ~ ~ | | | | | ~ | ---|---|--- | ~ "KerryMcQuisten.com" You received this email because you subscribed to our list. Help us Give Voters the Tools to Decide for Themselves

In a time when confusion and misinformation can drown out the truth, people of faith need trusted resources to make informed
decisions at the ballot box. That’s why we’ve created a comprehensive Voter Guide—to clearly lay out where candidates stand on the
issues that matter most to our communities and our values.

But getting this guide into the hands of voters across New Jersey takes resources. With your support, we can produce, mail, and
share these guides far and wide, ensuring that every voice has the information needed to vote with confidence and conviction.

| | STAND WITH US: A Night to Celebrate Freedom & Fuel the Future
---
| | | |
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/4cPSoM4cg/c?w=V2E69Ue81ePbKFVJ63BMP7n0dxqG9N0t9sRz0SQTkL4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9XV1cuSEFNSUxUT05GT1JWSVJHSU5JQS5DT00iLCJyIjoiN2M1ZmRhMzgtNzk0Ny00NmQ3LWE2NTItYWY0Mjk5Y2YwYmQ2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0)
---
| | | |
---
| | Fellow Patriots, We’re excited to invite you to a very special evening, one that’s built on the values that make this country strong: service, faith, and patriotism. JOIN US for a night of celebration and inspiration with Delegate Nick Freitas, as we rally support for the next final stretch of our Primary campaign! This event is more than a fundraiser; it’s a call to save Virginia, and we need you there. For the last 10 years, Nick Freitas has been a fierce defender of our liberties and an articulate advocate for the things that matter in District 62. His presence will be greatly missed in the General Assembly next year, but his commitment and courageous spirit is shared by Karen Hamilton, who is ready to continue his legacy and keep fighting for YOU in Richmond! But she can't get there without you.Your presence will help us build the campaign that HD-62 DESERVES, one grounded in truth, committed to service, and armed with the boldness required for these pivotal times in Virginia. To RSVP for this event, please click the link below and contribute the amount of either a ticket or, if you'd be so inclined, a sponsorship level. Details are available on the above flyer or by contacting palmer@hamiltonforvirginia.com. Every dollar counts, and we THANK YOU for your support of this campaign!We can't defend liberty without you!
---
| | | |
---

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: American Action News
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4faqelk6fi9sim5jmafe480ubl5ql5ujoga9ing_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1j68oj1c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbkro57ocdr8su54npq17q5cdhvlvoq9jhneoukg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1j68oj1c3h2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zls1udbemca9ucov0pbpormgbnuqjkqk9r9c8qf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1j68oj1c3h2bs)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze20uebg7p4tsbnd6hiahmia4ulnekn8qi6s73c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1j68oj1c3h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z399q7n9idcopnbf72moedksl8o52d23k10iq6bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1j68oj1c3h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Goldco
subject: Hannity: U.S. economy heading toward stagflation?
body:
For many people today, stagflation is something that we know only from history books.

| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8m2qui43qqgpd6lvmi7gq5mvr384puq0ip7pvug_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1j68oj6c3h2bs)
---
# **Could The U.S. Economy Sink Into Stagflation?**
---
|
---
| | For many people today, stagflation is something that we know only from history books. But I remember it well. The combination of economic stagnation and brutal inflation we witnessed in the 1970s was not pretty. Many Americans suffered. But while the topic of stagflation has popped up on and off over the past few years, the threat of stagflation doesn’t seem to have been taken very seriously. Even when inflation pushed to 40-year highs a few years ago under Biden, everyone seemed to take for granted that the US economy would remain strong and resilient. But with markets reacting wildly to the current Trade Wars and fears of a recession growing, could the threat of stagflation be rearing its head once again? Find out in this [**new article**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2irqvgt8sj5t2k6c670uhmkph60haf6tr3mf86g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1j68oj6c3h2bs) that just went up. It’s filled with some valuable information about what you might be up against, and how you help protect yourself. If you’re confused about what stagflation is, or why it could stage a comeback, this is a must read! **[Read Will Stagflation Crush The U.S. Economy?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5she8us544k9gecrv34a62gp04g4pjeh7ft5hs8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1j68oj6c3h2bs) **now and stay informed! You won’t regret it. Yours Truly,

| Don't let this moment pass you by--it's time to get your copy today at www.Edthetrucker.com, you're not merely purchasing a book; you're embracing a movement that speaks directly to the heart of the struggles and aspirations of blue-collar families like yours.
Edward Durr's remarkable journey from truck driver to political advocate embodies the everyday challenges you encounter, making his story both relatable and inspiring. By joining this coalition, you're not just reading about change; you're actively participating in a call for transparency and accountability that our communities desperately need.
