clean_body: My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate. I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate... If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation... If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts... ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond. My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Actionisthe most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors. We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them. And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on theissues. Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to: Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections. Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes. All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend. We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from: voting in our elections taking benefits reserved for you being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes. Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully canceled out in all future elections.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. GOP Rep. Brandon Gill **[fired back at far-left Democrat Rep. Ilhan Omar](https://substack.com/redirect/40e65c83-433a-43fd-8ef9-892c0524bddc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for harshly criticizing President Donald Trump's Big Beautiful Bill, putting her in her place in front of congress.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/40e65c83-433a-43fd-8ef9-892c0524bddc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/40e65c83-433a-43fd-8ef9-892c0524bddc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Omar could not have been more harsh in her characterization of Trump's bill and the effects she anticipates it will have on poor Americans who rely on certain social safety nets, some of which were cut in the bill.
"We hear the Republicans talk about the 'Big Beautiful Bill,' I think this is the Big Ugly Bill," Omar started. "Let's call it what it is, it is the largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the rich in U.S. history!"
She disputed Republicans' claim that cuts were made to eliminate fraud, waste and abuse, arguing, "The only way to slash this much safety net spending is by making it harder for people to survive!"
**[Gill sat ready to set the record straight as the congresswoman spoke.](https://substack.com/redirect/40e65c83-433a-43fd-8ef9-892c0524bddc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I'm thrilled about this piece of legislation, this reconciliation bill I believe will balance, it will extend the Trump tax cuts for the working class so that they don't experience the biggest tax increase in American history and it will grow the economy, but of course it will also help us implement the Trump agenda, which is the clean up the chaos and destruction that Joe Biden unleashed on our country in the last 4 years!"
Gill further thanked DOGE for helping identify areas where cuts can and should be made. "So many of our colleagues on the other side of the aisle have not been upset about the waste, fraud and abuse that the process has uncovered, rather they've been angry that the fraud has been exposed at all!" Gill explained.
**["President Trump with DOGE is doing exactly what he was elected to do,"](https://substack.com/redirect/40e65c83-433a-43fd-8ef9-892c0524bddc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Gill said. "DOGE is part of the Trump mandate, it is extremely popular!"
Watch the rest of Gill's response to Omar here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/40e65c83-433a-43fd-8ef9-892c0524bddc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Columbia protester had link to Hamas, allegedly considered setting student on fire: report
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a7d6bceb-7921-4f92-a6ad-10508d37a586?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A 20-year-old man who participated in anti-Israel protests at Columbia University was allegedly a member of a chat group that received updates directly from Hamas' military wing and contemplated setting a student on fire during campus demonstrations, according to **[federal court documents filed in his hate crime case](https://substack.com/redirect/a7d6bceb-7921-4f92-a6ad-10508d37a586?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* **Tarek Bazrouk, 20, was allegedly a member of a chat group** that received regular updates from Abu Obeida, the official spokesperson for Hamas' al-Qassam Brigades, and frequently wore the green headband used by Hamas terrorists while boasting about having relatives in the terror group.
* **He contemplated extreme violence during campus protests and made threatening statements** \- While at Columbia in April 2024, Bazrouk allegedly texted about lighting a flare and considering setting someone on fire, saying there were "too many" people around or he "would've hurted them," and later told friends he would "boom boom" any Jewish person he saw.
* **Federal prosecutors have charged him with three hate crimes for attacking Jewish people** \- Bazrouk is accused of assaulting Jewish protesters at three separate incidents between April 2024 and January 2025, including punching a Columbia student while ranting about Hitler and Nazis, with each charge carrying up to 10 years in prison.
* **Authorities found weapons, cash, and evidence of possible drug operations during searches** \- When federal agents searched his Manhattan home, they discovered replica firearms, brass knuckles, multiple knives, and $750,000 in cash allegedly from his smoke shop business, while his phone contained extensive pro-Hamas propaganda including images of dead terrorist leaders like Yahya Sinwar.

* * *
# Ted Cruz and Joni Ernst demand answers from left wing tax-funded news company
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae3f6568-444c-4b28-87a7-a37ac348aeb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Senators Joni Ernst and Ted Cruz[sent a letter to NPR](https://substack.com/redirect/ae3f6568-444c-4b28-87a7-a37ac348aeb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** questioning the outlet's bias after former NPR editor Uri Berliner resigned following his public essay criticizing the network's lack of "viewpoint diversity" and liberal bias.
* **The Corporation for Public Broadcasting is allegedly withholding information about the grant from Congress** \- Ernst and Cruz accused CPB of failing to provide transparency about an "Editorial Enhancement Grant" given to NPR, with CPB staff telling congressional staff they couldn't share grant details "due to the terms of our contract with NPR."
* **The senators are threatening future funding over transparency concerns** \- Ernst warned that "millions in tax dollars should not be wasted funding purely partisan propaganda," while both senators questioned whether Congress can trust CPB with taxpayer funds, noting the corporation is requesting $595 million for fiscal year 2027 while the White House has proposed $1.1 billion in cuts to CPB funding.

Ted Cruz and Joni Ernst demand answers from left wing tax-funded news company | | ---|---|--- Senators Joni Ernst and Ted Cruz questioning the outlet's bias after former NPR editor Uri Berliner resigned following his public essay criticizing the network's lack of "viewpoint diversity" and liberal bias. The Corporation for Public Broadcasting is allegedly withholding information about the grant from Congress \- Ernst and Cruz accused CPB of failing to provide transparency about an "Editorial Enhancement Grant" given to NPR, with CPB staff telling congressional staff they couldn't share grant details "due to the terms of our contract with NPR." The senators are threatening future funding over transparency concerns \- Ernst warned that "millions in tax dollars should not be wasted funding purely partisan propaganda," while both senators questioned whether Congress can trust CPB with taxpayer funds, noting the corporation is requesting $595 million for fiscal year 2027 while the White House has proposed $1.1 billion in cuts to CPB funding. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You're currently a free subscriber to . Fellow Conservative, For four years, Joe Biden and the senior Democrats propping up his administration chose to put their complete and total trust in the terrorist regime in Tehran. Why? Because they desperately wanted to get a deal done with the Ayatollah, a deal that would limit work on a nuclear bomb in exchange for sanctions relief. But guess what? Terrorists don't negotiate. They lie, cheat, and steal while keeping their opponents close in enough to give them hope while causing chaos from the shadows. **If you can tell this is too long and you don't want to read through to the end, _**_please do me a favor and take a minute to record your response to the question of whether Iran should be allowed to have a nuclear program. **_**_ [**Begin Survey >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.) **_After President Trump 's first term, he had the Iranian regime on their knees. Then Joe Biden undid everything the Trump Administration spent years working toward. _** Now, Iran is using money it makes via oil sales to fund terrorist outfits in Gaza, Lebanon, and Yemen. I strongly agree with President Trump that we need to cut off all Iranian oil sales. This move would put a stranglehold on their ability to sow discord and fund terrorist operations across the Middle East. _**_I want to know if you agree with us. Do you believe we 're out of time to stop Iran from acquiring a nuclear weapon? _**_**_ _** _**Is now the time to act to stop Iran dead in its tracks? name: AMAC Action
subject: President Trump only has 18 months.
body:
My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs3fcifdpjofa7s4os1est87ui6mkg9kee956or8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfv1oqrhpeq9llbi3ieq7u3k39qu15gpi7dlbgv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpv1af3gjpokv6jdkt2o0rk6pv9lgbuq40tsdaeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk4gk81vsbldh63hl658nchvld9il78b265tc130_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zih4k20f7jkrj6f16cb84b3drsm03gr5chl3mmqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z91csh9s0lg4cvogagc0f19jj2unq34d2nujgmc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjrnttbnq5fs989heji6ubuj32hri39e6229o8n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4t5pjesjc7hrn3f9vn6tbhj9h2p52sekn0nsb88_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)
---
| | P.S. [**To secure our elections and your vote once and for all please click this link or the button below to make your critical gift today.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znap4oca6v0p0ac7nj9hpkdjqv4apii6nov992l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs) My friend, YOU are the difference between success and failure.
---
[ **SUPPORT AMAC ACTION** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zef9593hf6b4dakij23rsjugthf35dbi8jj62ti0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqfq97o9ti5hiac249k5jbra3qq1oplmk4n79ug8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)
---
_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z13fthnvi81r82vf5a3f76v772b2bg2bnuos8rr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdmgdevu2999fc4rla33oi0p5m8ti862panapetg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm0p74chh2bs)

name: American Patriot Daily
subject: America’s Credit Just Took a Hit — What About Yours?
body:

Will the CBDC change how you access your own money? The U.S. continues testing the federal digital currency. It could **redefine** retirement planning, privacy, and the future of cash. [**Read More**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=75a0wm0pq8oi6dforqof4roaadgfof3uy527f67z850mdjysbmakqzpbcflrems3mz2bhe3g6tzwabeqbhdaf0145y0v2cht7u8outwbizpz8d0h50o4456aqah4t7os6k56y5gjvg53xpxhs7gn0fnanpdmcubgubaaj4qajp1gwwjfqypo0no0r5es3jaq8qn0c6f1knh3t60p44phk8q27y9s221iyh5dv4a61u9e0kmez19sdfe43ioz7vvygioadvzjg1aub3q7c1lzrap05h918fxj7kk2vji&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h)

Banks don't need your **permission** to legally seize your deposits. This is how you can protect your savings. [**Find Out**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=75a0wm0pq8oi6dforqof4roaadgfof3uy7buwu24tnqvlqshzwkqdo509d9lb5r2o32ijz88sw34s41mafpbp4z7xtqkoso27mxswgfhj93yewka199dt4g9ka6lro36rvom7fiwyjkvuw2hlw3rrg0onm7i223554l4idvs6342trcd16k2q6cvf8ji0gy9ujffikicr2xp0l7sy6j72wve0q0g29bwjlrhz9767yfrrnzgfl7cmlm6zx5p8dcxa4jekiah6ye6r4zmosik5cec0j3k4bovrfqxift&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h)
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h) | **[America's Worst Nightmare](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h)**
Who will pay the price for Washington's $37 trillion debt spiral? Tensions between President Trump and Jerome Powell's Fed are escalating. Are we on the brink of a modern-day **Debt Jubilee?** [**Read More**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h)
* * *
**[When the U.S. Gets a Downgrade,
No One Is Safe.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h)** America's credit rating was just cut again - this time from a AAA to AA+. And it wasn't just Uncle Sam. Moody's has now downgraded **10 regional banks** and issued negative outlooks for even more. This isn't about "Wall Street noise." This is about the **foundation of your wealth, cost of your money, the stability of your bank, and the future of your retirement savings.** Here's what a downgrade actually means:
* ❌ Higher interest on U.S. debt
* ❌ More pressure on the dollar
* ❌ Greater strain on banks already exposed to risky bonds
* ❌ Lower confidence in America's financial system

And when confidence drops... **so do markets.** So ask yourself: Are you really comfortable having your nest egg - your 401(k), IRA, or savings - tied to paper assets that depend on the government's ability to pay its bills? **[That's why banks and more Americans are taking steps to hedge their retirement with real, physical gold and silver.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h)** Not ETFs. Not gold stocks. Not promises. **Real metals. Stored securely. Held in your name.** **It's about control in an out-of-control system.** [**Download your FREE 2025 Gold and Silver Protection Guide and discover how to:**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h)
* ✅ Legally move funds from your IRA or 401(k) into physical metals
* ✅ Hedge against inflation, rate hikes, and market volatility
* ✅ Regain control of your retirement

**Claim My Free Protection Guide** _No Cost or Obligation!_ [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxc5j2&__onlt=h)

Peter,
As a former teacher, nothing bothers me more than watching a bully. And Trump is the biggest one I’ve ever seen.
When it’s a kid doing the bullying, you talk to them and tell them why it’s wrong. But when it’s a grown man like Donald Trump?
You bully him back.
Let me be clear: the time for Democrats to play nice is over. Trump is a weak, cruel man who poses a clear and present danger to our democracy and to the health and safety of millions of Americans.
It’s time for us to stand our ground.
If we’re going to stop him, we can’t hesitate. We’ve got to go toe-to-toe with the Trump administration.

name: Elect Common Sense
subject: This moment demands moral clarity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
We all must speak out

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkirrkg5aui3j24kkd0o31n2c4nh67si5t8mgc7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74clh2bs)
Friend,

We're witnessing a **chilling wave of antisemitic violence** sweeping across the United States.

From college campuses to city streets, Jewish Americans are being targeted with threats, harassment, and violence at an accelerating rate.

This rise in hate is being fueled by _dangerous political rhetoric, conspiracy theories, and a growing tolerance for extremism_ from far too many of our so-called "leaders" like **Ilhan Omar.** And when they stay silent, or worse -- when they wink and nod at hate -- _the consequences are deadly._

**We cannot afford to look away.**

_**[Please add your name today to stand in solidarity with the Jewish community and demand action from our leaders.>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1te2jgcscq29esq9ktold6buk4ut3q9t9jjevsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74clh2bs)**_

Antisemitic incidents have surged to **record highs,** and still, _many in power refuse to speak out._ Some even amplify the same toxic lies that fuel this hate.

**This moment demands moral clarity. It demands political courage. And it demands that all of us speak out -- loudly and unequivocally -- against antisemitism in all its forms.**

_**[Add your name today to stand with the Jewish community and say: Enough is enough. Antisemitism has no place in America.>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlvjvib9e4ngriinsi2os6nfc6d23el2eureg3k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74clh2bs)**_

History has shown us where silence leads. Let's make sure we are on the right side of it.

In solidarity,

Elect Common Sense

name: Mark Kelly
subject: People who deserve parades
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Trump wants to co-opt the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States Army so he can have a big military parade for his birthday.
#

Trump wants to co-opt the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States Army so he can have a big military parade for his birthday.
Yes, I know. It’s as ridiculous as it sounds.
But a big parade isn’t a bad thing. A lot of Americans really deserved them.
People like the Apollo 11 astronauts, after they landed on the moon:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june25.0e_cTw&refcode=em250604-1-500&t=1&akid=6082%2E6688874%2EAO1IIR)
Or the heroes who liberated Paris from the Nazis in 1944:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june25.0e_cTw&refcode=em250604-1-500&t=2&akid=6082%2E6688874%2EAO1IIR)
Or the victorious Americans coming home after Operation Desert Storm:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june25.0e_cTw&refcode=em250604-1-500&t=3&akid=6082%2E6688874%2EAO1IIR)
Look, I’m not opposed to a parade. What I am absolutely, completely opposed to is somebody like Donald Trump making the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army about him. I do not support giving that guy a birthday parade while he destroys the democratic institutions that generations of Americans fought and died for, and works to slash the care and benefits veterans receive through the VA.
**You’ve got to earn that kind of honor, and Trump has not.**
I served our country for 25 years. I deployed all over the world, flew 39 combat missions, and made more than 375 successful carrier landings. And I mean this: If there is anything I can do to prevent Donald Trump from making a mockery of the finest fighting men and women on the face of the earth, I’m going to do it.
If you’re with me, please: [**Chip in and help me continue fighting back against Trump as he attacks our democracy. I need a big team with me, and I wouldn’t ask if this was not important.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june25.0e_cTw&refcode=em250604-1-500&t=4&akid=6082%2E6688874%2EAO1IIR)

name: Mike Carey
subject: Can I re-introduce myself?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carey for Congress
body:
Peter, your inbox is probably flooded with requests, but I’m reaching out for a different reason—to re-introduce myself and share my commitment to you. |
---
Peter,

Your inbox is probably flooded with requests, but I'm reaching out for a different reason -- to re-introduce myself and share my commitment to you.

Hi, I'm Mike. I was born and raised on my family's farm in a small town called Sabina, Ohio. After earning an ROTC scholarship to attend the Marion Military Institute, I served as an officer in the military while earning a bachelor's degree from the Ohio State University. The values that guided me then continue to guide me in Congress today: hard work, community, and freedom.

As a professional, I became an executive for one of the nation's largest privately owned energy companies, headquartered in Ohio. For more than twenty years, I fought in the private sector to protect American jobs by opposing the same failed energy policies being pushed today by the Democrats.

Today, I'm using my experience to fight back against the radicals in Congress and help President Trump pass his America First Agenda. Peter, I'm committed to making Ohio a better place to live, work, and raise a family.

Thank you for your unwavering support of our team! As we gear up for the upcoming election, I'm counting on you to stay in the fight with us. The Left is already targeting my seat, and they're prepared to pull out all the stops to flip it. That's why I'm mobilizing early for what promises to be a tough race. Peter, your support means the world to me.

[**Will you stand by my side in this critical election? Your commitment makes a bigger impact than you know. Please, take a moment to sign your name below to show you're with me.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=75a7f11ac9114f3ba9b2fd0e38dfdfd7&_e=vipnfdjmf1dIe442EzrByup3kGs0FAwYDkHmfZtAt2oV8z8s0um6SDno2GdP2KGqH6gJKZLcuEy7mdP7LCFqxrzizf3b15vudBINFCl2efbBQ_IOF_HeD4aQkDPR2DZx2JB_cZ4sPVRZQ2hQl8FZnpr0RypQvV_DXjGuLpGW3AR-wQ976XrI-4qSLJ1kDywr2vVWHjQa8u5h1DJctHxfptFsKGM-qYuzmhxCpE4EGwflWmOSfZaBkO4hBX_lMV5KAaAKDFPNCmKFI45oQkUcl_tVYGCqH2phZNex_bHI97adb9RsBJzRJTHqKvrZ3wpZsNauFYdG7jULjxwrIxj5WJZhhuKCyWytx5HHP4oVNLGU6YZb-lrr-BJVwinhNTSFEdV6aVTmp4kzBNHyDdptKw%3D%3D)

name: General John King
subject: Shot and stabbed
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe.

|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsm6529fd3d7u7t839nilmasvo0j2f3npgibj88_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop.

My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe.

**I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.**

That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors.

**I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders.

Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure.**

[**But I can’t do it without your support.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh5pvv7evo9vh71jjmur0mkt6u25htm8j44oj5ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs)

When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when __**"Cop City"**__ protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center.

He must be defeated.

[**Whether it’s $10, $25, or $100, your donation will help me bring determination, resolve, and support for our law enforcement officers to the U.S. Senate.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7fm57tm1ijr62hrcggb1j4gjek8tgvp901b758_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs)

[**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztjo076m5mh4vemtr5eia2beepaiqtlcc9chnvbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs) [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zunpen0m5e00qk5bmjm8ji1k20rra84q01743lvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znr0t2gla2u5kau2ej6beinatk40993ht6l14eq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs) [**PITCH IN MORE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z67in1dsnnhon7l2jtipl2bjur5glnk5ajtuagsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs)
[**Will you stand with me? Please donate now to help me take this fight to Washington.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmf7kqitbi9bm071lrng2g8uhvkgpo2n3ec0g7a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs)

I started my career as a beat cop and became a police chief. I know bullets and budgets, and I’m ready to fight for you in the Senate. Let’s win this together.

Thank you,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zml3m61q5j5lm0khvkvqffofhfnh0996n86qa020_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs)
Maj. Gen. John King (retd.)

- STAND WITH OUR LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICERS - [**PITCH IN NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztrtqjnt9qhljigoe7g52ffiombhi7r89srjo8mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hm8o74cdh2bs)

|
General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. clean_body: During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. | Fellow Conservative, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop. My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty. That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors. I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders. Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure. When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when "Cop City" protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center. He must be defeated. I started my career as a beat cop and became a police chief. I know bullets and budgets, and I’m ready to fight for you in the Senate. Let’s win this together. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) - STAND WITH OUR LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICERS - | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. body:
Big news out of South Carolina last night — and it's turning heads across the country.

Team Lee Johnson here. Big news out of South Carolina last night — and it's turning heads across the country. Democrat Keishan Scott just won a special election by _FORTY POINTS_ in a district that Kamala Harris only carried by five in 2024. That’s a seismic shift — and it happened right in **Lindsey Graham’s own backyard.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108962372/549559867/-1448199756?refcode=email_060425_ljohnson&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTUwZDdlYi01MjQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_JH_SiyR2wsSDJnbac59lWcxaPpqJvnM0tnnl8qrXU=) Here’s what this means: South Carolinians are ready for change. They’re tired of the same old politicians who look out for themselves instead of us. They’re fired up — and so are we. But if we want to build on this momentum and take the fight straight to Lindsey Graham, we need to move fast. Our campaign is gaining steam, but we don’t have millions in the bank — yet. **[That’s where you come in: can you rush a donation of $5, $15 or whatever you find meaningful – split with Andrea Salinas – to help Lee Johnson defeat Lindsey Graham next November? They’re tired of the same old politicians who look out for themselves instead of us. They’re fired up — and so are we. But if we want to build on this momentum and take the fight straight to Lindsey Graham, we need to move fast. Our campaign is gaining steam, but we don’t have millions in the bank — yet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re seeing a strong response on social media and from grassroots supporters like you. But a moment like this only helps if we have the resources to capitalize on it — to get Lee’s message out, expand our field operation, and push even harder. Let’s show Lindsey Graham that what happened last night wasn’t a fluke — it was a preview. Thanks for being with us, —Team Lee Johnson | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States

Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=rpzH9WG5VoQCFZH7SqVbJfeB0gnsJu8EkWNKUbbCVIJisqKqN5a2GvhPW45nC/09TcuZEx/elfzvU1tf8yVwSeQ+biYkHpNeo2Tm4D9yKVs=]
CNN: Trump's Justice Department shutters specialized FBI team combating foreign election interference threats [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/CNN_FBI_ForeignInterference.png]
CNN is reporting that the FBI has disbanded a team of specialists charged with combating foreign threats to U.S. elections.
The shuttering of the FBI Foreign Influence Task Force and reassignment of team members follows a directive from President Trump's Attorney General Pam Bondi. The special task force was established in 2017 following a wave of foreign influence operations targeting the US electoral process, including Russia’s efforts to influence the 2016 election.
We want to hear from voters in your area on this news. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you agree with the Justice Department disbanding this task force?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

body:
This database gives Trump a new tool to target, jail, and disappear, regular Americans whose only crime is opposing his presidency. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DHM1uwt_xAd1BveVl8JWhcHSRuHwPoNvPNQj1ggqVvAwl7VM3aG83nbJQR3gVuVemBqtr7_a-6XO1vNItDj4t3GdB7v08ebMj-V7AVOxNIOgo_mqmMSDYzjVBla76JtyzhhfPKbDVrHTIdMliBajE9vCQm2GuxqWVBLbS8jjN4c4TM0NVNpEL2_KH3HBPGT6QQ3ncnstjllPSei8J1kQ0byIl_2YCK534rhWOtOZCPxQX6O9nHQDkkIJxbSPkgVxS44H_5lJ4hXQYykMeAyhTCVvwzVEbBEUcWYC3I1bCOgmNLBmmc10yX3mFPBOCI7LiMcIPAm3E1KFdaw1j_qSj1axD9LYCZ5nvkmq5R1UXH-NhYuTaeQhwr1P9v4-fGMMS/4h2/XeHgtdRoQVaOTsDZaTGiiA/h0/h001.lGLfDNaYkqn4WUx1pwPBl1cmBEVCLV039mZjm2tT8MQ)
---
Friend, As we head into the sixth month of Trump's second term, the administration's push to consolidate authoritarian control is _accelerating_.
**News recently broke that the administration is working on a database to track American citizens** \- a tool they plan to use against politicians, activists, and regular people opposed to MAGA:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DHM1uwt_xAd1BveVl8JWhcCjzreO85e9eFgVIFFXjuqf5mZtfKnjgj7VbDjVAZog1yRNv0uoquAeeNQLgdYjgclovSZe0B52IolR5pF95jpfxSwjK08VmmjxsIGW0xFSh1nIo9saUknhxzXFsRETot0S0hmk_4XkOctmRhhs31DdtsljtlbvceTeChjbeqvAALgXslRvErCHaNhTFMmK8FhDJG96p56vfuljQ_FeA0n-N6tZQ_Uwpa7ZNxTZ_FW_hnQIDu7DtZK3lenigENFUOBIE5xKJT0AYVAjLm3QzjUgGmOgkrKyRHwn0QwZe8MSxoV5fDCaAFnM-qhHI-ndOnhQ4ZK23I5rtylzJe0C43TtsRiZgsMai0I54UFL2McCG/4h2/XeHgtdRoQVaOTsDZaTGiiA/h1/h001.CfMV6bULcvVNhx31NG7l6eUdwOMRl7ROZ8KLRhigm-s)
---
The data compiled by this tool will include social media postings, location data, medical and financial records, as well as private government data scraped from government agencies. **Anything and everything that can be utilized to identify and then target enemies of Trump.** The company building the database is Palantir, an intelligence contractor _that builds similar databases for the CIA and US Department of Defense_ , to identify, track, and eliminate terrorists. The owner of Palantir is billionaire Peter Thiel, the shadowy right-wing financier and behind the scenes backer of the bitcoin movement and figures like JD Vance and Elon Musk. Thiel, the founder of Paypal, has a fascist vision for America and leverages his wealth and influence to bring his dark dream into existence.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DHM1uwt_xAd1BveVl8JWhcA4_vLMUqWsmTaR89sQnYH9IUC6wa5TQeKH-rq5R930Q_iTHZbRv74m_ia0bIaWs2pG5_WqqmFyFX5Sp-xEritWh_UuEycKFrNzShdwaMkZALY_tIGeryIjXzSIFLhkCpDB18mhV9qifYttRz5z0yv4qJD62LpwqAGGMWj7moXZ2QBgCYs9eHl3tM9athKAYw7GFXfPZFxl4FJ5HLPJ8pzNS560RUkCJXF4s_3p4VohL6BTNebGvMXQY-stMNbRH9ONR1jFsKPP37i4BWB-aU_AMvMTNtTDkBTFTCtGJHXUHPjAZBH8x1ituQCWUgfAEQrGwdOQsrLcZ2ebFuietzFMVbBnvUeA1uKq0KIiUBrKL/4h2/XeHgtdRoQVaOTsDZaTGiiA/h2/h001.mqROFY1_FWnoMpeh4QIe3ID16ZRBx9PAU1yLleA0PeU)
---
**This soon to be released database gives Trump a new instrument to target, jail, and disappear, regular Americans whose only crime is opposing his presidency.**
[**Time is running out. We are not being hyperbolic when we say that the upcoming midterms could very well be the last election we have before Trump cements dictatorship and one party rule. clean_body: This database gives Trump a new tool to target, jail, and disappear, regular Americans whose only crime is opposing his presidency. | | Friend, As we head into the sixth month of Trump's second term, the administration's push to consolidate authoritarian control is accelerating. News recently broke that the administration is working on a database to track American citizens \- a tool they plan to use against politicians, activists, and regular people opposed to MAGA: | The data compiled by this tool will include social media postings, location data, medical and financial records, as well as private government data scraped from government agencies. Anything and everything that can be utilized to identify and then target enemies of Trump. The company building the database is Palantir, an intelligence contractor that builds similar databases for the CIA and US Department of Defense , to identify, track, and eliminate terrorists. The owner of Palantir is billionaire Peter Thiel, the shadowy right-wing financier and behind the scenes backer of the bitcoin movement and figures like JD Vance and Elon Musk. Thiel, the founder of Paypal, has a fascist vision for America and leverages his wealth and influence to bring his dark dream into existence. | This soon to be released database gives Trump a new instrument to target, jail, and disappear, regular Americans whose only crime is opposing his presidency. Thank you for standing with us in the fight for our Democracy, and now, what could very well be one for our lives. Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. name: Elect Common Sense
subject: This moment demands moral clarity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
We all must speak out

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5o3vsfgb27fi1qf0ivki5to8sjjlvco34f5g3ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hmcor6cph2bs)
Friend,

We're witnessing a **chilling wave of antisemitic violence** sweeping across the United States.

From college campuses to city streets, Jewish Americans are being targeted with threats, harassment, and violence at an accelerating rate.

This rise in hate is being fueled by _dangerous political rhetoric, conspiracy theories, and a growing tolerance for extremism_ from far too many of our so-called "leaders" like **Ilhan Omar.** And when they stay silent, or worse -- when they wink and nod at hate -- _the consequences are deadly._

**We cannot afford to look away.**

_**[Please add your name today to stand in solidarity with the Jewish community and demand action from our leaders.>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9g2pdt9qjqqbiesuofet6l0qg4j7dth6a0bdno8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hmcor6cph2bs)**_

Antisemitic incidents have surged to **record highs,** and still, _many in power refuse to speak out._ Some even amplify the same toxic lies that fuel this hate.

**This moment demands moral clarity. It demands political courage. And it demands that all of us speak out -- loudly and unequivocally -- against antisemitism in all its forms.**

_**[Add your name today to stand with the Jewish community and say: Enough is enough. Antisemitism has no place in America.>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zolmvd9bsi98kquc44ippu3skv9adh82oc6112k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hmcor6cph2bs)**_

History has shown us where silence leads. Let's make sure we are on the right side of it.

In solidarity,

Elect Common Sense
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv28lr1cluh31k2mkoctltmd30mecjqfnpauu4l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s1hmcor6cph2bs)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself.

I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork.

After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. **On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards.**

In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a **Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command.** Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions.

Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate.

**The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous.**

I'm running against **Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor** , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit _**against**_ the Minneapolis Police Department.

Governor Walz wants America to believe **Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo.** His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.”

So ask yourself: _**If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda?**_

**Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis.**

Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots.

But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.**It's common sense**. It's about **protecting Americans**.

Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then **[I’m asking you to pitch in $1, $5, or even $15 today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=213e2dfad9f6461693476974d07face0&_e=EKM4_RYwYhzjGDSQqz0hEI40ctfouMmmo6ITva2Ecn3-qlHwhpKiCxZZAmMpphEyDAMb7psLcOY_NXEo_kLpJdO3QnyYiQHJO_Qt4yNiKzJyhNmUSkq-K6ScpV6gse3lvsCMNTNjJnkGOGhjulEVDXw7i_PcrrTaL6luMKzPxcIkNprc9SwCpPTcuevGIQ7qS0erV9qym_3S40rlL5zt-tWp9g4zXVkV4shUMA41MICrNO1Azt_oN09pVR8kl4xtH9kg8p8xCQgdBp2OMiFKl4zuq40TihUnBtk0ZnVTwhxV_phouK6Zwa8XbUeTkCoX1lLi67AXXy4qqKWALhOVCbZKFdlCK49zyH48F9CKlOrkq2P8SSioZ-ghX__kzXK44JLavx6YCZazCqLCPxVxfQ%3D%3D)**

**Here's What I Believe:** I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens.

I believe in a **strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law** —no exceptions, no apologies.

I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities.

**I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point.**

Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it.

While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault.

Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either.

Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: **[Could you donate $10, $25, or even $50 to help me launch this campaign the right way?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=213e2dfad9f6461693476974d07face0&_e=EKM4_RYwYhzjGDSQqz0hEI40ctfouMmmo6ITva2Ecn3-qlHwhpKiCxZZAmMpphEyDAMb7psLcOY_NXEo_kLpJdO3QnyYiQHJO_Qt4yNiKzJyhNmUSkq-K6ScpV6gse3lvsCMNTNjJnkGOGhjulEVDXw7i_PcrrTaL6luMKzPxcIkNprc9SwCpPTcuevGIQ7qS0erV9qym_3S40rlL5zt-tWp9g4zXVkV4shUMA41MICrNO1Azt_oN09pVR8kl4xtOLJ3Gt4DUp3BCVpn7wGgXepPGvrbGhyuc1pQmseMPBAKCNvLrclF0JRP_9JfHKFeNiB3Py81DfGJKfBtjOq0qO7H-_qKCYnisFahgdZ56FCweiatGEc9zFtF5nMtWAUASUM7CWfOIlcnN2vY0fnEJw%3D%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=213e2dfad9f6461693476974d07face0&_e=EKM4_RYwYhzjGDSQqz0hEI40ctfouMmmo6ITva2Ecn3-qlHwhpKiCxZZAmMpphEyDAMb7psLcOY_NXEo_kLpJdO3QnyYiQHJO_Qt4yNiKzJyhNmUSkq-K6ScpV6gse3lvsCMNTNjJnkGOGhjulEVDXw7i_PcrrTaL6luMKzPxcIkNprc9SwCpPTcuevGIQ7qS0erV9qym_3S40rlL5zt-tWp9g4zXVkV4shUMA41MICrNO1Azt_oN09pVR8kl4xtvDE9bKrw41eBwSVFnSP9EqhvxbQqwT1iYqfhLS6c93j7XbKLFYxG2zQhCgQeNMOm0PCdW957-cepHpEnsBePhGWfcDeYq99DqvADRrJABhhFgvyc9YdH5BklLbZzh7GymeSYhUPQPknsrIcT8kjHXA%3D%3D)
Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet.

With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative.

**I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp.**

What I have is grit, **a record of service** , and hopefully, the support of **patriots like you** who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on...

And if you believe we deserve **leaders who've fought for this country—** Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=213e2dfad9f6461693476974d07face0&_e=EKM4_RYwYhzjGDSQqz0hEI40ctfouMmmo6ITva2Ecn3-qlHwhpKiCxZZAmMpphEyDAMb7psLcOY_NXEo_kLpJdO3QnyYiQHJO_Qt4yNiKzJyhNmUSkq-K6ScpV6gse3lvsCMNTNjJnkGOGhjulEVDXw7i_PcrrTaL6luMKzPxcIkNprc9SwCpPTcuevGIQ7qS0erV9qym_3S40rlL5zt-tWp9g4zXVkV4shUMA41MICrNO1Azt_oN09pVR8kl4xtv-3G3YwgTYGwkX05NTy0YNDsmxD-vQYyuqR3vJEHIi9YV5frHK6tSn8mr-teUfSeu50W793z44VtNjybZ4AHzzz_K9benL0AR9UZMNUnFMjOPRZVR_YgA3ehX4-PfiJKYYxW1IDXTQQ2cvt-9XA-ag%3D%3D)

clean_body: As much as Tim Walz would have America believe that Immigration officials are the new Gestapo, it really couldn’t be further from the truth. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself. I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork. After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards. In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command. Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions. Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate. The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous. I'm running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department. Governor Walz wants America to believe Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo. His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.” So ask yourself: If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda? Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis. Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots. But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.It's common sense. It's about protecting Americans. Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then Here's What I Believe: I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens. I believe in a strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law —no exceptions, no apologies. I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities. I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point. Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it. While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault. Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either. Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet. With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative. I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp. What I have is grit, a record of service , and hopefully, the support of patriots like you who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on... And if you believe we deserve leaders who've fought for this country— Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today. Let's do this. Let's turn the tide. Let's win. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Emperor Trump:
subject: Unlimited Power
body:
Trump and his MAGA allies will do anything for power. That is why Trump is attacking our courts, with his eyes on Pennsylvania next. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-xRnl5lAz35FvaBsdCpFETcUxFlF7uZdXuQBsQT9PRpNmHx5AgXZWrYAQPwIP1cL70Qg3geSFZh4gae3MaV4M5N7OL4-iB7d6h_pqNTUdoKI8X23nyq8f62r5uWj09tLudUqRA0O-X_AwTjuzxw1WKap5tRVha4pJPkRD8dPSxEypYEw6G_IlhUCE1IzG4e0T8pnaFmWbEs58O-9hql_julpyneu77xw8EjCB5_4mneZzr00wnMcsHkDR4Wv9GRtqsQNs8wu4zEql-t6C4V0wPQ/4h2/wWK-1JHxSz6tFbL_LUSVzQ/h0/h001.gshvjEjGVnLEcTAZZdyb7FT06cOFbkLjYApvRMmdI8Y)

Our courts are a system of local, state, and federal judges - each making decisions in their own jurisdiction. **Nationwide injunctions are court orders that prevent the government from enforcing a law or policy nationwide, not just for the parties in a specific lawsuit.** _Republicans are trying to end nationwide injunctions_ and the consequence would be complete chaos - allowing**Trump to commit unconstitutional actions in regions of the country with jurisdictions covered by MAGA judges.** Last month, our courts saved us from a complete fascist takeover using nationwide injunctions:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-xRnl5lAz35FvaBsdCpFETckO6QyTWecUMBHkiOGRKdILOFA9rMw75td-p0NBNTQaqaNkGzvDrjt2tLd4Jp5DRiULJ0Vlzl1c_M9GGx1Ie6fC34NH9ym4vjmliFirUu5Jz8wfxzEjKrFD6eM5pvknYKyAkD1OqFbtB-Ir96-jDQvES3wy5nxjU1Ga0hfADnMPK6llesUbHpi7jGMzKzUFcKWQmNK8r44K8SsNU06af8Ia1IETlP8x0it03tfjiK5pv7lH_bBl4fkRwdM7tsPY2E/4h2/wWK-1JHxSz6tFbL_LUSVzQ/h2/h001.x4IOVkJ3OMxN7R3rcCB0g_yuqIk2ZUuN-2ip2BMMzF8)
---
**_So Republicans snuck a provision in their new 1000 page budget bill -_****a single sentence that would end nationwide injunctions**** _._** That bill passed in the House and now must be approved by the Senate, and Republicans are fighting to keep that single sentence in the bill. _Trump and his MAGA allies will do anything for power._ **That is why Trump is attacking our courts, with his eyes on Pennsylvania next.** Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. _Their goal is to replace these judges with puppets who will let Trump act as an emperor and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive - turning it deep red._
[**PA law limits the ability of the democratic state Supreme Court justices to campaign - so we are stepping up in their stead.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.wX7R-tEVLgKSjlXk_ncm7Zg4wiOZkUEK7Jgc83yjHwVKg0ESPnmpQzB0lFpJ2kzbiJq4HBrfgxtVpsxvykIaMQmYSbf3OlDNBflvPB4bsmPNNxHoFzj4E8jpmF6XoboXuju1iJ2O0C0p1FhhRFuLpOFimefrFp12qBx7ZgBjMaeA-XgccndfiFlECWj6A7G4uuxMBMQPRfw-G331qhGocfcMDrBQS6vs2i03xeQjGKw/4h2/wWK-1JHxSz6tFbL_LUSVzQ/h3/h001.rmpEAT6w2Ybd2nCpPqXGvCWT_vpzB3FcZQwNhvde8vU) [**Can you chip in whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts & protect Pennsylvania's Supreme Court majority?**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-xRnl5lAz35FvaBsdCpFETfyNK9CUgyl9f2hBZ-TkU9d4_ZPodHhL6FQrGHXu9RBiKMrNJ2ocdu9St5yvoRpXJA7cOyq41zwdB1SRawVo8KYpmXYrCN2hbqzCuTUMVpxu5Ced4cwnzyCqD3Div6LrRmIOvne5L5JD98cjeCV5PytLjqtufZ46uVGJlafs7GHelzFPIrAkoGOfu68CU5jNa8wXYpJtKZ-eOK0QWm02eO_wzHuZo70rM4uBGgFiELaTND-2aJubgmOtgDcGn8MpGY/4h2/wWK-1JHxSz6tFbL_LUSVzQ/h4/h001.0OfOGrbHR_xI5xpsUNIS5uZpdCTu_wlrkgbmJFVWdhs)

clean_body: Trump and his MAGA allies will do anything for power. That is why Trump is attacking our courts, with his eyes on Pennsylvania next. | | Peter, Republicans are fighting to give Donald Trump unlimited power: | Our courts are a system of local, state, and federal judges - each making decisions in their own jurisdiction. Nationwide injunctions are court orders that prevent the government from enforcing a law or policy nationwide, not just for the parties in a specific lawsuit. Republicans are trying to end nationwide injunctions and the consequence would be complete chaos - allowingTrump to commit unconstitutional actions in regions of the country with jurisdictions covered by MAGA judges. Last month, our courts saved us from a complete fascist takeover using nationwide injunctions: | So Republicans snuck a provision in their new 1000 page budget bill -a single sentence that would end nationwide injunctions . That bill passed in the House and now must be approved by the Senate, and Republicans are fighting to keep that single sentence in the bill. Trump and his MAGA allies will do anything for power. That is why Trump is attacking our courts, with his eyes on Pennsylvania next. Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. Their goal is to replace these judges with puppets who will let Trump act as an emperor and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive - turning it deep red. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, Team Defend our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Defend our Courts PAC, please .

name: Left Action
subject: Tell the worst human in Congress that if she won't bother to read the bill before she votes, she should quit.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell MTG: "If you won't bother to read a critically important bill before you vote on it, you shouldn't be in Congress"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26aef0e1-4857-4bf8-9553-cc1d6892149d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3091b0c8-6006-46eb-a440-cbcfa0414d93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | It was the single most important bill of the Congressional session, Trump's "Big" bill, and [**Rep Greene didn't feel the need to read it before she voted** :](https://default.salsalabs.org/T224e8ad8-6dff-42f6-8600-542b04bd096c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _" In a post on X Tuesday, Greene explained that she didn't know that the bill includes a provision blocking states from regulating artificial intelligence, and had she known, she would have voted against the Medicaid-slashing legislation that passed by a one-vote margin._

_" Full transparency, I did not know about this section on pages 278-279 of the OBBB that strips states of the right to make laws or regulate AI for 10 years. I am adamantly OPPOSED to this and it is a violation of state rights and I would have voted NO if I had known this was in there," she wrote." (_[_source_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb2074d4-e70f-454c-aad8-776273df81c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _)_ It passed by one vote. Meaning if she'd voted No, it would have failed. Look, we get that members of Congress can't always read every line of every piece of paper that comes across their desk. But this was literally the most important bill this session, covering trillions of dollars, and touching essentially every part of government. **If she can't read this, she shouldn't be in Congress.** [Please join us in telling her that:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50a7d37c-96e3-426d-af4b-4bf0d075f777/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**" Rep: Greene if you won't bother to read bother to read a critically important bill before you vote on it, you shouldn't be in Congress.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c469390-f070-4fa8-83c0-913bed986a3b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15efcb67-8d95-4475-9cd1-ba86052f231e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3f174e3-0b75-41de-acd9-18e8d0df233a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52b22a59-59ab-4b3b-9f92-80cbf971bd8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

In San Antonio, voters are about to head to the polls to elect their next mayor. Republicans are laser-focused on this race, and we need to be, too. body:
| | | Friend, it's Kirsten Gillibrand, your DSCC Chair.

**Trump's been back in office only 4 months, and from my front-row seat in the Senate, I can tell you it's every bit as bad as we thought it would be -- worse, even.**

**[We can't wait another week to take action -- the fight to win back the majority and halt his extreme agenda starts NOW. So please, will you donate $5 immediately to flip the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250604-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250604-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&akid=20408%2E9716520%2ECCSe5n)**

**We NEED a Democratic Senate majority to keep Trump in check -- and as DSCC Chair, it's my responsibility to deliver one.**

With our Social Security, our Medicare, our economy, our civil rights, our grocery bills, and so much more at stake, the moment demands that we act _now._ That's why I'm coming to you today to let you know: _I can't do it without your help._

Chip in $5 or more IMMEDIATELY to help us take back the majority -- and our future>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250604-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250604-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&akid=20408%2E9716520%2ECCSe5n)**

name: Save Medicaid Action Alert via Care in Action
subject: ACT NOW: Stop the Senate from gutting Medicaid for millions
body:
Negotiations are happening in the Senate RIGHT NOW. Make your voice heard.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108968943/549578706/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-senate-save-medicaid-swap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTUzMzFmNS01YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kv8Yzb9nmEwALAYWzVRD1ShTmBxjkiWoS7hgzUUwrCE=&emci=a8cda937-b640-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=055331f5-5c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Just before Memorial Day, House Republicans passed an unimaginably cruel bill that will strip critical Medicaid coverage from more than 8 million Americans, jeopardizing the health and dignity of care workers across our nation.
**Now, it's headed to the Senate – and we urgently need your voice to stop this devastating attack on our communities' well-being.**
[**We have just weeks to overwhelm the Senate with opposition – click here right now and add your name to demand the Senate protect Medicaid coverage for domestic workers, hard-working families, children, and seniors.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108968944/549578716/-871559396?source=direct_link&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-senate-save-medicaid-swap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTUzMzFmNS01YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kv8Yzb9nmEwALAYWzVRD1ShTmBxjkiWoS7hgzUUwrCE=&emci=a8cda937-b640-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=055331f5-5c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108968946/549578724/-871559396?source=direct_link&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-senate-save-medicaid-swap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTUzMzFmNS01YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kv8Yzb9nmEwALAYWzVRD1ShTmBxjkiWoS7hgzUUwrCE=&emci=a8cda937-b640-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=055331f5-5c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Domestic workers care tirelessly for America's loved ones, keeping our households running and ensuring the elderly and disabled can live with dignity. Yet, **vast numbers of domestic workers do not get health benefits from their jobs, and so they rely heavily on Medicaid for essential health services like doctor visits, prenatal care, and emergency services for themselves and their families.**
Slashing Medicaid won't just rob millions of their health coverage – it will disproportionately affect women, immigrant communities, lower-income Americans, and especially those already struggling under economic pressures. There’s more: the bill that just passed the House will also slash the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program by a shocking 30% – all while giving massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy!
But here’s the thing: for the bill to pass in the Senate, Republicans can only lose a few votes. And, **some Republican Senators are already expressing concern – especially about the detrimental impact of Medicaid cuts**. Negotiations are happening right now, which is why it’s so important that we overwhelm them with opposition to this cruel bill.

clean_body: Negotiations are happening in the Senate RIGHT NOW. Make your voice heard. Just before Memorial Day, House Republicans passed an unimaginably cruel bill that will strip critical Medicaid coverage from more than 8 million Americans, jeopardizing the health and dignity of care workers across our nation. Now, it's headed to the Senate – and we urgently need your voice to stop this devastating attack on our communities' well-being. Domestic workers care tirelessly for America's loved ones, keeping our households running and ensuring the elderly and disabled can live with dignity. Yet, vast numbers of domestic workers do not get health benefits from their jobs, and so they rely heavily on Medicaid for essential health services like doctor visits, prenatal care, and emergency services for themselves and their families. Slashing Medicaid won't just rob millions of their health coverage – it will disproportionately affect women, immigrant communities, lower-income Americans, and especially those already struggling under economic pressures. There’s more: the bill that just passed the House will also slash the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program by a shocking 30% – all while giving massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy! But here’s the thing: for the bill to pass in the Senate, Republicans can only lose a few votes. And, some Republican Senators are already expressing concern – especially about the detrimental impact of Medicaid cuts. Negotiations are happening right now, which is why it’s so important that we overwhelm them with opposition to this cruel bill. Thank you for standing with us to protect domestic workers and families in this critical moment, The Care in Action Team

clean_body: = | When President Trump returned to office, he promised a “golden age” of free speech. What we got instead was a coordinated campaign to silence people who dare to speak the truth. ❌ Judges who ruled against him are being attacked and labeled “communists.” ❌ Journalists who won’t use his preferred language, like using the term “Gulf of America,” are being kicked out of press briefings. ❌ Universities are being threatened with funding cuts if their students or administrators disagree with administration policy. ❌ Even cultural institutions like the Kennedy Center are being taken over because the President didn’t like the plays they performed. This isn’t just rhetoric. These are thoroughly undemocratic tactics. Free speech and voting rights are core principles of our country’s democracy, so I’m not staying silent. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | **********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** Free speech is not a gift from the President. It’s a constitutional right. And it’s one I’ll keep standing up for. = Thank you for being in this fight with me, Steve | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = We are prohibited from accepting donations for Lobbyists or PACs during the regular Legislative Session. If you are a Lobbyist or PAC, you have received this email in error and please disregard. ** Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. subject: No one saw this coming — but it changes everything
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=060425_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-threespecials?refcode=060425_2]
Peter, this is BIG news:
Two Congressional districts — Texas’s 18th and Arizona’s 7th — are heading into special elections this year. These races weren’t on the map six months ago. Now, they could define the balance of power in the House.
Here’s why it matters:
Republicans have a five-seat majority. That’s it. And if we win these two seats, we narrow their hold on Congress to just three seats . That opens the door to blocking extreme bills, stopping MAGA appointments, and restoring actual legislative oversight.
But Republicans know that special elections are where turnout drops — and dark money wins. They’re already raising funds, pushing right-wing media talking points, and preparing to overwhelm our candidates before we can organize.
That’s why we launched the 2025 Special Election Fund with a clear goal: raise $25,000 by Sunday at midnight to meet this moment with the full force of our grassroots movement. Can you pitch in $7 or more right now so we can help fund early organizing, fight back against GOP attacks, and WIN these two critical seats? FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.
