Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69ab20f1372147cc9b06e93895ebae65&_e=PxdknqsjI9kS04kPuo_IvzqIdhrA-laz-QiHcIsmVKDdN0ZzAJQdFl-W7CQiU43Ic7tXKdT4XFMy5tfOj9LyMBDYYcRw5GN1YsT5LsnrpCpvSn2YAl8Ojre0DgNLzRw8Mjf6fIsTfFXUdrGJtv3XgG9RgWxuVmzJawTGeIhD_RgoHjGdIYu7t4veUQaU1QVBGuhp-GU17vzuszrcU5fEVVxm-n4oV6M4Xw2W6L1wQTScr163JjgrP6mWZUdiVb__kU_QWRUeqHr8yGmIW9KyKjGbePOX8HorQMic58rTLO0hh71DscJ4KTCvl4GqFH1Elr4Hyw5_zBVfaHevgrqx4wMBvf36jpUklTOC6NpgRNN23pxaBVfoJnuha9tMytXbuo2KVff8PDVIg4AjJhPoNSBxC_BCsUEOLnh6ApWQNtE%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69ab20f1372147cc9b06e93895ebae65&_e=PxdknqsjI9kS04kPuo_IvzqIdhrA-laz-QiHcIsmVKDdN0ZzAJQdFl-W7CQiU43Ic7tXKdT4XFMy5tfOj9LyMBDYYcRw5GN1YsT5LsnrpCpvSn2YAl8Ojre0DgNLzRw8Mjf6fIsTfFXUdrGJtv3XgG9RgWxuVmzJawTGeIhD_RgoHjGdIYu7t4veUQaU1QVBGuhp-GU17vzuszrcU5fEVVxm-n4oV6M4Xw2W6L1wQTScr163JjgrP6mWZUdiVb__S5lFRRhCJ37VU7tXcGK1a-w0ptCOeGVSUTLBtRJMaeaoD5IZZIWpRczO6Mau_yLra2mFjKWTZVGm7Ap4_3b0rAenzkqoyX3nzKBVpT5Lxg732_RHS7_9cH23hos-5mjny2kuP3l3B9Q2sSQR6wvtkys22VSjJSxcEcKPnR9ShH4%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69ab20f1372147cc9b06e93895ebae65&_e=PxdknqsjI9kS04kPuo_IvzqIdhrA-laz-QiHcIsmVKDdN0ZzAJQdFl-W7CQiU43Ic7tXKdT4XFMy5tfOj9LyMBDYYcRw5GN1YsT5LsnrpCpvSn2YAl8Ojre0DgNLzRw8Mjf6fIsTfFXUdrGJtv3XgG9RgWxuVmzJawTGeIhD_RgoHjGdIYu7t4veUQaU1QVBGuhp-GU17vzuszrcU5fEVVxm-n4oV6M4Xw2W6L1wQTScr163JjgrP6mWZUdiVb__V-VNtPMeD0q20TtF3o-Ez0u3dNk_zFzu687Scrvzlg0gKsaR8yjtcXdonZvK2hnDWa_VJlJtFmbTQB9KCc0DEj2KlMgLT2-OZqwtD4Z_rge_CBnF_3IxCIqm3d1BAT7yQ-vOJvEpJPLxkNHU_E7pdIERSPeLzZlalT0zsTG8KZo%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69ab20f1372147cc9b06e93895ebae65&_e=PxdknqsjI9kS04kPuo_IvzqIdhrA-laz-QiHcIsmVKDdN0ZzAJQdFl-W7CQiU43Ic7tXKdT4XFMy5tfOj9LyMBDYYcRw5GN1YsT5LsnrpCpvSn2YAl8Ojre0DgNLzRw8Mjf6fIsTfFXUdrGJtv3XgG9RgWxuVmzJawTGeIhD_RgoHjGdIYu7t4veUQaU1QVBGuhp-GU17vzuszrcU5fEVVxm-n4oV6M4Xw2W6L1wQTScr163JjgrP6mWZUdiVb__890ViXvxelj4Kz9EjWWKxnGRkKrLeRH-wxQK5I4N6HkwMaLie_iK_qU300U8Nf7cAB-2VnKDlMJhEtnNxrksKrXH6c5YHCcd0yTacWQq1QKzUyravb1Hb4SRNGR2BYnXU1bywoAcy7DsoUioJTEhwOHocLFWk9sLxCjHsXBdeOA%3D)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. Can you pitch in any amount?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69ab20f1372147cc9b06e93895ebae65&_e=PxdknqsjI9kS04kPuo_IvzqIdhrA-laz-QiHcIsmVKDdN0ZzAJQdFl-W7CQiU43Ic7tXKdT4XFMy5tfOj9LyMBDYYcRw5GN1YsT5LsnrpCpvSn2YAl8Ojre0DgNLzRw8Mjf6fIsTfFXUdrGJtv3XgG9RgWxuVmzJawTGeIhD_RgoHjGdIYu7t4veUQaU1QVBGuhp-GU17vzuszrcU5fEVVxm-n4oV6M4Xw2W6L1wQTScr163JjgrP6mWZUdiVb__pBhRzFm8tleIHdnrpgwMewXTgDRh6Drdp3nNJEr_TXRuPXt1MwchO2sBUioWyKpBsyNFa-eBtqTvez-dTvBjVHhMY8airKbOCDw0Wqv_NR_6rncQzT66mv9-_RByVwIBIFkRzIZa0b8dkLKvBx_S6fB9MykiquB71Zk2-bwZLJI%3D)

[**DONATE NOW**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69ab20f1372147cc9b06e93895ebae65&_e=PxdknqsjI9kS04kPuo_IvzqIdhrA-laz-QiHcIsmVKDdN0ZzAJQdFl-W7CQiU43Ic7tXKdT4XFMy5tfOj9LyMBDYYcRw5GN1YsT5LsnrpCpvSn2YAl8Ojre0DgNLzRw8Mjf6fIsTfFXUdrGJtv3XgG9RgWxuVmzJawTGeIhD_RgoHjGdIYu7t4veUQaU1QVBGuhp-GU17vzuszrcU5fEVVxm-n4oV6M4Xw2W6L1wQTScr163JjgrP6mWZUdiVb__62VU1mfxkfeU9cIIV8YbPcDI8lk38jKwWS5-y-Vb3YC3tGi_KEOQ-e-6GCvO-rYbkM5fir8-kOfwWM9bitc6Oyc6ucPp9rVIy7QiQvAOxqttVEC2NQcPrT6YGjcB3Tmvj8DUof-y1EHd49O0FwUa--zcOkQAKJaUa8dLfqe7ra0%3D)
I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last.

[**If you agree, I hope you’ll stand with me on the front lines as we start this journey.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69ab20f1372147cc9b06e93895ebae65&_e=PxdknqsjI9kS04kPuo_IvzqIdhrA-laz-QiHcIsmVKDdN0ZzAJQdFl-W7CQiU43Ic7tXKdT4XFMy5tfOj9LyMBDYYcRw5GN1YsT5LsnrpCpvSn2YAl8Ojre0DgNLzRw8Mjf6fIsTfFXUdrGJtv3XgG9RgWxuVmzJawTGeIhD_RgoHjGdIYu7t4veUQaU1QVBGuhp-GU17vzuszrcU5fEVVxm-n4oV6M4Xw2W6L1wQTScr163JjgrP6mWZUdiVb__x8nqnOpUHC0_QyXOxfArwBBh_OlI9ng4SK-ovZDa2ez9lT1mrCRkMFcYs8W53E-Y4swCwEf2fJsFofBU5DphUqtugz888lD8IRflxj8VFlCmdQaVOmwp3apf5mJ34eHt36y6X13mOm2NLvLE-JvRwer3gFLNwRWl6U2z8zeT8u0%3D)

Thanks,

clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Fellow Conservative, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. There’s a Special Primary for the Public Service Commission — the group that sets electricity and utility rates. In plain terms: **they help decide how much you pay every month.** While Georgia Republicans in the House are pushing cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security, Georgians are feeling the squeeze from rising costs on everyday goods. This vote is a chance to push back — and protect working families from being left behind. [We’ve got just days to reach voters to make sure they know what’s at stake. _\--- Begin Forwarded Message from Kevin Olasanoye ---_
Peter,
We’re now just two weeks out from Georgia’s upcoming election — and while it might not be grabbing national headlines, **the impact on everyday life here in the Peach State could be significant**.
On the ballot is a Special Primary Election for Georgia’s Public Service Commission. If you’re not familiar, this Commission plays a **BIG ROLE** in setting utility rates across the state — meaning the outcome of this race could directly affect how much Georgians pay for electricity and other essential services.
Right now, Georgia Republicans in Washington — including Buddy Carter — are moving forward with proposals that would cut core programs like Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security.
At the same time, Trump’s tariffs have led to rising prices for everyday goods, adding pressure to already tight household budgets.
With household costs rising, **this election is an important opportunity for Georgians to weigh in on who’s making decisions that impact their monthly bills**.
[We need to reach out to as many voters as possible in these final 2 weeks. Mike spent his career working to protect California's wilderness. He champions natural resource priorities by restoring wetlands, protecting the National Wildlife Refuge System, and expanding public access to our lands for outdoor enthusiasts.

As the top conservation supporter in Congress, we’re honored to welcome him for a discussion on charting a path forward for California's wild places in a congressional climate focused on dismantling protections for our environment and public lands.

This wonderful conversation will be accompanied by a catered dinner by a former chef at Chez Panisse. We’re excited to have you join us for good food and great conversation.

**_[All proceeds support CalWild's ongoing work to protect and defend the Golden State's wild public lands, so please grab your ticket today before they run out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108977126/549606880/-1174411064?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250602_IV_CalWild_0_NonLegacy_CalWild_NA_NA_Calwild1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTBkNjRlOC02YjQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XfrX7Co4-5fLAA28MPsHZFhs3S-VvnRIUGirUS5SgY8=&emci=7a0d64e8-6b41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=850d64e8-6b41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2678920)_**

We hope to see you there,

CalWild

subject: Dailywire Op-Ed: Trump’s Bold Move To Lower Drug Prices Puts Americans First, Not Big Pharma
body:
In essence, Americans have been subsidizing socialism abroad. No more.| | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2b47ae9442c248eb9fc82ce454de2c1d&_e=eH51epBqVkX-Xo8b5oziA6AM9jX6hojkjkOwxNceE1pVwvKihU3SFm77r9xPPMUL9zwn8J4ue7vfyDegef4oJh_O_V6Vltj_TRggRyOqlDuSbyQ_xJS0dIxuWyAQ6RGgUo-7nXXPvpWnAqebfJzFRKak4AkxvczxjKabJUgUbSmCUS67CNs98PcEMZbvUjDg42qpxggk1jI2Jr1IG7zE4A%3D%3D)

Trump’s Bold Move To Lower Drug Prices Puts Americans First, Not Big Pharma [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2b47ae9442c248eb9fc82ce454de2c1d&_e=eH51epBqVkX-Xo8b5oziA4Jh8RBzH92QvRlUfzsg_Y0zV2mluAO0jljVpbjmasmFuLKMd6WGpjLsBwkbWusrmFGNUH8AKT66d2Q0tEAmy-YYJBB0PpGqzABMCImyvUYV_miEgWrguwrwudlI5b7ETl5Yjh_ENUJyfpB_F88jvBVq7dp-77SEqMFniW7Qn0Z3dRuJrSO1aIBOG8koBpT5k94UGr2xWR22ClQ13zw6LB4%3D "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi")By Bobby Jindal and Jorge Martinez
---
_In essence, Americans have been subsidizing socialism abroad. No more._[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2b47ae9442c248eb9fc82ce454de2c1d&_e=eH51epBqVkX-Xo8b5oziA4Jh8RBzH92QvRlUfzsg_Y0zV2mluAO0jljVpbjmasmFuLKMd6WGpjLsBwkbWusrmLzZ1mFjnAt6PUoOxlVN0tTmCZKbqWxePhqxE5XLcGnx7z_UFXr5noE1niJqVNvq-KWCr70PZz0fg2kFz_jXzVpboS7imZyGgUUO8TIQuLzq2yrc6Etee-7JbV0Aau49fP77cEXL2N1FRtxGnlgGC5Y%3D "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi")
---
Americans have waited long enough, and now real relief from sky-high prescription drug prices is finally here. Recently, President Donald J. Trump signed a landmark Executive Order to end the decades-long injustice that has forced American families — especially Hispanic households — to pay more for lifesaving medications than almost anyone else in the world.
Hispanics, who are more likely to be uninsured or underinsured compared to other groups, are disproportionately burdened by high out-of-pocket prescription costs. In fact, according to the CDC, nearly one in four Hispanic adults report not taking prescribed medications due to cost, compared to just 13% of non-Hispanic White adults. This Executive Order directly addresses that disparity by demanding lower drug prices and making medications more affordable and accessible for millions of working families across the country.
This bold order reaffirms the President’s unwavering commitment to putting American patients first by stopping foreign free-riding, crushing the stranglehold of pharmaceutical middlemen, and bringing fairness back to a rigged system. **[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2b47ae9442c248eb9fc82ce454de2c1d&_e=eH51epBqVkX-Xo8b5oziA72BuAP-2vcBg-UjiwBDv0zHrhfwfZSzcxmSPkXBbw3m6crhARelBq75z-eNmAHGTqZUfAObETQUUL0o9uFyzGycI9eN1U0d0Y3f5mFrSPj0LlT4ZWlHEMqTmrrlKJ8a2tUJf-5rZ56ah2xEX3us_fN-4LOUvOWSPCBGOidmj9JPqyIKyaUiVL12dI18SixD6fJqhAwrxPpGbKckDVLRb7EEJWPniv_dwOKunJr-lI0LCwwT3aNrgJFUAkpPCPpwtMa8C37vzXyaz0EUJS28QreS39KLPX8U8rx7iDB8AJ2X)[Finish reading on Dailywire.com](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2b47ae9442c248eb9fc82ce454de2c1d&_e=eH51epBqVkX-Xo8b5oziA3oFxSgI2jCiXO3X0cJ2QmKqq3E_xsfEnv5D_QiSnxCvsb_7bmZX-YOOdToytkQbyqHfky0sc_sdOD6XMTiUCkum40-jcfrJAlYwEC6TIg_iGyCtBt7bVAt9g66r5tC_LcXtLCAUAhhs3-bOEaZVMeaCiIqCFLJ9M5gQZuLx2dQQUW1TRxEs2GQvQHWFtiXpLJcR58xPbzEwxtM50AhLq9mrUhpWL93vedGKHD9g4n5CwoaPhg5rEOjOgqXrnBqEcSPb4AZw91r7vy1mQ720q8bCSCJQVvKnIAumd30UvUpj)**

clean_body: In essence, Americans have been subsidizing socialism abroad. No more.| | | Trump’s Bold Move To Lower Drug Prices Puts Americans First, Not Big Pharma "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi"By Bobby Jindal and Jorge Martinez In essence, Americans have been subsidizing socialism abroad. No more. "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi" Americans have waited long enough, and now real relief from sky-high prescription drug prices is finally here. Recently, President Donald J. Trump signed a landmark Executive Order to end the decades-long injustice that has forced American families — especially Hispanic households — to pay more for lifesaving medications than almost anyone else in the world. Hispanics, who are more likely to be uninsured or underinsured compared to other groups, are disproportionately burdened by high out-of-pocket prescription costs. In fact, according to the CDC, nearly one in four Hispanic adults report not taking prescribed medications due to cost, compared to just 13% of non-Hispanic White adults. This Executive Order directly addresses that disparity by demanding lower drug prices and making medications more affordable and accessible for millions of working families across the country. This bold order reaffirms the President’s unwavering commitment to putting American patients first by stopping foreign free-riding, crushing the stranglehold of pharmaceutical middlemen, and bringing fairness back to a rigged system. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by AmericaNext

Dear Peter,

Last week, you heard from Dr. Paul Isaacson—an independent abortion provider and client of the Center for Reproductive Rights. For the past four years, I've had the privilege of working shoulder to shoulder with Dr. Isaacson, fighting in courtrooms to protect abortion access in Arizona. [**And I can say with certainty: without supporters like you, we would be in a very different situation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108977231/549607161/1126318745?sourceid=1150739&utm_campaign=25emige-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUzZDAwOS02YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDJi47UEZQID7SJ65FPONUtVoEM2_LTl_6kynGhRNbg=&emci=cf160b85-6141-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24e3d009-6c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

Our legal and state policy teams have worked with Dr. Isaacson through some of the most pivotal moments for reproductive rights in Arizona. [**Every step of the way, we've done this work at _no expense to our clients_... made possible by your donations.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108977232/549607162/1126318745?sourceid=1150739&utm_campaign=25emige-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUzZDAwOS02YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDJi47UEZQID7SJ65FPONUtVoEM2_LTl_6kynGhRNbg=&emci=cf160b85-6141-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24e3d009-6c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [**SUPPORT OUR WORK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108977233/549607163/1126318745?sourceid=1150739&utm_campaign=25emige-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUzZDAwOS02YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDJi47UEZQID7SJ65FPONUtVoEM2_LTl_6kynGhRNbg=&emci=cf160b85-6141-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24e3d009-6c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "SUPPORT OUR WORK")

Since 2009, we've partnered with Dr. Isaacson to:
* Strike down a harmful 20-week abortion ban, one of the earliest of its kind in the U.S..
* Challenge a Civil War era total abortion ban that went into effect after _Roe v. Wade_ fell—and won a crucial victory to keep it off the books.
* Fight to enforce a new, voter-approved constitutional amendment safeguarding abortion access.

These victories didn't just happen. [**They took years of litigation, coordination with providers like Dr. Isaacson, and tireless legal strategy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108977234/549607164/1126318745?sourceid=1150739&utm_campaign=25emige-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUzZDAwOS02YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDJi47UEZQID7SJ65FPONUtVoEM2_LTl_6kynGhRNbg=&emci=cf160b85-6141-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24e3d009-6c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) As Dr. Isaacson told us recently: "Without the Center, I wouldn't be able to provide the abortion care and health care I do."

We're still fighting. Just last month, we filed a lawsuit in Arizona seeking to strike down many remaining abortion restrictions to further expand access to care in the state.

[**And the truth is, we couldn't do what we do without you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108977235/549607165/1126318745?sourceid=1150739&utm_campaign=25emige-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUzZDAwOS02YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDJi47UEZQID7SJ65FPONUtVoEM2_LTl_6kynGhRNbg=&emci=cf160b85-6141-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24e3d009-6c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

Your support powers everything: the lawsuits, the emergency legal advice, the strategy to keep clinics open, and the vision for a future where every person can access the care they need.

[**You make our work possible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108977236/549607166/1126318745?sourceid=1150739&utm_campaign=25emige-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUzZDAwOS02YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDJi47UEZQID7SJ65FPONUtVoEM2_LTl_6kynGhRNbg=&emci=cf160b85-6141-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24e3d009-6c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) And because of that, independent abortion providers like Dr. Isaacson can continue to provide the compassionate care their communities deserve.

With gratitude,

Gail Deady
Senior Staff Attorney
Center for Reproductive Rights

P.S. Dr. Isaacson has faced relentless legal threats to his practice. Each time, he's turned to the Center and each time, we've been ready to act. [**That's only possible because of your continued support.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108977237/549607167/1126318745?sourceid=1150739&utm_campaign=25emige-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUzZDAwOS02YzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDJi47UEZQID7SJ65FPONUtVoEM2_LTl_6kynGhRNbg=&emci=cf160b85-6141-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=24e3d009-6c41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) Thank you.

clean_body: With your support 🙌 | | | ---|--- Dear Peter, Last week, you heard from Dr. Paul Isaacson—an independent abortion provider and client of the Center for Reproductive Rights. For the past four years, I've had the privilege of working shoulder to shoulder with Dr. Isaacson, fighting in courtrooms to protect abortion access in Arizona. Our legal and state policy teams have worked with Dr. Isaacson through some of the most pivotal moments for reproductive rights in Arizona. | "SUPPORT OUR WORK" Since 2009, we've partnered with Dr. Isaacson to: Strike down a harmful 20-week abortion ban, one of the earliest of its kind in the U.S.. Challenge a Civil War era total abortion ban that went into effect after Roe v. Wade fell—and won a crucial victory to keep it off the books. * Fight to enforce a new, voter-approved constitutional amendment safeguarding abortion access. These victories didn't just happen. As Dr. Isaacson told us recently: "Without the Center, I wouldn't be able to provide the abortion care and health care I do." We're still fighting. Just last month, we filed a lawsuit in Arizona seeking to strike down many remaining abortion restrictions to further expand access to care in the state. Your support powers everything: the lawsuits, the emergency legal advice, the strategy to keep clinics open, and the vision for a future where every person can access the care they need. And because of that, independent abortion providers like Dr. Isaacson can continue to provide the compassionate care their communities deserve. With gratitude, Gail Deady Senior Staff Attorney Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. Dr. Isaacson has faced relentless legal threats to his practice. Each time, he's turned to the Center and each time, we've been ready to act. Thank you. | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

If I’ve learned anything, it’s that winning the White House and Congress isn’t enough.

We’re building the Red Wall across America — a conservative ground game so strong, so organized, and so relentless that the radical left’s ballot-harvesting machines and billionaire-funded operatives won’t stand a chance.

**Will you be a part of this critical mission?** We need your help.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

**Good Afternoon!** We've got a quick note today from one of our sponsors, [Brad's Deals](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJysks-OnDwQxJ_G3DxqzJ8ZDhy-T6O5ba45Wo27AWttTGyzLHn6iNlVlD1GytVVKlf91N9f9AtaZ5fpG3ru8_sYNDFZg5lJL7wnxzlz1B16_BmWNVrPK8fXdIRtYaasFahGQiuh1mEcOSZdF9QPQF1ZcF9e6w5agLYt5h4GMM1tqIFqutWNUgbLceR2BDWY8dYWtj_ToIW6vEEJ1eVaVkPTcdmozhBDI2pgsjnES5458zum0R3hjePFBF-4fs55TaL6T6iHUI993y9DRErE6NJpEeoxuDAJ9ShBfkySz01y4IVHm5M8wiY9HnIJWb4uYZc4hC2L6rFlr1PYomFR3fPMnz9LyihUi34V1f-nxzPZzYvqTjatDo8vokG_op0WUd3_ssEHY3kC-p1otKVnUvfHI5of2gdCd9aMG38RZow0YeZPrYg9rbt1zqb2KmqYPFr3ZJn_2TG89epXAAAA__9JLNCh), about all those Amazon Prime perks you're probably not using (trust us, there are more than you think). -- Cole, _CEO_

Whether you're already a Prime member or considering signing up, [here are 9 Prime member benefits you should be using!](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyskc2O3CAQhJ8G3xhh_DPrgw-RRr5trjmihm5stGAcwOt1nj7y7LxApBwpWlVdX_96V-_gvFvnnxBoLF82KiR0BgqhWunInkqhpAYI8CeuW3KBNkof-Yz7SoRFSSE7LnouWhWtpZRVW-GoBQ51RWN9bwfRC9H31TIOVtbDm22FrFuDRls0Vndkkay-N11fufFyE71o6zdRi-Z2rxvdDVR3cjBIomOtIHQlpltZqNAXZOvP-EnpZmKo_LiUsmXW_GByYnI6juOmE2BGAp-vESYn7ePM5FQL_l2JPztxTStZVzI_484DnHyNhX-s8eCg415YM-0lqBz3ZIg1j7LQK5ljASb76zcQuj2w5oEubx7Ol2wgbODmlTWPf0z95sovKEz2Rjl8egzPJ5jfKkQEf62TdnpJCyScodBLrdKI2-G8d7m_s1bMAZx_0ir_7dyfo_wbAAD__3nmyA4) Once upon a time we had to make lists with paper and pen and physically go to stores when we needed things. Sometimes we'd have to go to several stores or even shopping malls for what we needed. Then one day, out of the heavens, came Amazon. For many of us, [the free shipping perk](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyskc2O3CAQhJ8G3xhh_DPrgw-RRr5trjmihm5stGAcwOt1nj7y7LxApBwpWlVdX_96V-_gvFvnnxBoLF82KiR0BgqhWunInkqhpAYI8CeuW3KBNkof-Yz7SoRFSSE7LnouWhWtpZRVW-GoBQ51RWN9bwfRC9H31TIOVtbDm22FrFuDRls0Vndkkay-N11fufFyE71o6zdRi-Z2rxvdDVR3cjBIomOtIHQlpltZqNAXZOvP-EnpZmKo_LiUsmXW_GByYnI6juOmE2BGAp-vESYn7ePM5FQL_l2JPztxTStZVzI_484DnHyNhX-s8eCg415YM-0lqBz3ZIg1j7LQK5ljASb76zcQuj2w5oEubx7Ol2wgbODmlTWPf0z95sovKEz2Rjl8egzPJ5jfKkQEf62TdnpJCyScodBLrdKI2-G8d7m_s1bMAZx_0ir_7dyfo_wbAAD__3nmyA4) and access to exclusive shows and movies is enough reason to fork over the $14.99 per month to get Prime. But if those reasons haven't been enough to entice you to join Prime, [maybe some lesser-known incentives](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyskc2O3CAQhJ8G3xhh_DPrgw-RRr5trjmihm5stGAcwOt1nj7y7LxApBwpWlVdX_96V-_gvFvnnxBoLF82KiR0BgqhWunInkqhpAYI8CeuW3KBNkof-Yz7SoRFSSE7LnouWhWtpZRVW-GoBQ51RWN9bwfRC9H31TIOVtbDm22FrFuDRls0Vndkkay-N11fufFyE71o6zdRi-Z2rxvdDVR3cjBIomOtIHQlpltZqNAXZOvP-EnpZmKo_LiUsmXW_GByYnI6juOmE2BGAp-vESYn7ePM5FQL_l2JPztxTStZVzI_484DnHyNhX-s8eCg415YM-0lqBz3ZIg1j7LQK5ljASb76zcQuj2w5oEubx7Ol2wgbODmlTWPf0z95sovKEz2Rjl8egzPJ5jfKkQEf62TdnpJCyScodBLrdKI2-G8d7m_s1bMAZx_0ir_7dyfo_wbAAD__3nmyA4) like free music/podcasts, access to lightning deals, and Whole Foods discounts will tempt you to sign up. clean_body: | | | | | | Wednesday, June 4, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! We've got a quick note today from one of our sponsors, , about all those Amazon Prime perks you're probably not using (trust us, there are more than you think). -- Cole, CEO * Are you taking advantage of your Amazon Prime perks? Whether you're already a Prime member or considering signing up, Once upon a time we had to make lists with paper and pen and physically go to stores when we needed things. Sometimes we'd have to go to several stores or even shopping malls for what we needed. Then one day, out of the heavens, came Amazon. For many of us, and access to exclusive shows and movies is enough reason to fork over the $14.99 per month to get Prime. But if those reasons haven't been enough to entice you to join Prime, like free music/podcasts, access to lightning deals, and Whole Foods discounts will tempt you to sign up. Make sure you're not missing out, and get the most out of your Prime membership with | | The Texas Flyover 448 W 19th St. Suite #356 Houston, TX 77008 | ---|---

name: Jason Miyares
subject: JUST IN: Arlington’s sanctuary city policy is already backfiring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Do sanctuary cities belong in Virginia?| | | Friend, I recently warned you about the far-Left Arlington County Board choosing to REFUSE to cooperate with ICE — _**even for violent criminals and terrorists.**_
**Now, their criminal-first, victim-last policy is already backfiring.**
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/bhbnrfmfmO2YiLMIITxtElvN5f-cnLxwWHf5KvCvHXq7zvMsoDHGCTX5CHY-CInhDo-m6bg_2tOLl40YERzoFyvvglu94yLs5VAC3OO7VLmwNGP-j-9Rd-yEnNdjPTjgxm4cU5jpRbnFhfl1oOfXNmEw4-5fMAGrqBG_Ro-m6mhags9Rpgjv0H76T6HAAm51HxSAHp06igVLiKZOS8HKDQK4_DX5J5eVeWvvXia_Y1q09rTxCFEqYy9mfOw29kLXMzUssHhTH8q3DAnW0kd2_YRjuhNP-2cMMXfZCxUW0znmJyZP5MwMMjWa1lMGMzNHHQl39HROhJyM8qITgqWiPnFKWIfFVKe4R3RvsXHdhjqBMNOEMhSBChnluDE/bvhsRZ2_O3rhMMnj2ys6tsNZhsvj_4cI/9)
---
As a result of this reckless policy change, [_**Arlington County Police are being forced to DISBAND their Gang Unit.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/B9crV9E0OjITPoLLR2zTiY8JrDYoVUBpqXycrWwpFXjTkuN4SoGOFd1WteJ9nMDg33NhnUuRkkAOwkkRQ6n7GIdTpfbTVHkidnhExWvXJs-m1Mkfrxrgfv1yjzwZ10NgGcX3uDiA_3x4gdIxwDOosMx19ybgG9uJQcpN03KUw5mwNzofocwmPDxSrOZckxEpSDGEcrAs82hjKKrETBlNf3yaFrBA47_wqRTebjHHlhYjorM0I6n_ZW2tCuj0oNhDBXFzeoUYbXPePpUC5gmM89zliYDYWGxKG-OKwcuOsVCFEULbAKjMsPupXJWlP61dL9P168V-dhU_jADGSJ1ldV6Y27y3Ice74mEZ9U6A4XZiTez54CwhL7YvBEQ/OPs8S0iPu0Zpx102v-kN9MVmPemdVbR0/9)
_Even worse,_ the brave men and women of the Arlington PD Gang Unit have been reassigned to focus on property crime — _not getting violent offenders off of our streets._
---
[ **STAND FOR A SAFE VIRGINIA** ](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/OjodTD2eCuldkg0TTOHx2kexnAZBIJdH-AmjsoEPzOsvuEvLboi2Jc7C9Q5cEkNTC9JM0OhRzf53QvfwcqBaX6NefB-Xy1dvPZ7eU76se_b-RPQnaALKZYvO4Vn1_aXn3q0FErl5Hb6MIDhE1qjLo0Pq_HPpLQ7lx5GPcakc0m4FqE8_6VtpSe1J4x69miFd82DjZS6N4d4FiQ1gzWq3y68WV-I2SAEbU6kMwMyxCQQ0_K13DKVrzHlPjiSK2Djc7HuJLvrevbXAeJ-Phk9SfF8hveZ2W9f2e-CLvxdUcr77j8GZne-f35Kjsxu1QSo3Nogvw72sEUzlRMm6ihBJGlGvq93zBNCEupX62rB-yAOnzDJOgtl1hp5VJdo/iT2xDT94ocab8K_UgK86seBngxjlTnA8/9)
---
Since most criminal activity referred to ICE involves gangs, Arlington is choosing to cut ties with immigration authorities, _effectively turning its back on fighting gang violence._
As Virginia’s top law enforcement officer, I won’t stand for this — **my office is working nonstop to keep Virginia safe, even if politicians refuse to do so.**

But I can’t do it alone, friend. If you believe sanctuary cities have no place in Virginia, [_**stand with us to put an end to this nonsense.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/7_kppaWYcfKYGzAMZQR11EQIRokYXAzzc5duXYmyH8Q2NlzztffPYp5uYcRuwh8W4vtBc4OI4voEjJfIpKu602NRIUzcHs5-OgZpAC8f9GkNoqoTiJBqeRvJPNwtaF4evuIbECkbx-fvZNpgaKuU4UhQ3gYAYKVUlMOSSo4xcu66vLzo-vI87fKuwM_weXzHff-4Rcw8VLB09II3Z_iA6GnjLUAQGB7hDxIwNe8S5IMrqg0y_quIv6rc16X6rgBAhbaQfIWOUvrMrjoHst0c_k3RBUp-QtnAMVGIn4aiemAkgdEe5N-QCEm55sv8I6KhHNN8MULFvVWfMiJJzn4tsyGwBtM8SeoSlQsVA7IxFOBX_23NptReheJqWbc/NTDlWWm1S9IHc88b2JJwoAs9der36dJT/9)
---
Let's bring common sense _back_ to the Commonwealth,Attorney General Jason Miyares

Peter, the North Carolina Supreme Court recently released a bombshell decision, and spoiler alert: it’s not good.

They ruled in favor of the Republican-backed law that strips power away from our governor, even after a lower court found the ruling **“unconstitutional beyond a reasonable doubt.”**

For 125 years, the governor of North Carolina has had appointment power over the board of elections. Now, in a blatant power-grab, they’re going back on this precedent and going further to say that the legislature can strip away any of the governor’s powers.

It’s clear that North Carolina Republicans will stop at nothing to erase our victories last November.

We can’t let them get away with this. [Join Valerie in standing up for our democracy by adding your name now → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108978304/549611153/-99608688?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_060425_NCSC_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGYzOTkyNS02ZTQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-jnvl5odLjm0niqu7rHlNAB04-k7noS1LdXPCPbfvg=&emci=75f39925-6e41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7df39925-6e41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=799895) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108978305/549611154/-99608688?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_060425_NCSC_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGYzOTkyNS02ZTQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-jnvl5odLjm0niqu7rHlNAB04-k7noS1LdXPCPbfvg=&emci=75f39925-6e41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7df39925-6e41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=799895)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, the North Carolina Supreme Court recently released a bombshell decision, and spoiler alert: it’s not good. They ruled in favor of the Republican-backed law that strips power away from our governor, even after a lower court found the ruling “unconstitutional beyond a reasonable doubt.” For 125 years, the governor of North Carolina has had appointment power over the board of elections. Now, in a blatant power-grab, they’re going back on this precedent and going further to say that the legislature can strip away any of the governor’s powers. It’s clear that North Carolina Republicans will stop at nothing to erase our victories last November. We can’t let them get away with this. | Thank you for standing with us in this fight. – Team Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

Dear Peter,
---
We are witnessing a war on families—and it’s on full display in Colorado. On Sunday, we’re holding a rally for _FAMILIES_ on the Colorado State Capitol steps! Once again, God’s perfect design for humanity is being undermined and eroded by politicians and activists, hell-bent on sowing chaos and spreading confusion. In the Colorado Legislature, HB25-1312 was signed into law and allows the courts to strip parents of their rights. It’s evil and wrong, but it’s what we are up against. Join us in standing for Biblical families and _AGAINST_ overreaching, activist judges!
---

clean_body: Stand Strong, Stand Tall Stand For Our Families and Our Jewish Brothers & Sisters| | | | | Dear Peter, We are witnessing a war on families—and it’s on full display in Colorado. On Sunday, we’re holding a rally for FAMILIES on the Colorado State Capitol steps! Once again, God’s perfect design for humanity is being undermined and eroded by politicians and activists, hell-bent on sowing chaos and spreading confusion. In the Colorado Legislature, HB25-1312 was signed into law and allows the courts to strip parents of their rights. It’s evil and wrong, but it’s what we are up against. Join us in standing for Biblical families and AGAINST overreaching, activist judges! | | | | As a reminder, On Friday at 7 PM, we’re worshiping on the rooftop of Fearless Church (1611 S Hope St., Los Angeles, CA 90015). Join us in prayer—or in person! Till all hear, Sean | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

Here's what we know so far about Trump's fundraising machine and how he's raising so much, so quickly:
* He's personally calling major donors and mobilizing deep-pocketed allies.
* His Super PACs — _MAGA Inc._ and _Securing American Greatness_ — are flush with cash and already spending in key races.
* Despite claiming to "step back" from politics, Elon Musk's support and ties to PACs like _Building America's Future_ remain questionable.
* The Trump administration is blurring the lines between campaign and government business — setting a dangerous precedent for campaign finance and undermining legal and democratic norms.

His goal? **Flood the field with loyalists, crush his opposition, and silence dissent — even within his own party.**

But here's what I've seen cycle after cycle at EMILYs List: Every time the GOP flexes its power, our community shows up stronger.

Because of your support, Democratic pro-choice women have:
* Flipped red seats
* Held the line on abortion access
* Defied political odds time and time again to take back power

With your help, we can do it again. We'll recruit more game-changing candidates. Put more vulnerable House Republicans "On Notice." Send even more experienced staff to the states that need them most. And win BIG against Republicans, up and down the ballot, from coast to coast.

**While Trump's GOP hoards of billionaire cash, our candidates rely on grassroots donors like you. **

clean_body: Trump's PACs are hoarding cash. Our candidates are counting on you. | = Peter, We recently learned that Donald Trump has built a staggering $600 million "war chest" — and he's aiming to hit $1 billion before the 2026 elections. That's an unprecedented amount of money. And it's being funneled into unseating Democrats, electing anti-choice extremists, and punishing Republicans who dare to defy Trump. (Trump may even be hoarding money for himself — he recently started selling merch implying he will defy the Constitution and run again in 2028!) **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Here's what we know so far about Trump's fundraising machine and how he's raising so much, so quickly: He's personally calling major donors and mobilizing deep-pocketed allies. His Super PACs — MAGA Inc. and Securing American Greatness — are flush with cash and already spending in key races. Despite claiming to "step back" from politics, Elon Musk's support and ties to PACs like Building America's Future remain questionable. The Trump administration is blurring the lines between campaign and government business — setting a dangerous precedent for campaign finance and undermining legal and democratic norms. His goal? Flood the field with loyalists, crush his opposition, and silence dissent — even within his own party. But here's what I've seen cycle after cycle at EMILYs List: Every time the GOP flexes its power, our community shows up stronger. Because of your support, Democratic pro-choice women have: Flipped red seats Held the line on abortion access Defied political odds time and time again to take back power With your help, we can do it again. We'll recruit more game-changing candidates. Put more vulnerable House Republicans "On Notice." Send even more experienced staff to the states that need them most. And win BIG against Republicans, up and down the ballot, from coast to coast. While Trump's GOP hoards of billionaire cash, our candidates rely on grassroots donors like you. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Callie Fines (she/her/hers) Chief Financial Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108979658/549615750/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250604_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mzc1MmFlOC02ZjQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVgqgkEzh-yCk3sV8CIbn7mhzCyhmBFw0p0XO56g6bQ=)
Earlier this year, Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor issued a warning about the dangers of misinformation: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108979659/549615751/2034376778?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250604_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mzc1MmFlOC02ZjQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVgqgkEzh-yCk3sV8CIbn7mhzCyhmBFw0p0XO56g6bQ=) | [FLIP THE SENATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108979660/549615752/2034376778?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250604_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mzc1MmFlOC02ZjQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVgqgkEzh-yCk3sV8CIbn7mhzCyhmBFw0p0XO56g6bQ=)
---
And now, with the GOP lying about the callous budget they are trying to pass — it’s crucial that we heed her warning.
Republicans want the American people to think their budget will boost our economy. The truth is, their extreme cuts to Medicaid and SNAP benefits will put _millions_ of Americans at risk — all while giving the ultra-rich a hefty tax cut.
**We can’t let them get away with this, but it’s going to take all of us to hold Trump and the GOP accountable for their cruel budget and their lies.**
**[Will you be part of our mission to put a stop to the GOP’s lies and Flip the Senate next year? The truth is, their extreme cuts to Medicaid and SNAP benefits will put millions of Americans at risk — all while giving the ultra-rich a hefty tax cut. States has agreed to hear its appeal of the decision of the U.S. Court
of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in a case filed on behalf of
Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, challenging an
Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date
established by federal law.

States has agreed to hear its appeal of the decision of the U.S.
Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in a case filed on behalf of
Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, challenging an
Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date
established by federal law (Rep.Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini,
and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and
Bernadette Matthews (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)).

clean_body: | | | ****Imagine Donald Trump reading this headline after November’s Virginia elections: “VA Rebukes Trump as Democrats Expand Majority” Think of Donald Trump’s worst nightmare: Voters REJECTING his extreme MAGA agenda Big MAGA losses in November’s 2025 VA elections Huge Democratic momentum going into the 2026 midterms Friend, we can make it happen. I’m Elizabeth Guzman, a mom, social worker, union leader, and proud Latina immigrant running to flip Virginia’s 22nd House District - a DLCC Spotlight district outside of Washington, DC that Donald Trump lost. We’re facing a special pre-primary fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow. My MAGA opponent stands with Trump as he attacks our Constitution, lays off thousands of my federal worker neighbors, and attempts to throw working families off of their healthcare. We've outraised him before - and he's working hard to catch up. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: JB Smiley Jr.
subject: Such a time as this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the JB Smiley Jr
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92850/images/DSC_4118.JPEG]
Greetings Team Smiley,
As Councilman Smiley takes some much-needed time to grieve and be with his family, I ask that you continue to keep him in your thoughts and prayers.
In moments like this, family comes first, but the work doesn’t stop. That’s why it matters to have a strong, committed team — people who can carry the load and keep things moving when life gets in the way.
As the campaign manager, I’ll be stepping in to handle and coordinate things on his behalf. So if you hear from me, don’t be surprised, we’re still pushing forward with the same passion and purpose to DO SOMETHING...TOGETHER! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5n7VjD86NUabhEiyes51QQ2?am=20&contactdata=fKXk4lp9zpZ8ekWlv4WxBz+b57oOyhGuGWurqAiQ77+cKOYz7hedrzYIRO+qwow7+GHkjJPOMEE1xJ127A0K1Py/QrU6v+n5gL4PQxm69Ug=]
Let’s show JB the strength of his community by standing with him and keeping the momentum going.
Lynn Whitney, Campaign Manager & Friend
JB Smiley Jr for Shelby County Mayor
#TeamSmiley #ForwardTogether #ShelbyCounty #WeGotYouJB #DoSomething #jbsmileyjr

United States

_Previous Message from Team Marie:_

Peter, tomorrow is a big day: it’s Marie’s birthday!

Marie works hard in Congress every day to deliver results for Southwest Washington. Since day one, she has remained committed to lowering costs for working families, defending democracy, protecting reproductive rights, and keeping our communities safe.

name: Mike Carey
subject: This is my commitment to you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carey for Congress
body:
Fellow Conservative, your inbox is probably flooded with requests, but I’m reaching out for a different reason—to re-introduce myself and share my commitment to you. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

Your inbox is probably flooded with requests, but I'm reaching out for a different reason -- to re-introduce myself and share my commitment to you.

Hi, I'm Mike. I was born and raised on my family's farm in a small town called Sabina, Ohio. After earning an ROTC scholarship to attend the Marion Military Institute, I served as an officer in the military while earning a bachelor's degree from the Ohio State University. The values that guided me then continue to guide me in Congress today: hard work, community, and freedom.

As a professional, I became an executive for one of the nation's largest privately owned energy companies, headquartered in Ohio. For more than twenty years, I fought in the private sector to protect American jobs by opposing the same failed energy policies being pushed today by the Democrats.

Today, I'm using my experience to fight back against the radicals in Congress and help President Trump pass his America First Agenda. Fellow Conservative, I'm committed to making Ohio a better place to live, work, and raise a family.

Thank you for your unwavering support of our team! As we gear up for the upcoming election, I'm counting on you to stay in the fight with us. The Left is already targeting my seat, and they're prepared to pull out all the stops to flip it. That's why I'm mobilizing early for what promises to be a tough race. Fellow Conservative, your support means the world to me.

[**Will you stand by my side in this critical election? Your commitment makes a bigger impact than you know. Please, take a moment to sign your name below to show you're with me.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dce37fb0b7604988a7fd66ea2d354bb8&_e=1-PdHKQl3O6jcEqI5-2gEW-6fVUD94atB912rBUR-F_urkYXEVW5Hv16XJnkonEgMufpxfpJyjjYO2wLfTRhX-O5kEDw55SRrY4WMA-YIAcvLgIln2egte7HWovt8r0_n9gFY9-T--3VIOokD4FCSAjWVAiSNoRODY4ad1fCeYOg6nO_bmhXl6x9VMM9p0VytlIoS2o6JpO5rbSEGdfNylNGKOm9w7Tn10FQ3ud4JZFbCmE_blIS9h1oNO2PgPrjSwCDNm7qdUhoQsFmWdHBV4o3E0jFwOPyH8NiHtyfsycpWONOYsUggxNi_v1R8dx0GVnKmsRPeAyGrU9xnHAuc7Ou2Ud_2woSxLPdpsRusOC3SYMBVI1lwo3p-sxAQBdOpVDzdtTRa6fQPI9BBSPpzA%3D%3D)

It’s very rare that I get to deliver good news myself – I am pretty busy these days – but this was something I had to take the time and do personally.

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: 2025 Autism Health Walk: Every Step For Autism, Every Mile A Miracle!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **2025 Autism Health Walk: Every Step For Autism, Every Mile A Miracle!**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=36c581b8ad&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| Join us for a day of **movement, music, and miracles** as we come together to support families impacted by autism! Whether you're walking **in person** at Huntington Beach Central Park or **virtually** from your own community, your steps matter. Walk as an individual, create a team, join an existing team, or just simply sponsor a walker. Rally your friends and family to support the cause from anywhere in the world! [Click HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=f784206015&e=3a42edfdc4) to Register! **Date:** Saturday, September 6, 2025
**Location:** Huntington Beach Central Park West
18381 Goldenwest St, Huntington Beach, CA 92648
[_(See our website for parking and map)_](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=3aa7ef6c13&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| [REGISTER NOW](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1d34b2a292&e=3a42edfdc4 "REGISTER NOW")
---
|
---
|
### **Event Schedule**
* **8:00 AM** – Registration Opens (Pick up your t-shirt)
* **9:30 AM** – Dance Warm-Up
* **9:55 AM** – National Anthem & Prayer
* **10:00 AM** – Walk Begins
* **1:00 PM** – Awards Ceremony & Sponsor Remarks
* **1:30 PM** – Group Dancing
* **4:00 PM** – Resource Fair Closes

---
|
---
|
### **Registration Options**
* **In-Person Walk** at Huntington Beach Central Park West
* **Virtual Walk** from any location worldwide
* [**Sponsor a Walker** or **Create/Join a Fundraising Team**](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=52b6002fce&e=3a42edfdc4)

---
|
---
|
### **Fundraising Incentives**
* Raise **$100 or more** → Get a **FREE walk t-shirt** (Must enter t-shirt size)
* **Top Fundraising Team** → **VIP Tickets** to the 2026 Autism Health Summit (Max 10 tickets)
* **Second Place Team** → **General Admission Tickets** to the 2026 Autism Health Summit (Max 10 tickets)
* **Top 3 Fundraising Individuals** → **Receive a signed custom baseball bat by General Michael Flynn or Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. **

---
|
---
|
### **Why Your Support Matters**
Every dollar raised helps Autism Health Inc.:
* Provide **educational scholarships** for parents of children with autism
* Fund **cutting-edge autism research and therapies**
* Offer **free monthly webinars and family resources**
* Host the **Autism Health Summit** , connecting families with life-changing experts and solutions

This walk isn’t just about raising funds, it’s about **raising voices** , building community, and making every step count for families navigating autism.
---
|
---
|
### **Vendor & Sponsorship Opportunities Available!**
Sponsorship opportunities are now available for the 2025 Autism Health Walk, taking place on Saturday, September 6 at Huntington Beach Central Park. This high-impact community event will bring together families, advocates, and supporters to raise funds for Autism Health Inc., a nonprofit organization dedicated to empowering families through education, advocacy, and integrative health resources. Sponsors will receive valuable visibility, recognition, and the chance to align with a mission-driven cause that directly benefits individuals impacted by autism. To learn more or view our sponsorship packages, Email [info@autismhealth.com](mailto:info@autismhealth.com) or register below.
---
| [BECOME A SPONSOR](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=f3a424a423&e=3a42edfdc4 "BECOME A SPONSOR")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [Donate Now](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=9278953950&e=3a42edfdc4 "Donate Now")

San Diego, CA**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My personal request:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Can you support my work with a monthly, recurring contribution?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4742%2E35263%2Egft_1x)
Peter — Thank you for supporting my fight. From lowering the cost of life-saving prescriptions, to securing marriage equality, to addressing the issues that matter most to Wisconsinites — I’m 100% committed to this work. Even as Donald Trump and his administration launch attack after attack, I’m not letting up. There’s too much at stake. Crucial programs like Medicaid are on the line. Trump’s trade war has left Wisconsin dairy farmers in the dark. DOGE’s federal layoffs have made it harder for veterans in Milwaukee to access the benefits they’ve _earned_. **Trump’s policies are actively hurting Wisconsin families, farmers, and veterans, and I’ve called him out every step of the way.** I’ve pushed back on Trump’s illegal efforts to dismantle the Minority Business Development Agency, called out cuts to job training programs that help Wisconsinites start their careers, and met with families affected by Medicaid cuts during my “Hands Off Medicaid” Tour. Through it all, you’ve stood by my side, and I cannot thank you enough. This team has matched my commitment to fighting for a fairer future for all, so I’m making a personal request today: **[If you’re able, please commit to a monthly contribution of $3 or more today. Sustained grassroots support fuels everything we do — from flipping the House to holding Trump accountable — and your monthly contribution will make a real difference.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=stb-em-jun25.arTiDH&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250604_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4742%2E35263%2Egft_1x)** _Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | [DONATE $3 MONTHLY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4594?c0=stb-em-jun25.oiOWoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250604_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4742%2E35263%2Egft_1x)

name: John King
subject: We barely hit our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc

Thanks to conservatives like you, we ended May by reaching our fundraising goal. Last-minute support on the 30th and 31st got us over the finish line. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5c8fe52f318948128a0cf0b881b7b51f&_e=5uqHBhdEZleywUcYiwvRtsvFIlq-4VW4eZHo-HbitKQPd_kWJlWqPD1u1T0zTi0qqoEGEJztGvgclXOx9O_DNN9sYmiK-xh0JmX7n5qSncwJ39kwNE0tOhASrPdEB_krNM-XW1NX1q35FKIz14a2tMXTrZpTtmmEl9HwkCJFVWgFOtNToj3tDW2lAiKWcVm1ibWNrlFLR_-oigGpzsRc2H0lWyFI5XJh1ZRStsSSjOI2drgqc01z_Vn0U6RkKDrTvxH4Fega1gf9KdDi4nXCDKXNDXv5Y2qZ_kdP2RXhcU_vBUWnHzIPuwvu30IossxPhjb5Yf4tYVsRctH-Q61TvRpymsEhH7AcVfeWyu5VK_0U9dIhB5xdAXRd4IgmXQ4155sfQoHV4riRkEEsQ6gMBw%3D%3D)

Peter, here’s some good news:

Thanks to conservatives like you, we ended May by reaching our fundraising goal. Last-minute support on the 30th and 31st got us over the finish line.

_But here’s the catch:_

_**Jon Ossoff has at least _$11 MILLION_ in the bank.**_ We have a lot of ground to (still) make up if we’re going to have the resources to compete and win.

I don’t have to tell you what’s at stake. This is the #1 Senate race in the country, and Democrats, elites, and liberal megadonors are going to do everything they can to keep Georgia’s Senate seat blue.

_**The attacks are already coming, with more on the way.**_

[**That’s why we must stay on offense, and that’s why my team is launching a 48-hour fundraising drive to raise another $25,000.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5c8fe52f318948128a0cf0b881b7b51f&_e=5uqHBhdEZleywUcYiwvRtsvFIlq-4VW4eZHo-HbitKQPd_kWJlWqPD1u1T0zTi0qqoEGEJztGvgclXOx9O_DNN9sYmiK-xh0JmX7n5qSncwJ39kwNE0tOhASrPdEB_krNM-XW1NX1q35FKIz14a2tMXTrZpTtmmEl9HwkCJFVWgFOtNToj3tDW2lAiKWcVm1ibWNrlFLR_-oigGpzsRc2H0lWyFI5XJh1ZRStsSSjOI2drgqc01z_Vn0U6RkKDrTWEhcRUKedUHV6Ku9J4KuBnZFH-D55DVPSb7kc5lzKZ2F9FEJChMz71NvdmZZWI08aWO2D0d2gcnCZSiAsTscrDXObPw2-drKuUsspwy9o6rIJXBoIizsnh-Wf6uThiUl2kBuLiqvWrwdFYGXGl2AoQ%3D%3D)

body:
June is different for campaigns like ours. Let us explain.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1659%2E791427%2EbqhKZ-)

Friend — June is different for campaigns like ours. Let us explain.
At the end of the month we are **legally required** to report our fundraising totals for the entire quarter to the FEC.
After we file that report it gets published online for all to see. That means everyone who’s watching this campaign — from AIPAC to Elon Musk to the media — will be waiting to see not just how much we raised but how many people chipped in.
Will our FEC report show a groundswell of grassroots support? Will it prove that our campaign will be hard to beat after Ilhan officially announced she’s running for reelection?
Or will our report show to everyone that wants to take Ilhan down that our campaign is vulnerable? That we don’t have the funds to go up against millions in AIPAC spending?
The answer to these questions depends on you, and everyone else on Team Ilhan.
That’s why we are asking you today: Make a contribution towards Ilhan’s FEC deadline at the end of the month.
We’ve always relied on grassroots, small-dollar donors to hit our fundraising goals, and this FEC period can’t be any different. There’s no billionaires waiting to swoop in and save the day with a huge check. _We need you!_
**[Please, use this link or the buttons below to chip in to Ilhan’s campaign today. It’s really important that we beat expectations and come out of this FEC deadline with a formidable movement that will be impossible to beat.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250604-1-150&t=2&akid=1659%2E791427%2EbqhKZ-)

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12928355?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
|
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

Over the last few weeks, my fellow legislators and I have been back in our respective districts, waiting for the House and Senate to reach an agreement on the state budget. A deal has finally been hammered out, and the budget conference has been scheduled for this week. I’m proud to have been added to serve on the House Justice / Senate Criminal and Civil Justice Committee.

During this time back in the community, I have been attending events and spending time with my beautiful wife as we celebrated 31 years of marriage. This time at home has been meaningful, but I’m looking forward to being back in Tallahassee to finish our work for the Free State of Florida.

I had the honor of carrying several important bills this legislative session! It was a pleasure to work alongside fellow House members and lawmakers in the Senate to get this legislation across the finish line. One of my bills was just recently signed into law by Governor DeSantis!
---
| | **HB 113 Signed into Law by Governor DeSantis!**
---
|
---
| My bill, [HB 113 - Fleeing or Attempting to Elude a Law Enforcement Officer](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c0c0a2c597&e=d1c1b9864f), was signed into law by **Governor Ron DeSantis**! I’m so grateful to **Lt. Paul Bloom** and the **Marion County Sheriff’s Office** for bringing this bill proposal to me.
---
| | **Events Back in the District**
---
|
---
| **Horse Farms Forever** hosted the **Spring Speakers Series** , and I was excited to be able to attend this great event. It was wonderful to hear about the future of farm perseverance from **Florida Commissioner of Agriculture Wilton Simpson**.
---
|
---
---
| My wife, Jenny, and I attended the **Kids Central Halo Awards**. What a privilege it was! This special event celebrated the amazing dedication and role that our foster parents play in the lives of the children in the system.
---
|
---
---
| I had the honor of attending the **College of Central Florida’s Spring Graduation Ceremony**. As a proud alumnus, it’s always inspiring to return and celebrate the achievements of both new graduates and distinguished members of our community.

One of the highlights of the day was seeing former **Senator Dennis Baxley** honored with both the Alumni Award and the Service Award. His decades of dedication to **Marion County** and the state of Florida have left a lasting impact, and these recognitions speak volumes about his commitment to service and education. Congratulations to the **Spring Class of 2025**. Your journey is just beginning! Also, a heartfelt congratulations to Senator Baxley on this well-deserved honor.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| Congratulations to all of our high school seniors that are officially a part of the Class of 2025! I had the pleasure of attending **Belleview High School** ’s graduation ceremony and to shake hands with hundreds of future leaders. I wish all the graduates the best in their next steps of life!
---
|
---
| Ever since my election, I have been proposing legislation and speaking on ending the most hated tax in the country, the property tax. I had the pleasure of speaking to the **Republican Party of Florida State Executive Committee** on this issue.

Under the current system of property taxation, no one ever owns their own property. They just lease it from government. Think about it. If you can’t pay the property taxes on your home, family farm, or small business warehouse, your property will be seized by the state and given to someone else. This isn’t a tax. It’s slavery. Property taxes are also collected on unrealized gains. These taxes aren’t collected on the actual value of a property when it is sold but on what some local government bureaucrat thinks it might be worth if you sold it right now. It’s time that we stop this nonsense!
---
|
---
---
| The **Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission** had a meeting to hear public input on issues such as black bears in residential areas. They are considering opening a black bear hunting season.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| My staff attended the groundbreaking for **Transition Life Center** ’s new building expansion. This expansion is a much-needed addition that will allow them to double the number of intake members!
---
|
---
| | Thank you for your continued support of my leadership in the state legislature! I look forward to keeping you updated on our work.

Have a great week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Our national parks are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Our national parks are part of who we are — and they’re under serious threat.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108981410/549622069/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE2MmE5MS03NTQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACrqApLG96Qbi6Sod5i8PjPzJO3B5x0Zpe-qlA6inM4=&emci=fef8b02c-6741-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ec162a91-7541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)

| | Oregonians know the awe and peace that come from standing in a forest older than our country, walking along a rugged coastline, or peering into the deep, still waters of a lake in a volcanic caldera**. Our national parks are part of who we are — and they're under serious threat.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108981411/549622072/-420974575?contactdata=RJD8ZIuNVzqxa7ypAyw7aECHlBaYzmD79Zz2yY8Hfn3w6+1xZjlcNSHOdqU1/ePtcMKrAK7c287uS/rI65mHkDFaxhILhcCnS13pP/gmc9wgMAhjNQ+7OgHbW6g2gik7KDjdTOmB3x4vGHDLPgNg8w==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE2MmE5MS03NTQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACrqApLG96Qbi6Sod5i8PjPzJO3B5x0Zpe-qlA6inM4=&emci=fef8b02c-6741-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ec162a91-7541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)** The Trump administration's proposal to slash the National Park Service budget by $900 million — nearly 30% — would devastate parks across the nation. But the impact here at home in Oregon would be especially cruel. Take Crater Lake National Park, Oregon's only full-fledged national park. It's a natural wonder, a place of deep cultural meaning and breathtaking beauty. In 2024, over 500,000 visitors visited to connect with nature and marvel at the deepest lake in the U.S., supporting local businesses in southern Oregon and generating over $80 million in economic output. **Make no mistake: budget cuts mean reduced staffing, fewer ranger and family programs, closed facilities, trails, and campgrounds, and the end of critical wildfire prevention work** — in a region already hit hard by climate chaos. But the threat doesn't stop there. From Southern Oregon's Cascade-Siskiyou National Monument to the windswept headlands of Lewis and Clark National Historical Park on the Oregon coast, these landscapes tell the story of the state's's geology, history, and biodiversity. **Under Trump, the future of these iconic places is on the chopping block.** That's why I joined 21 of my Senate colleagues to demand an end to this administration's hiring freeze and urge Trump's Department of the Interior to stop sabotaging the work of the Park Service. **If these cuts move forward, the damage to ecosystems, local economies, and our identity as a state deeply connected to the land would be irreversible.** [**Add your name to stand up for our national parks and tell Trump to keep his hands off of our public lands! Let's tell this administration that our****national****parks are not****for sale****.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108981412/549622073/-420974575?contactdata=RJD8ZIuNVzqxa7ypAyw7aECHlBaYzmD79Zz2yY8Hfn3w6+1xZjlcNSHOdqU1/ePtcMKrAK7c287uS/rI65mHkDFaxhILhcCnS13pP/gmc9wgMAhjNQ+7OgHbW6g2gik7KDjdTOmB3x4vGHDLPgNg8w==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE2MmE5MS03NTQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACrqApLG96Qbi6Sod5i8PjPzJO3B5x0Zpe-qlA6inM4=&emci=fef8b02c-6741-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ec162a91-7541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108981413/549622074/-420974575?contactdata=RJD8ZIuNVzqxa7ypAyw7aECHlBaYzmD79Zz2yY8Hfn3w6+1xZjlcNSHOdqU1/ePtcMKrAK7c287uS/rI65mHkDFaxhILhcCnS13pP/gmc9wgMAhjNQ+7OgHbW6g2gik7KDjdTOmB3x4vGHDLPgNg8w==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE2MmE5MS03NTQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ACrqApLG96Qbi6Sod5i8PjPzJO3B5x0Zpe-qlA6inM4=&emci=fef8b02c-6741-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ec162a91-7541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215) Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Chuck Hubbard
subject: The second-biggest bully in Washington (behind Trump)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Going back across her twenty-year career in Congress, she’s consistently voted for outright cruelty – but we’re going to stand up to bullies and send her home.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7abc2447-4da9-4925-846c-5899314d07f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63f16848-8e3f-46c4-b0b6-0bf5b3f1ed18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, my name is Chuck Hubbard. I’m a retired forty-year newspaper publisher, lifelong North Carolinian, and the Democrat running to unseat the second-biggest bully in Washington, Virginia Foxx. Far-right extremist Virginia Foxx has made an infamous name for herself as a mean old piece of work – and that’s not an exaggeration. Just look at a few of her headlines: The Hill: More staffers recount confrontational elevator rides with Rep. Foxx Business Insider: GOP Lawmaker Tells Reporter to 'Shut up' After Asking About Efforts to Overturn the 2020 Election The Daily Beast: GOP Rep Trashes Town Halls: ‘Just an Opportunity to Yell at Your Member of Congress’ And to be honest, Peter, Virginia Foxx’s mean streak goes far beyond her personal style. As Chair of the House Rules Committee, she’s been a staunch defender of Elon Musk’s DOGE and their attempts to dismantle our constitutional order, and she’s been nothing but a rubber stamp for Donald Trump’s far-right agenda. Going back across her twenty-year career in Congress (and a decade in the State Senate before that), she’s consistently voted for outright cruelty – whether that’s being one of only eleven members of the House to reject Hurricane Katrina aid, voting to deny health insurance to children, or claiming that Matthew Shepard’s homophobic murder was a hoax. It makes my blood boil, and that’s why I’m running against her. Frankly, the only person in Washington who’s a bigger bully than Virginia Foxx is her best friend, Donald Trump. It’s a small wonder that those two get along like a house on fire. [Peter, we have the opportunity to stand up to one of Washington’s biggest bullies and send Virginia Foxx packing next year – but we can only do it with your support. This is a tough, red district and we need to start laying the groundwork for victory now. Will you please split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action so we can have the resources we need to fight and win?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc172bf9-08e4-4959-b7bb-9b3e27504a61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [DONATE MORE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8800a23-2c35-4e3e-97d0-6fbfe4e3913a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | I spent more than forty years as a journalist and publisher at the newspaper my family has run since World War I, and in that time, I never let my own opinions inform my coverage. I just reported the facts as they were. But I spent those four decades watching Virginia Foxx rise from a member of our state legislature to one of the most powerful people in Congress – and it’s long past time that someone stood up and challenged her. Her bullying is personal to me. When Donald Trump first won the election in 2016, my daughter, Meredith, called me in tears because she was terrified of what his victory meant for her and her wife’s safety. These people, they tell us they want to “make America great again,” but nothing could be further from the truth. America will be a great nation when we protect our most vulnerable, not when we make people afraid. Our elected representatives should be looking after us, not using their great power to bully and belittle innocent people. In Congress, I will always stand up to bullies and fight for my neighbors, no matter who they are. [I hope I can count on you to chip in and become a grassroots support as we stand up to bullies, unseat Virginia Foxx, and build an America that is actually great.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T444fde1b-d2fa-4f3d-a488-f77e51684c65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Chuck Hubbard
Democrat for US Congress

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a84099c-4a66-43e6-9e6b-7c772e1859cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
