Foxx Business Insider: GOP Lawmaker Tells Reporter to 'Shut up' After Asking About Efforts to Overturn the 2020 Election The Daily Beast: GOP Rep Trashes Town Halls: ‘Just an Opportunity to Yell at Your Member of Congress’ And to be honest, Peter, Virginia Foxx’s mean streak goes far beyond her personal style. As Chair of the House Rules Committee, she’s been a staunch defender of Elon Musk’s DOGE and their attempts to dismantle our constitutional order, and she’s been nothing but a rubber stamp for Donald Trump’s far-right agenda. Going back across her twenty-year career in Congress (and a decade in the State Senate before that), she’s consistently voted for outright cruelty – whether that’s being one of only eleven members of the House to reject Hurricane Katrina aid, voting to deny health insurance to children, or claiming that Matthew Shepard’s homophobic murder was a hoax. It makes my blood boil, and that’s why I’m running against her. Frankly, the only person in Washington who’s a bigger bully than Virginia Foxx is her best friend, Donald Trump. It’s a small wonder that those two get along like a house on fire. | | | | | | | | | | | | I spent more than forty years as a journalist and publisher at the newspaper my family has run since World War I, and in that time, I never let my own opinions inform my coverage. I just reported the facts as they were. But I spent those four decades watching Virginia Foxx rise from a member of our state legislature to one of the most powerful people in Congress – and it’s long past time that someone stood up and challenged her. Her bullying is personal to me. When Donald Trump first won the election in 2016, my daughter, Meredith, called me in tears because she was terrified of what his victory meant for her and her wife’s safety. These people, they tell us they want to “make America great again,” but nothing could be further from the truth. America will be a great nation when we protect our most vulnerable, not when we make people afraid. Our elected representatives should be looking after us, not using their great power to bully and belittle innocent people. In Congress, I will always stand up to bullies and fight for my neighbors, no matter who they are. | | | | | | | Thank you for all that you do! Your support means the world to me. Take care now, Chuck Hubbard Democrat for US Congress | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

body:
Fellow American, it’s Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump’s former campaign manager, and I need your immediate attention on something. Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left’s #1 target to beat in 2026 |

Fellow American,

It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and **I need your immediate attention on something.**

Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026.

Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority.

**Fellow American, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy.**

Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time.

Fellow American, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, _this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left._

Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left’s #1 target to beat in 2026 | Fellow American, It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and I need your immediate attention on something. Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026. Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority. Fellow American, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy. Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time. Fellow American, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left. | Thank you, Kellyanne Conway In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. name: Tobias Read
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Ban phones in public schools?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250604EM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250604EM]
As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously.
As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me.
So let me know: Do YOU support banning cell phones in public schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done.
There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in.
However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues.
So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Tim Walz calls ICE agents the Gestapo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As much as Tim Walz would have America believe that Immigration officials are the new Gestapo, it really couldn’t be further from the truth. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNAWuS56LZ9hDKqXYs7KyHSMOLMbH_TfWflKOBJxxE6S3X7ibOCsH8muglV2FR2WHu_9LVCBHxrRAfM7RUj6W8aIKU6oBSPZJYn2wmYjnYyBP1CfSdFwHF2CuByuwKO_Ngpq6lloQJ979m47LbCiq8Kaw%3D%3D)

---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNATmXwFHxhxM3dHxlfIV4Dprr3n5ilxtrpMxrKqFqGJtCwejRklaheqE--ezcXx09zVrPlA70xOlcXozpjGn1y7aVjOoaM8d_nblCIgAKzuXG2qOH9UZb6O2VT7LzAAWD0uJkwheXXJRpdUH-Dht40dw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself.

I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork.

After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. **On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards.**

In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a **Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command.** Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions.

Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate.

**The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous.**

I'm running against **Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor** , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit _**against**_ the Minneapolis Police Department.

Governor Walz wants America to believe **Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo.** His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.”

So ask yourself: _**If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda?**_

**Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis.**

Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots.

But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.**It's common sense**. It's about **protecting Americans**.

Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then **[I’m asking you to pitch in $1, $5, or even $15 today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNAQDPCEvzM6cq6vZJHDU1Vy6NtVe7_PHlg2chOAPoDx2npqydZ7IfdIT9ZnxojOCBQnPBp9ibUDwR-K8jfzu1GiKKn6BrVZ3sG-GeCMPJzmTtdUmJ2xOyQ6IXzEm-Hmm-4lnlcg_3nhFQQJBjcrVegmA%3D%3D)**

[**SEND ADAM TO THE SENATE**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNAUP14tADMObXrZPpJ_pFA5FczVEz392aKzfuql950DGrNcuzrleD9w8Y6MAs-ywblRC9nlrKo1W9-wM31p9DsEuQjYUbF6ns6E7vmRZ36NBWK2pCxrfZ3CmM5_rqyFspnl-78vexwVt8tC8OWpGkmnQ%3D%3D) **_
_**
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNAaRwbvMKsVF4cF2ZKUzVi8WG8q17hlvp2n9Zu3z1C1tfFuQRGzPX3ocQaNFBR8X3o-eRgbiIGpcQF3V6oUqbQLP5NgGfg1bqRmN92O2TOg3xHkN1gDwQw8jme3ba7etUqLeM-Rsult1CuvMB5bfAj5g%3D%3D)

**Here's What I Believe:** I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens.

I believe in a **strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law** —no exceptions, no apologies.

I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities.

**I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point.**

Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it.

While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault.

Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either.

Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: **[Could you donate $10, $25, or even $50 to help me launch this campaign the right way?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNAdBJTrF03hQMqqnjksdYDKnpa0zixMDtLUECW3pPVB0QBPzMx_cD5RwNJPMHGm5KdTH9zXFJuvGfzxDHIU0zSvhcc9x02QwRvBqwhoOEmFKaEL92sZrdl8QtT44wt2usrDJBYTRiXBsWPyTnZAho8Dg%3D%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNASpmiBWTYE_W1qRPeMzBo5EDn1NR5AeizUlHQPackIS88MoyyiadJN1S8q5akjbGWufAKQw6RZGD0WpMueBuWP9YV_Lh94_7EkbDD-3xfJJy786TpQJR9bApq7wsgPDZ7BRGRgdZi2REKvy5Td7XnPg%3D%3D)
Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet.

With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative.

**I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp.**

What I have is grit, **a record of service** , and hopefully, the support of **patriots like you** who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on...

And if you believe we deserve **leaders who've fought for this country—** Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNAnHWcfSpuS6_fvEPkIdVRdC9_WVPsgzdeAY7WSfDfsl6_lGPULOKEjGfKtwDKnlsVrKpYeM8DuqT-SrL9LpPksqD10GeDGJh2-hzk8_AnVNQgsN4to4wSfYJJvoB07u8ek0WjzJgpsgS-AokIk5TyMg%3D%3D)
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=20115da3afc14bbe9438f98614387f34&_e=ul7mNYjQbcy_gEEScxeTnLSO5UdfTfkyfPd9IKYN-ThEzh6FUSDNefAz7CRWrMTTwV-CVgTSH4HUrWnjnplDzzdJY3viz1-Jlc5qR9UhdTPHDyECaTI37gWKuINQCGzfNoApVymR355yILl4r-1ugt5mfA0RW1-66n1KEhjV9lEt9LZfrB3cY_NgvaPzYBB68xXwDrIQDqRvA0qUMDIBzPY-_57MM7PPGqfzbIWtypCWNtSLEXc1cwRkvcoDvTNAEKJwahszay5gw776gjIIZgOO2eGYkpoARvGxFtt8biGghq5JBoaIP2afh4gToERFNLvDcP3v8SR4Mv6HLQWIPc15pmz66yqPXtD5rJXY-05lmxBWcHFAKJnagwDXrTcZFqssT3bYrkMxIyb5T2ezrg%3D%3D)

Let's do this. Let's turn the tide. Let's win.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze

clean_body: As much as Tim Walz would have America believe that Immigration officials are the new Gestapo, it really couldn’t be further from the truth. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself. I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork. After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards. In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command. Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions. Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate. The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous. I'm running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department. Governor Walz wants America to believe Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo. His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.” So ask yourself: If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda? Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis. Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots. But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.It's common sense. It's about protecting Americans. Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then Here's What I Believe: I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens. I believe in a strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law —no exceptions, no apologies. I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities. I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point. Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it. While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault. Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either. Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet. With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative. I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp. What I have is grit, a record of service , and hopefully, the support of patriots like you who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on... And if you believe we deserve leaders who've fought for this country— Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today. Let's do this. Let's turn the tide. Let's win. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

**With your support in May, we met our online fundraising goal.**

I know the midterm elections seem far away, but early support is critical for building the groundwork we need to keep IL-13 blue for working families – every dollar contributed, door knocked, and conversation with a neighbor counts.

There’s no time to slow down our fight. While I’m working hard in Washington standing up to the chaos of this administration, our end-of-quarter deadline is rapidly approaching.

At the end of June, we’ll be required by the FEC to report our fundraising data. This is a huge win for campaign transparency, but with our numbers made public, our two Republican opponents will be searching for any sliver of weakness.

I’ve fought tough election battles before, but with all that is at stake for our democracy and our communities, we need to continue our progress to keep this seat and have a chance of winning the House majority.

But the bottom line is none of this is possible without your support. I’m so grateful for your contributions in May, and **[if you’d like to kickstart our progress in June before our deadline, $3 would go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108983354/549628404/753003349?refcode=em-6.4.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWU4ZWU1Ny03OTQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0nB-4gNyhfPt5eXVJ4qCPLPw9_b6CYUYLVUW4bYKCHQ=)**

clean_body: | = = Thank you, friend. With your support in May, we met our online fundraising goal. I know the midterm elections seem far away, but early support is critical for building the groundwork we need to keep IL-13 blue for working families – every dollar contributed, door knocked, and conversation with a neighbor counts. There’s no time to slow down our fight. While I’m working hard in Washington standing up to the chaos of this administration, our end-of-quarter deadline is rapidly approaching. At the end of June, we’ll be required by the FEC to report our fundraising data. This is a huge win for campaign transparency, but with our numbers made public, our two Republican opponents will be searching for any sliver of weakness. I’ve fought tough election battles before, but with all that is at stake for our democracy and our communities, we need to continue our progress to keep this seat and have a chance of winning the House majority. But the bottom line is none of this is possible without your support. I’m so grateful for your contributions in May, and = Thank you, Nikki | = | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Nikki for Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States

Together,

To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. | | | | | ---|--- Our team has identified the cycle’s best and most consequential opportunities to build durable Democratic power in state legislatures, and I’m so excited to share our new target map with you: This map is ambitious, strategic, and forward-focused. To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. To optimize our budget and make strategic investments, we’ve divided our target states into three categories: 🚨 Battlegrounds: Our most competitive chambers where majorities are determined by the slimmest of margins, including five chambers where majorities are decided by a single seat. 💪 Power Building Chambers: Our best opportunities to gain seats on our path to new majorities or defend the veto pens of Democratic governors. 👀 Watch List: Our team is tracking opportunities to maximize state legislative power and block the GOP’s agenda when possible. We’re ready to hit the ground running – but this strategy is only as strong as the grassroots movement behind it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | State Dems are working daily to lower costs, address real concerns, and improve the everyday lives of folks like you in places like your state. That’s why it’s vital that we fund our strategy to defend our majorities, elect strong Democratic leaders, and invest in ultra-competitive races nationwide. Thank you for being part of this movement. name: Eliza Walton
subject: Oregon's wildlife needs you, Peter!
body:
Take action TODAY to protect Oregon’s native wildlife.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108983369/549628506/-1710459027?contactdata=w6neqncI8X8P8UG7hJwi9Adkk0lP2pTGayf7gryPlSnGcI2+Deym3DD8IPgu091n+xxmDAx1aBruftaVhM37DnMDvwPAe+U8K0Dupwqc4BQbF9EgvttnsRuHdiIzqAks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODI0MTcxLTc5NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KtUAk4A5QG_kIGWZMv8DnR-c_WJqE4dr16fMM_UfOL4=&emci=96368a15-7041-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=06824171-7941-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
Hi Peter, As an Oregonian, I know that you know how valuable our wildlife is to our state. Oregon would not be the special state it is without our fish, wildlife, and the habitats they rely upon. From whale watching and birding to fishing, our wildlife are a staple of our state’s identity, and vital for our tourism economy. [**Will you send a message today to support critical funding to protect and recover Oregon’s native wildlife?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108983370/549628507/-1710459027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODI0MTcxLTc5NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KtUAk4A5QG_kIGWZMv8DnR-c_WJqE4dr16fMM_UfOL4=&emci=96368a15-7041-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=06824171-7941-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230) Many of our iconic native species are on the decline due to habitat loss, climate change, and development. In Oregon, there are nearly 300 species of greatest conservation need that require urgent, long-term recovery efforts. However, we lack dedicated funding for our wildlife at the state level. And additionally, with federal government cuts looming, our wildlife is being pushed even further to the brink of extinction. [**HB 2977**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108983371/549628508/-880233981?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODI0MTcxLTc5NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KtUAk4A5QG_kIGWZMv8DnR-c_WJqE4dr16fMM_UfOL4=&emci=96368a15-7041-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=06824171-7941-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230), known as “1% for Wildlife”, would provide necessary funding for wildlife and habitat conservation by increasing the state tourism tax from 1.5% to 2.5%. This bill just recently passed out of the House Committee on Natural Resources and now awaits a work session in the House Committee on Revenue. [**Now is our chance to do something about this, but we can’t do it without your help. Your legislators need to hear from you on how much you care about Oregon’s native wildlife today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108983372/549628509/-1710459027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODI0MTcxLTc5NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KtUAk4A5QG_kIGWZMv8DnR-c_WJqE4dr16fMM_UfOL4=&emci=96368a15-7041-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=06824171-7941-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Take action** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108983373/549628510/-1710459027?contactdata=w6neqncI8X8P8UG7hJwi9Adkk0lP2pTGayf7gryPlSnGcI2+Deym3DD8IPgu091n+xxmDAx1aBruftaVhM37DnMDvwPAe+U8K0Dupwqc4BQbF9EgvttnsRuHdiIzqAks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODI0MTcxLTc5NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KtUAk4A5QG_kIGWZMv8DnR-c_WJqE4dr16fMM_UfOL4=&emci=96368a15-7041-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=06824171-7941-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
With a 1% increase, we could make a real difference for wildlife conservation, while maintaining Oregon’s low state tourism taxes (it would still be one of the lowest in the country). By passing HB 2977, a $400 weekend coast trip would contribute $4 toward protecting fish, birds, pollinators, and their habitats, while ensuring visitors help protect the very landscapes and wildlife that make Oregon so unique.
Let’s pass this critical funding legislation and combat Oregon’s extinction crisis. [**Please send your legislators a message today before it’s too late!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108983374/549628511/-1710459027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODI0MTcxLTc5NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KtUAk4A5QG_kIGWZMv8DnR-c_WJqE4dr16fMM_UfOL4=&emci=96368a15-7041-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=06824171-7941-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Take action** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108983375/549628512/-1710459027?contactdata=w6neqncI8X8P8UG7hJwi9Adkk0lP2pTGayf7gryPlSnGcI2+Deym3DD8IPgu091n+xxmDAx1aBruftaVhM37DnMDvwPAe+U8K0Dupwqc4BQbF9EgvttnsRuHdiIzqAks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODI0MTcxLTc5NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KtUAk4A5QG_kIGWZMv8DnR-c_WJqE4dr16fMM_UfOL4=&emci=96368a15-7041-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=06824171-7941-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=2107230)
---
Thank you for your support,
---
---
Eliza Walton _(she/they)_ OLCV Coalition Director

By passing HB 2977, a $400 weekend coast trip would contribute $4 toward protecting fish, birds, pollinators, and their habitats, while ensuring visitors help protect the very landscapes and wildlife that make Oregon so unique. Let’s pass this critical funding legislation and combat Oregon’s extinction crisis. Thank you for your support, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=375%2E181023%2EZCCmjE)
Trust me when I say this: **Michigan Democratic women are ready to work, fight, and WIN in 2026.**
Everything we’ve done together over the last several years is because we didn’t give up after the 2016 election. No matter how tough things got, we stayed the course and fought for real progress for Michigan families.
**We can’t give up now, either.**
Michigan Democratic women are warriors — and if we have these warriors leading our state into the future, we can fight for safe neighborhoods, safe schools, and access to childcare.
We can make everything that we believe in happen here in Michigan as long as we fight for it _together._
[**I’m ready to fight for a Michigan where everyone has the opportunity to get a fair shot in life. Are you with me? If you are, please pitch in to my campaign today to show that you’re in this fight to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home:**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250604_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=375%2E181023%2EZCCmjE)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=12f6272c7ffd484198923316d331b2da&_e=m8rc3VASW9IIad0KSKIKEp-wfIYFxVVLb5_D_KFdZeH9lSxyEGYyWTMlVXYFhzy-HmhyxExaLNJY4QWNW7v4rYUB8lyRqGRLvXFfa7qkFSIy7zJo4XnFXoVU_sporEE6jyv4MD9CenIk6Ukhm6F5G32hAYurAOz7L_ThSwF5gvMXb_WkK2LijxWFNFp3bYUqQ8XQp78l5DZteyvx9ACDCpfuhjN1Jz2d5QIcZKxhBDBk0V7KBW90mDwewWGBdyeG3dGREV6h1zOXISomalozs079roTVFg-26oxOeG3XlJ7hLN2NnmkH6wskh-lMp1AR9MMmgYze730eWFR8AHZSim-Y5iwRbXbtYbexK0JLub5BxdviOlc8okNDeuMZF-p-25pAbO57K--8egtzAzjGhyijjU4RHY9bSqAGME9uHQY%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=12f6272c7ffd484198923316d331b2da&_e=m8rc3VASW9IIad0KSKIKEp-wfIYFxVVLb5_D_KFdZeH9lSxyEGYyWTMlVXYFhzy-HmhyxExaLNJY4QWNW7v4rYUB8lyRqGRLvXFfa7qkFSIy7zJo4XnFXoVU_sporEE6jyv4MD9CenIk6Ukhm6F5G32hAYurAOz7L_ThSwF5gvMXb_WkK2LijxWFNFp3bYUqQ8XQp78l5DZteyvx9ACDCpfuhjN1Jz2d5QIcZKxhBDBk0V7KBW90mDwewWGBdyeGdtaWNX2WslckqynlNBqHMkCHo6GIq5qiyo4bmaRssIf18VvPiZ_xjjxl-yNDFwXFeVOE6QQGZckjB9anTTeiofBoAKKqqCvem9pKmPYJE-k-36ec_pxbrFT5fYvGUEs8EeQ9ASXHtlGxtF58xSzPfvGxXEnMDPaVjmhL5XcxY2o%3D)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

clean_body: | | Peter, Before he took over the White House, we warned folks that Trump was going to lie and gaslight the country. It’s up to all of us to call BULLSHIT each and every time Trump lies. We have to work together to stop Trump, and his cronies, and protect our democracy from further desecration. Here at the Pennsylvania Democratic Party, we’re doing everything we can to protect our state from the dangers of Trump. But we can’t do it alone.= | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Every time Trump lies, he chips away at our democracy. If we call out his lies and refuse to budge in our fact-checking, we can slowly take away his power. When it feels hopeless, remember there are actions we can take to fight back. From our Governor suing federal agencies, to fact-checking, to supporting candidates for local and state office that will protect our state from threats, we still have the power to stand up for what’s right. = Thank you, Mitch = | Follow us on , , and **! This is a major win for Hoosiers’ conservative values. | | | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/IgI0F66baj4M3ON0DkfJFR6saWiDA781Cyayr1VouDnzX2o-_VNJR2jnx7kXUejp6tD76u_D_XUvJdGeNqfsHjBAXpGwWD61nLd8RJ2mWUy__O-zmCf0x3-gMWiDaGGCrihvKLmypiAkkRiIG5_PIRAkHzsbgX5QtcQGYht_eW0aS8pbXv2fLLRQ-6s8GDeqfYdyAULeplKO6PM3SWTy4X8iW1fwuqsFBxRY7n1f9SvjnYTA2KXbYU2Ik4pckv44jCyRhVqp2ei10ourj8VzH2Q5BUxPqp3i2h-C8-VvfuP4yXfFsBpRsyd96qmplZpvrCII8LgvlhPZhOABPNigaYrnC9z27W45dbotd0qwyh1sNtBaU9DoFOWmY1_jPs37/5y4CNyxWJmgQKfccs5_sd453Zp0KrHzR/9)

Fellow Republican, I’m thrilled to share some exciting news from the Indiana Statehouse. **Last week, Republican lawmakers passed a transformative $44 billion state budget that reflects our commitment to conservative values and responsible governance.**
---
_The budget includes:_

* An expansion of school choice, allowing more families to access quality education options that best suit their children's needs.
* Implementing measures to ensure fiscal responsibility, such as addressing a $2 billion revenue shortfall through strategic spending cuts and a $2 per pack increase in cigarette taxes, which will generate approximately $800 million over the biennium to support Medicaid programs.

---
These achievements are a testament to what we can accomplish when we stand united. But our work isn't done. _**We need your support to continue advancing our shared values and building a stronger Indiana.**_

[_**Will you consider making a contribution today to help us keep the momentum going?**_](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/PJnCNTNrh1MbAfv2JRLAnkUxWXJrOpRiiDBBZFnq6YGw2S-HIIZORSUZLEWzp8ZcGkyxy-byBrHCjJMwOY10y9wkqjYwdI95M_IC-etE7fQrb1-SScVO5XiZUuKx_3OTIbB5riWcEn8jCtce0YtxEJrcwOtr_DKx0KvEI7PEsVAWAIzc5IgaKV9-VFwtJIZQkrrCjcfMJe3H9yZDctMT3_gpyYOczt-6JVqb4HlJlrfPP_Jb7LMGcdP-wuMLRRuHkwMFTKD2VkILqC562W5-gdKGMmYEVMc_VebhSIeQnI8w5vkrzM9nqbPNPbPA6plfQrv5qlh5XOmkp2v2jX3jMiAX8lIQks74tOM7-VdWWmKhlxHKld90vZzfJ6LFRmN2/KItItCC1PXuTC9N3LT7DFFexIcV4ZR0F/9)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Was it worth it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The most important question of all.

Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet!
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oCWb9OQXSpxkq3x9A2VswQ~~/AARclBA~/hUoFiZLFF1ttWmcqj7UQwcKLHFszK8MK7a3--29yoEqieYSahhXwQE1mZW2I-b0rg1ZjWQYj2QL4WWoDwTbwlwtzzMeqG83BsxtwgqRjSj-3y9Gf-NVdCXVyDTVq-Ap9sWWKAstNsMaBn_Tt-ct0jTkl7YLqUhI76cdQh_X_qeZo45pPLfS90TuRvBKij9Buxwv1KLFiSjn3ezsk4pTpdJpYOl1ZvYN7GtsbJ5EoWdt0dAnolaPHA9B5ssVEsUa7T9s6emmP2YRIfwpD5Abaa2x6cj6iwX9iLzR4-tZGa2k~)
---
Friend,
---
Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it.
---
Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats' Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President - Donald J. Trump - from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth?
---
These rabid leftists have labeled me a "_DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ," RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are _still_ attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the _TRUTH_ remains...
---

name: Chris Meek
subject: SHOCKING: 1 in 5 young Americans now SUPPORT Bin Laden
body:
[https://secure.anedot.com/9-11-legacy-foundation/edm-em06b?source_code=db-911-em06b-003&utm_term=lrm-active]

Dear Friend,

Nearly 1 in 5 young Americans now have a POSITIVE VIEW of Osama bin
Laden.

Let that sink in.

The terrorist mastermind behind the DEADLIEST attack on American soil
is being GLORIFIED on social media by a generation with NO MEMORY of
that tragic day.

This is NOT a partisan issue. This is an AMERICAN issue.

The 9/11 Legacy Foundation is launching an EMERGENCY CAMPAIGN to fight
back against this disturbing trend before it's TOO LATE.

ALARMING FACTS YOU NEED TO KNOW:

* Only 26 states REQUIRE teaching about 9/11 in schools
* Millions of young Americans have watched pro-bin Laden content
online
* In just 2 years, we'll mark the 25th anniversary of 9/11 -
potentially the LAST major commemoration where many survivors can
share their stories FIRSTHAND

Former White House Chief of Staff Andrew Card (who whispered the news
to President Bush that fateful day) and former Defense Secretary Leon
Panetta have joined forces with Ground Zero and Pentagon survivors on
our distinguished organizing committee.

But they CANNOT do this alone.

The forces of historical REVISIONISM and ANTI-AMERICAN propaganda are
WELL-FUNDED and GAINING GROUND with each passing day.

We're calling on 100,000 PATRIOTIC AMERICANS to stand with us and
defend the true legacy of 9/11.

97% of Americans will ignore this message. Will you be one of the FEW
who takes a stand?

STAND WITH 9/11 HEROES: DONATE NOW
[https://secure.anedot.com/9-11-legacy-foundation/edm-em06b?source_code=db-911-em06b-003&utm_term=lrm-active]

Your donation will IMMEDIATELY go to work:

* FIGHTING BACK against historical revisionism
* PRESERVING the stories of courage and sacrifice
* EDUCATING the next generation about what REALLY happened
* ENSURING nationwide commemoration events from coast to coast

This is about REMEMBERING the heroes who ran TOWARD danger while
others ran away.

This is about HONORING the nearly 3,000 Americans who lost their lives
that day.

This is about making sure "WE REMEMBER" isn't just a slogan - it's our
SOLEMN PROMISE to future generations.

The window to act is CLOSING FAST. Will you stand with us?

EMERGENCY: DONATE NOW
[https://secure.anedot.com/9-11-legacy-foundation/edm-em06b?source_code=db-911-em06b-003&utm_term=lrm-active]

For America,

Dr. Chris Meek

P.S. The anti-American forces aren't waiting - and neither can we.
Your IMMEDIATE response is needed to launch this vital mission before
it's too late. DONATE NOW.

DONATE NOW
[https://secure.anedot.com/9-11-legacy-foundation/edm-em06b?source_code=db-911-em06b-003&utm_term=lrm-active]

The 9/11 Legacy Foundation is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit
organization.

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=294576&trkid=726249755&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4ff8c4e63a32425d854fe867f5a31365&_e=VGpLG1qoymfD6EWeGVeiW_vn-qU99lUb0wHVz-0SJD6F7E6KPkMYTPliMzT_pLKcjpu9c2G7TF-0XQrvvf9pF5nfBE4KqmFgJ6zUaI3rnlH44-1WWaaI5gK8YQTQf6Jan70meB-jlljnCOepareNXxuDWSP1ygRL6ERPaW_THeVIPrXzzUiJuQPgh2OKscPHZtjslL1id6CXdyIZpwTLM7Acb8GhMgtO3EW4bHm40XJeJ9zy8KooHdq_mTAXKz1Fux0DAHp5tvOLMQRHHVXsWAhD4q8KbYlKc8Ewf9pGu4Hdot4sRkEfVxddxgAVP0XeEj1d7nitjIc3SnXYMVjWdKASC6bXriZjC_aF8LhFIfQ%3D)**

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Another cheap shot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It happened again.
#
**It happened again.**
In a subcommittee hearing today, the Republican chairman called me “Mr. McBride” on the record.
This isn’t the first time. It’s not a slip-up. Just another petty, performative jab from a Republican politician more interested in bullying me and getting a few clicks on right-wing Twitter than governing.
**I’m not here to play their game.** I refuse to let this nonsense distract from the real harm they’re trying to do — like pushing the largest cuts to health care in American history.
I’m in Congress to deliver for Delaware, not entertain cruelty from colleagues who’d rather punch down than do their jobs.
[**If you’re with me in this fight, please rush a donation of $5 today. Let’s show them that every cheap shot only makes our movement stronger.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250604-1?refcode=em20250604-2060&amount=5&refcode2=2060_21716_a6WWXg&akid=2060%2E21716%2Ea6WWXg)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250604-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250604-2060&refcode2=2060_21716_a6WWXg&akid=2060%2E21716%2Ea6WWXg)**
Thanks for being part of this team. I’ll keep doing the work, and I’m proud to have you with me.
— Sarah

body:

Unsubscribe

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxcldw&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jeke251hc00w3ewpda10d6h2en19x07qkpu3jl6en6v0u6kwd0udflvl67kkubt0tjjl36ti6fxq4zlyozycsoe8vsjxj6su4an5q353g6wrog0fd1pj6vy1q1vg8683m9cc4rmuuoxm8o8r1if1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxcldw&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxcldw&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxcldw&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxcldw&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jeke251hc00w3ewpda10d6hr66jxwzs7nen11r7f7hxhjse5ao1sctuo29tr3826d66ie5ywokmsrrksmsh49see1y5sd934k6sm2crfneu6iyz4kfmd7eklzew334xl1cwqaeg35mhm7fc7fwpf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxcldw&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxcldw&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

You’re in an exclusive club, Derek.
On average, only 10% of people who receive one of our emails actually opens it.
And of those people, less than 1% will actually click the link to donate or sign a petition.

Katie’s campaign for governor is powered by people like you—literally. Because we reject money from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks, we **have to rely on everyday Americans chipping in $5, $10, or whatever they can.**

Team KP

name: Forward Party
subject: Fast Forward - Revenue Raise Follow Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It was a big week at Forward - here's what you missed.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=1)
---
Wednesday, June 04, 2025 | Peter -- After the Big, Beautiful Bill (yes, it hurts us to type that name as much as it probably hurts you to read it) passed the House, we asked about your thoughts on tackling the national debt. Most responses highlighted the need to both increase revenue and decrease spending, with the primary debate being _how much_ to focus on each area. In order to dig in a bit, we're going to ask you about where you think we should look to increase revenue, and where to cut spending. This week, we focused on the former - where are the most promising areas for the US government to increase revenue? Before digging into the results, we want to start with a thank you, as we had more responses and engagement with this poll than any prior one! Diving into the results, a common theme continues to develop in how Forwardists approach problems. In short, we look to keep all reasonable options on the table to tackle problems from different angles. Here, most respondents said that we should focus both on increasing taxes and stimulating growth, with many noting that the stimulating growth itself will increase taxes. On the slider, the vast majority wanted to focus on both raising taxes and stimulating growth, with different relative levels of focus. Digging into the polls, we can see a pretty interesting picture develop! Raising the business tax rate was very unpopular, with many noting that this could inhibit growth and potentially lower taxes. The other three options, however, were pretty much tied! If we read all of these data points and comments together (with some earlier comments on small business support), it paints a picture of an approach to increasing revenue. The government should stimulate growth, and that involves leaving the business tax rate alone. From a prior poll, we assume that most Forwardists would be in favor of doing so by supporting small businesses. Then, the tax code can be simplified to eliminate loopholes, and the top tax rates can be increased. Looking at the comments, you said: **Stimulate Revenue via Growing the Economy through Targeted Government Investment**
* You argued that maintaining our current business tax level (or even lowering it) would encourage business activity and higher tax revenue.

**Innovative Policy Solutions**
* Many of you called for a rethink of our tax system generally, with shifts ranging from support for Value-Added Taxes, automation taxes, or even a 10% universal tariff that would exclusively be spent on paying down the debt.

**Higher Top Tax Brackets & Closing Loopholes**
* Many of you cited the ways that our tax code is set up to allow for tax loopholes to unfairly lower taxes and noted we should focus on closing those loopholes to ensure all are paying their fair share.
* You also called for adding in more tax brackets on the high end to reflect the shifting reality of incomes in the current economy.

**[FWD CEO Lindsey Williams Drath Joins CNN to Discuss Trump Manufacturing Plan](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfYfKPkS14l1YOFVlfNsJdAk&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=2)** | **CNN** Trump may talk a good game, but his plans just aren't realistic... Click the link to hear more. **[FWD CEO Lindsey Williams Drath Talks Trump's Miscalculation On Putin](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfar4j1fvaetNF1fb9giiuXx&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=3)** | **CNN** Known for reversing his position and claiming he was there all along, Trump is doing the same now regarding Putin and the war in Ukraine. FWD CEO weighs in.
**June 5 | Civic Engagement With The Young Forwardists
** Join the Young Forwardists for their monthly civic engagement meeting. Learn all about how to get involved in your community and make a difference, no matter how small. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/civic_engagement_20250605?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=4)** **June 6 | Young Forwardists Chapter Meeting
** Join the Young Forwardists for their monthly chapter information meeting. Chapters are the backbone of the Young Forwardists and it'll take one in every school in the country to help heal our political divide. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/chapter_information_meeting_20250606?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=5)** **June 10 | NY Forward Party Monthly Happy Hour
** Join the NY State Forward Party for their monthly happy hour in midtown Manhattan. Meet fellow Forwardists and learn how you can get involved in the state. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/seadler/ny_forward_monthly_happy_hour?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=6)** **June 10 | National Volunteer Call
** Join the National Forward Party Team for their National Volunteer call to talk all things Forward Party, politics, and volunteering in your state. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_volunteer_call_20250610?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=7)**
**[Andrew Yang Joins Reclaiming With Monica Lewinski](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfZ0WqyXB0AQQmYphFhozRHD&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=8)** | **Reclaiming With Monica Lewinski**
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=10) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=11) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=12) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_67&n=13) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: This is some absolute dictator sh*t, folks
body:
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.
This is a targeted, strategic assault on the tools we use to organize, fundraise, and win. We MUST overwhelm him with IMMEDIATE resistance. Rush a donation right now to defend ActBlue, defend grassroots power, and defend our democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=052825_1]

He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country. Why? Because he’s terrified of us. He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins. This is how authoritarians seize power: 1️⃣ They discredit elections. 2️⃣ They silence the media. 3️⃣ And then — they come for the money. Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment. This is a targeted, strategic assault on the tools we use to organize, fundraise, and win. We MUST overwhelm him with IMMEDIATE resistance. Friends, In case you missed it: Seth Moulton had a major moment on Bill Maher over the weekend. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108985720/549636955/1168833314?refcode=250604_Seth_MFC_Maher&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWEwZDA2Ni04MjQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tC_ysQgFpe_4sl-SPgK3G_LNaFEJZzSlrwl9uQVQ9fY=) Since our loss last November, Seth has been one of the leading voices in the Democratic Party calling for change. He’s not afraid to say it: Democrats have our hearts in the right place. But if we want to win again — up and down the ballot — we need to refocus on the issues that matter most to working Americans. That’s how we beat Donald Trump. That’s how we take back the House. And that’s how we deliver real progress for the American people. But let’s be clear: Seth’s willingness to speak out has put a target on his back. And the rumors are flying — about potential challengers lining up to take him on. That’s why this moment matters. clean_body: | = Friends, In case you missed it: Seth Moulton had a major moment on Bill Maher over the weekend. = Since our loss last November, Seth has been one of the leading voices in the Democratic Party calling for change. He’s not afraid to say it: Democrats have our hearts in the right place. But if we want to win again — up and down the ballot — we need to refocus on the issues that matter most to working Americans. That’s how we beat Donald Trump. That’s how we take back the House. And that’s how we deliver real progress for the American people. But let’s be clear: Seth’s willingness to speak out has put a target on his back. And the rumors are flying — about potential challengers lining up to take him on. That’s why this moment matters. We’re working to make sure we have the resources to fend off any challenger next November. And we need to prove that grassroots supporters have Seth’s back. = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Thank you for being part of this team. -Team Moulton = [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Sydney Gallego
subject: An update on Baby Gallego
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It could happen any day now
#

Peter —
I am proud of Ruben.
I am proud of the man he has become, and most of all, I am proud of his fierce and unwavering commitment to making life better for everyone, regardless of their background.
During his campaign for Senate, back in 2023, we were blessed with our first child together — baby Isla. Now, during Ruben’s first year in the Senate, we’re expecting our second child. It could happen any day now. I can't wait for all of the adventures our growing family has in store.
But right now, Ruben not only has one eye on me and the pending birth of our baby, but the other eye on his fundraising. He’s still working hard for us and for working families, and he’s still got to fundraise to fight back against Trump and the extremists in the White House.
May is an official FEC deadline month, and it’s an important one. And because Ruben is going to be taking some time off to spend with our growing family, it means a lot less time making fundraising phone calls.
So I am writing to ask for your help. Especially before this FEC deadline. If you could contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today, it'd help Ruben reach his fundraising goals and give him some peace of mind as he gets ready to transition to time with family for a few weeks.
Just use this link:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $5 or $10 to Ruben's campaign for Senate in Arizona before his fundraising deadline comes to a close in a few days?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250604-1-fullb&t=29&akid=3884%2E734936%2E6Ucm9w)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250604-1-fullb&t=30&akid=3884%2E734936%2E6Ucm9w)
Like I said, I am so proud of Ruben and I am also proud of the work he’s doing in the Senate. Thanks for helping him keep fighting the good fight.
All my best,
Sydney Gallego

Folks, Happy Pride Month! 🏳️🌈 This month especially, I'm grateful for the contributions that LGBTQ+ folks have made across our district. They help make our communities the great places that they are today. Look, there's no doubt we've made a lot of progress over the past few decades. But it still isn't enough for us to kick our feet up and ignore the threat that the extremists pose to LGBTQ+ rights. Conservatives on the Supreme Court have already signaled that they're taking aim at _Obergefell v. Hodges_ , which would overturn same-sex marriage – just like they did with _Roe_. This time, we need to be ready, and that means codifying same-sex marriage rights into federal law. **It's the right thing to do.** People deserve to love who they want and identify how they please, without the government or other people telling them otherwise. That's what Pride Month is all about. In Congress, I’ve been proud to serve on the Congressional Equality Caucus and support legislation that defends LGBTQ+ rights. I’m committed to keeping up that fight every single day. But I can’t do it alone. clean_body: People deserve to love who they want and identify how they please, without the government or other people telling them otherwise. That's what Pride Month is all about. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Folks, Happy Pride Month! 🏳️🌈 This month especially, I'm grateful for the contributions that LGBTQ+ folks have made across our district. They help make our communities the great places that they are today. Look, there's no doubt we've made a lot of progress over the past few decades. But it still isn't enough for us to kick our feet up and ignore the threat that the extremists pose to LGBTQ+ rights. Conservatives on the Supreme Court have already signaled that they're taking aim at Obergefell v. Hodges , which would overturn same-sex marriage – just like they did with Roe. This time, we need to be ready, and that means codifying same-sex marriage rights into federal law. It's the right thing to do. People deserve to love who they want and identify how they please, without the government or other people telling them otherwise. That's what Pride Month is all about. In Congress, I’ve been proud to serve on the Congressional Equality Caucus and support legislation that defends LGBTQ+ rights. I’m committed to keeping up that fight every single day. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

We wanted to understand the theory that Joe Biden was executed and
replaced by clones in 2020. So we talked with three involuntarily
celibate crypto investors at a Whataburger in Buford.
### **Cliff 's Note: Time for Democratic Leadership & Message Upgrade--Bring On the Fighters, Not the Flinchers**
Two days ago, I wrote about the stunning reaction by Democratic House Leader Hakeem Jeffries and longtime elder statesman, Rep. Jerry Nadler, to the Baby Doc Duvalier unit of MAGA busting into Nadler's New York office and illegally threatening and handcuffing one of his aides.
They used the language of being "troubled" and "alarmed," the kinda crap you say when a Republican sneaks a tax cut for private jet repairs into a bill, or you find out creeper Mike Johnson "monitors" his son's porn collection like he's Billy Baldwin from the film _Sliver_. You know, some rancid yet regular Republican occurrence.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9841846c-7f01-4d10-97f2-2267811d97bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
However, when the GOP Gestapo known as ICE--who refuse to identify themselves, are as warrantless as a Putin stooge visiting your 5th floor hotel balcony and cover their faces because they KNOW there's Nuremberg Trials awaiting them down the road--break into your congressional office and threaten everyone simply for giving refuge to peaceful protestors, _we 're long past a point where mouths can be mealy_.
I shared [my messaging proposal on this in the Monday letter, which you can ](https://substack.com/redirect/b5b0d93e-55e2-45f4-8a24-b1c2eb14b240?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[and should](https://substack.com/redirect/b5b0d93e-55e2-45f4-8a24-b1c2eb14b240?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ read](https://substack.com/redirect/b5b0d93e-55e2-45f4-8a24-b1c2eb14b240?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But now we have a new challenge...because, hen came Chuck Schumer. Standing up and opposing Donald Trump's bleach-blonde-badly-built-butch-body bill by saying "I agree with Elon Musk," is messaging brought to you by crystal meth. Making it even worse, holding up Musk's tweet like he was proving it existed to a principal was some Mad-Men-age shit. Cringe level? Kevin Sorbo "acting."
Senator Schumer, please, for the good of our country, hand over leadership to someone who knows how to play this game. May I suggest Chris Murphy? Tammy Duckworth? Cory Booker? Because, agreeing with Elon Musk is like your grandpa telling you he's "hip with the TikToks."

Risin' up to the challenge of our rival - Survivor | Jun 4 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- In This Letter! 😁 David Shuster's Great video 👊 My Column 🥃 NYT Pitchbot's Hilarious Pitches | | ---|---|--- Doctors at the CDC say children should receive Covid vaccines. A disgraced ex-environmental lawyer who spent 20 years abusing heroin says they shouldn't. For busy parents, it can be hard to know who to trust. DAVID SHUSTER VIDEO, EXCLUSIVELY FOR YOU! Watch as David Shuster... `Independent Media For $1.32/Week!` We 're running a special! Full Access to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week! Please support our work covering stories monopoly media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful, media ecosystem independent of corporate interests! Amplify Good. Support Indy Media! | | ---|---|--- We wanted to understand the theory that Joe Biden was executed and replaced by clones in 2020. So we talked with three involuntarily celibate crypto investors at a Whataburger in Buford. Cliff 's Note: Time for Democratic Leadership & Message Upgrade--Bring On the Fighters, Not the Flinchers** Two days ago, I wrote about the stunning reaction by Democratic House Leader Hakeem Jeffries and longtime elder statesman, Rep. Jerry Nadler, to the Baby Doc Duvalier unit of MAGA busting into Nadler's New York office and illegally threatening and handcuffing one of his aides. They used the language of being "troubled" and "alarmed," the kinda crap you say when a Republican sneaks a tax cut for private jet repairs into a bill, or you find out creeper Mike Johnson "monitors" his son's porn collection like he's Billy Baldwin from the film Sliver. You know, some rancid yet regular Republican occurrence. | | ---|---|--- However, when the GOP Gestapo known as ICE--who refuse to identify themselves, are as warrantless as a Putin stooge visiting your 5th floor hotel balcony and cover their faces because they KNOW there's Nuremberg Trials awaiting them down the road--break into your congressional office and threaten everyone simply for giving refuge to peaceful protestors, we 're long past a point where mouths can be mealy. I shared . But now we have a new challenge...because, hen came Chuck Schumer. Standing up and opposing Donald Trump's bleach-blonde-badly-built-butch-body bill by saying "I agree with Elon Musk," is messaging brought to you by crystal meth. Making it even worse, holding up Musk's tweet like he was proving it existed to a principal was some Mad-Men-age shit. Cringe level? Kevin Sorbo "acting." Senator Schumer, please, for the good of our country, hand over leadership to someone who knows how to play this game. May I suggest Chris Murphy? Tammy Duckworth? Cory Booker? Because, agreeing with Elon Musk is like your grandpa telling you he's "hip with the TikToks." The messaging part of this should be so easy, but I guess I have to explain it: ... body:
Mikie Sherrill needs our help! |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108987182/549641808/-1177558892?refcode=WUEFH605_20250604_SherrillSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056324&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjYzZWUwMi04NzQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LsRd9eelOfJHhfnGsrh3GTTu0hQroapBscxr3tXsVXI=) Hi Peter,

It's primary season! EMILYs List has women on the ballot throughout the month of June, and we're touching base with you with _one more chance_ to help elect a Democratic pro-choice governor in New Jersey before her June 10 primary.

**Rep. Mikie Sherrill** has been a leading voice for Democrats on how to push back against the Trump agenda, especially at the state level — which is why **we know she's the right person to lead New Jersey as governor**.

Rep. Sherrill has spent her career serving the public — from her time in the Navy to her work in Congress — and now she’s ready to lead as governor. As you know, Peter, governors are a critical line of defense against Trump’s agenda and attacks on our fundamental freedoms. Mikie has proven she’s tough, effective, and deeply committed to the communities she serves — and she’s more than ready to take on this next fight.

But this is a crowded primary, and Mikie needs our help. We know when Democratic pro-choice women are in charge, we all win, and we know Mikie's the right woman for the job — so now's the time to act. [**This is your chance to directly support Rep. As you know, Peter, governors are a critical line of defense against Trump’s agenda and attacks on our fundamental freedoms. Mikie has proven she’s tough, effective, and deeply committed to the communities she serves — and she’s more than ready to take on this next fight.
