Opponents of voting rights are betting we'll ignore certain states| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108987501/549642968/-1704790427?am=20.00&contactdata=RQ5IvpccldbWwRgRdC8BB+XgneZGJ7+pgXkr37fjx33jg3eeXW9G28+cIPoONf6sV/Qw6tRor8GjTL2iPqmAlFzohKGbjcxYQqx5RGz8mwQ=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Nzc0MGRkLTg3NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HLvvvRB_yM_98yotrVWbsei7Z3Fif5dgkVInXFnsHOI=&emci=9921d29a-e740-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a97740dd-8741-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)
---
| | Team -- Opponents of voting rights have made a strong bet. They've doubled down on it the last few years, too. Their bet was that we'd only care about certain states. That as long as we were focused on the swing states like Arizona, Georgia, Pennsylvania, and others, they would be free to suppress votes in states like Utah, South Dakota, Mississippi, or Kentucky. And you know what? **That bet has paid off for them.** When Wisconsin tried to ban drop boxes, there was an immediate reaction and lawsuits. When South Dakota did the same? _Crickets_. When Texas started messing with changes to voter ID requirements, people howled. When Utah functionally suppressed the youth vote with new ID requirements? _Got away with it with no consequences_. **They've created a feedback loop:** States with restrictive voting laws receive little attention because they aren't electorally competitive. But part of the reason they aren’t competitive is because _their state laws prevent large segments of the population from voting_. **[Team, we cannot afford to skip any state when it comes to protecting our fundamental right to vote. Step up and give $25 or whatever you can today and help us make every voice heard in our elections>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108987502/549642969/1723810624?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Nzc0MGRkLTg3NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HLvvvRB_yM_98yotrVWbsei7Z3Fif5dgkVInXFnsHOI=&emci=9921d29a-e740-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a97740dd-8741-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

| | We're not going to lie -- **when we've highlighted things in these things in the past** , like voter ID in Utah or court decisions in Kansas or the most suppressive state-level voting law in Indiana, we haven't gotten as much of a response as we did from swing states. **The danger in ignoring the voting rights of citizens in more than half the country is that it creates a two-tiered democracy**. Voters in the "swing states" benefit from attention and legal actions, while voters everywhere else are left to navigate increasingly onerous and burdensome requirements without meaningful support or scrutiny. We have to fight everywhere. **Donald Trump is actively dismantling democratic institutions and undermining the rule of law**. Only through free and fair elections can we hope to restore our republic. But that requires free and fair elections in every state, not just in a strategic few. **[Fuel our efforts to fight for voting rights everywhere with $25 or more and make every vote count>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108987509/549642976/1723810624?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Nzc0MGRkLTg3NDEtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HLvvvRB_yM_98yotrVWbsei7Z3Fif5dgkVInXFnsHOI=&emci=9921d29a-e740-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a97740dd-8741-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: Opponents of voting rights are betting we'll ignore certain states| | | | | Team -- Opponents of voting rights have made a strong bet. They've doubled down on it the last few years, too. Their bet was that we'd only care about certain states. That as long as we were focused on the swing states like Arizona, Georgia, Pennsylvania, and others, they would be free to suppress votes in states like Utah, South Dakota, Mississippi, or Kentucky. And you know what? That bet has paid off for them. When Wisconsin tried to ban drop boxes, there was an immediate reaction and lawsuits. When South Dakota did the same? Crickets. When Texas started messing with changes to voter ID requirements, people howled. When Utah functionally suppressed the youth vote with new ID requirements? Got away with it with no consequences. They've created a feedback loop: States with restrictive voting laws receive little attention because they aren't electorally competitive. But part of the reason they aren’t competitive is because their state laws prevent large segments of the population from voting. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We're not going to lie -- when we've highlighted things in these things in the past , like voter ID in Utah or court decisions in Kansas or the most suppressive state-level voting law in Indiana, we haven't gotten as much of a response as we did from swing states. The danger in ignoring the voting rights of citizens in more than half the country is that it creates a two-tiered democracy. Voters in the "swing states" benefit from attention and legal actions, while voters everywhere else are left to navigate increasingly onerous and burdensome requirements without meaningful support or scrutiny. We have to fight everywhere. Donald Trump is actively dismantling democratic institutions and undermining the rule of law. Only through free and fair elections can we hope to restore our republic. But that requires free and fair elections in every state, not just in a strategic few. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent **[fired back at CBS News' Margaret Brennan](https://substack.com/redirect/d7d95801-42cf-4bef-9d6f-683d5fe1e7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trying to punch a hole in Trump's economic agenda from every angle despite low inflation and strong future indicators.
**[She wasn't expecting him to say this...](https://substack.com/redirect/d7d95801-42cf-4bef-9d6f-683d5fe1e7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d7d95801-42cf-4bef-9d6f-683d5fe1e7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d7d95801-42cf-4bef-9d6f-683d5fe1e7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Brennan asked asked Bessent what companies like Walmart should do to navigate Trump's tariffs, siting that the megastore giant has an operating margin of only 3%, not leaving much room to "eat the tariffs" as Trump's team has suggested large companies do.
"Should companies cut back on the number of goods they have on their shelves or just on their profitability?" Brennan asked.
"That's a decision company by company, Margaret," Bessent said. "They're going to do what's right for them."
Brennan pushed further, "For consumers, the reality is there will either be less inventory, higher prices, or both."
"Margaret, when we were here in March, you said there was going to be big inflation. **[There hasn't been any inflation,"](https://substack.com/redirect/d7d95801-42cf-4bef-9d6f-683d5fe1e7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Bessent returned fire. "Actually, inflation numbers are the best in 4 years! So why don't we stop trying to say this could happen and wait to see what does happen!"
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d7d95801-42cf-4bef-9d6f-683d5fe1e7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Ted Cruz SHUTS UP Democrat loudmouth Cory Booker in heated shouting match
Sen. Ted Cruz **[clashed with Democrat Sen. Cory Booker](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe612f4-c78f-4bf0-a60c-022d47280ab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about alleged threats made towards federal court judges after a record number of injunctions have been launched against the Trump administration.
They threw all politeness aside... _ "Let me finish!!!"_
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe612f4-c78f-4bf0-a60c-022d47280ab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe612f4-c78f-4bf0-a60c-022d47280ab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Similar to Democrats now condemning threats towards federal judges, Republicans called for the federal prosecution of protestors who demonstrated outside the homes of Supreme Court judges in the days after the 2022 overturning of Roe vs. Wade.
In Tuesday's hearing, Ted Cruz called out Democrats for being silent on the issue and not taking action because it aligned their political agenda.
New Jersey Rep. Cory Booker pushed back against Cruz's claim.
"You said we were silent after people's houses were protested. **[That is a patent lie, sir!](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe612f4-c78f-4bf0-a60c-022d47280ab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** " Booker told Cruz. "We were not silent. We took action...What you said was patently not true and was in fact a patent lie!"
"Did the Biden DOJ arrest even one?!!" Cruz interjected. "The answer is no!"
Booker exploded, "I did not interrupt you sir, let me finish!!" adding, "I am sick and tired of hearing the kind of heated partisan rhetoric, which is one of the reason why we have such divisions in this country. The attacks that we see from the President, trolling and dragging judges through what we should be talking about,... puts people in danger!!"
Cruz calmly responded, "The Biden Justice Department arrested zero people, prosecuted zero people, for violating the criminal law, and every Democrat senator on this committee was silent about it," Cruz said. "The Senator from New Jersey clutched his pearls about language threatening judges, and yet I do not recall a single Democrat senator of this committee saying a word when Chuck Schumer went to the steps of the Supreme Court and **[threatened the safety of the Supreme justices by name."](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe612f4-c78f-4bf0-a60c-022d47280ab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch the two Senators go at it in the charged debate here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe612f4-c78f-4bf0-a60c-022d47280ab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Brave Ivy League student BLASTS university for absurd levels of waste driving up tuition
**WATCH:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e73534d2-680f-4bce-830d-62360bb5684f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Brown University student Alex Shieh called out his elite Ivy League school during a congressional hearing, Wednesday, for unbelievable bureaucratic bloat and waste driving tuition unmanageably high.
* **Brown Student Slams University Spending** : Shieh, a rising junior, has been actively calling for the university to address what he perceives as administrative inefficiencies.
> _" Even while charging students the price of a luxury car, Brown is on track to run a 46 million dollar deficit this year. Where's all the money going? I'll tell you where it's going. It's going in an empire of administrative bloat and bureaucracy," Shieh said. "Brown employs 3,805 full-time non-instructional staff, for just 7,229 undergrads. That's one administrator for every two students. **[This isn't education. This is bloat.](https://substack.com/redirect/1dc19a96-3bdd-40ae-b8b4-1db9edb4a6c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**"_
* **Shieh took a page out of Elon Musk 's Book**: To draw attention to his cause, Shieh mirrored Musk's DOGE protocol with government employees, **[sending a massive email to all university administrators](https://substack.com/redirect/c7f6bace-5ac5-4fc9-ac98-aa19d7da11a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , asking for them to testify to what they do on a daily basis. These emails, have garnered significant attention both on and off campus.
* **University's Response** : In response to Shieh's actions, Brown University has initiated an investigation into his conduct to determine if he violated the university's conduct code relating to emotional/psychological harm or invasion of privacy.

| Peter,

Marjorie Taylor Greene is chairing a congressional subcommittee right now.

_This is not a joke._

She’s running the House Oversight Subcommittee on “Delivering on Government Efficiency,” aka “DOGE,” and she’s using it to go after everything from public broadcasting to foreign aid to climate programs she calls “radical.”

Meanwhile, National Republicans are doing everything they can to flip this seat back to red so they can keep her and other MAGA extremists in power.

**If we lose this seat** , we lose our chance to take the House back.

**If we win this seat** , we have a chance to take the gavel away from extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene.

_That’s the choice._

## U.S. city gets sued for pouncing on family who dared to use words it doesn’t like * WorldNetDaily * by Bob Unruh
(Photo by Joe Kovacs) Prosecutors in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio, filed charges against a pro-life family, the Knotts, for explaining their pro-life views outside an abortion business. They kept up the case, which essentially attacked the family members for their words, for months. name: Adam Schiff
subject: On a different type of trail, raising money to fight HIV/AIDS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8649%2E5257348%2E5-G8Ul ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek —
this email is a little different, and I’ll hope you’ll read it. I’m not
asking for you to chip in to my campaign. I just wanted to share some
thoughts with you after a really meaningful weekend.

More than a decade ago, I rode 545 miles from San Francisco to Los Angeles
as part of the AIDS/LifeCycle. I was the first Member of Congress to join
the ride, raising money towards ending AIDS/HIV in our lifetimes and
helping prevent and treat it.

There were thousands of riders, a lot of ups and downs (quite literally),
hard wind, and some rain. I slept out in the tents in campgrounds, and was
awakened one night at 2 am when the sprinklers went on. Roadies helped us
with everything, both big and small, and those volunteers were the
lifeblood of the ride.

There was Red Dress Day, where riders dressed in – you guessed it – red
dresses and garb to remember those we lost to AIDS. (I wore a red shirt.)
As riders streak past, the hope is that they look like a red ribbon, the
universal symbol of HIV/AIDS remembrance.

What I remember most from that 545-mile ride were the stories. Talking to
riders about why they were riding, who they were riding for, and what the
ride meant to them. I remember their stories about friends and family
members they lost, and seeing their names on bike license plates as they
rode.

I certainly didn’t finish first or last, but its not a race, or if it is,
its a race for better treatments and cures.

Just take a look:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=1004&akid=8649%2E5257348%2E5-G8Ul ]Adam Schiff completeing the AIDS/LifeCycle ride

Well, as you may know, this weekend, I became the first U.S. Senator to
join the AIDS/LifeCycle ride. But because of votes in Washington, D.C., I
could only do the first day’s ride – eighty-one miles, starting at 6 am.

And I was so excited to suit up once again to help make HIV/AIDS a thing
of the past.

I hadn’t trained nearly enough, but I knew I needed to be a part of it.
This year, due to rising costs and changing needs, would be the last for
AIDS/LifeCycle.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=1005&akid=8649%2E5257348%2E5-G8Ul ]Adam Schiff and other AIDS/LifeCycle bike riders

There is nothing like getting out on the open road with a bunch of people
who are all going the same direction. The camaraderie, the discussions,
the pain, the joy.

You see a completely different side of the communities you’ve gotten to
know. As you’re cycling past the ocean, you see its majestic beauty from a
new perspective. As you’re huffing up a mountain, you notice just how many
rolling hills there are, and how rural much of California really is. As
you roll past towns and through cities, you see how remarkably beautiful
and diverse a state and people we are.

And when you’re riding for a cause like AIDS/LifeCycle, you remember why
you’re there. You think about all those who rode before you, and all those
who would never be able to join the ride because they were taken too soon
from this earth by a disease that we must all unite to end.

I also thought about you — the people who powered me. I asked you to chip
in, and you raised thousands for an amazing cause. So I wanted to say
thank you.

And look, here’s proof I completed the first leg! Not too shabby...

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=1006&akid=8649%2E5257348%2E5-G8Ul ]Adam Schiff's first leg of the bike ride

So, why did I share all of this with you?

Because I hope it will encourage you to search out opportunities to help
your community and the amazing people who live in it, and think about what
you want to ride for. What you want to do. Because you can make a
difference, you truly can.

And once again, thank you for powering my ride. It meant the world to me,
and all of those who are still riding.

Take care,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5297?t=1007&akid=8649%2E5257348%2E5-G8Ul ]P.S. If you weren’t able to contribute before, and want to this time,
the link to donate to AIDS/LifeCycle is here. 100% of any size donation
goes straight to the Los Angeles LGBT and San Francisco AIDS Foundation.

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=8649%2E5257348%2E5-G8Ul ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=8649%2E5257348%2E5-G8Ul ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=8649%2E5257348%2E5-G8Ul

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Allow me to reintroduce myself, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I've been called husband, father, Coach, and Senator. Now, I'm running to be Governor.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0fd6dd8102634739ba682d6227d66b4e&_e=CMMhTIhe0ZbUZ3DTx4ojVZo-aG6NOZ4u6RE_zbqqPHnJUOPlL7zAVaQSBPo9r7n1ZEM8_l0s0tsKZIkfqn78A100Ij2Nt1NwrvsuiVNeG4i1DDX78AC0u0RmRnvfA0N2fP6oSYYFly3Cf3bhENQiRXToRKKxVHs2mLMs_2bOOit0LrGjHPy41bvZJuseULQT9X3b2vJF72v__kjcvMKZKdSJNomfdniVDMx3EgtvdQScHmMR2MfvFkFutaTroA7HuSNthpGa3Em7Xl7IAzAwQ4c6KBOtFS10-TpqMoaKisKJ4LdkYOlC2qeggTDla3NfePlJ1RLwP4eum4ik-9mkDdenq28Lz45F9Doxc_9Vf-k%3D)

Peter,

It's me, Tommy Tuberville.

Throughout my life, I've been called many names. Whether it's Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I've always led by example for those who depend on me. By the end of next year, I'm hoping you'll be able to call me Governor, too.

**This email is a little longer, but it's worth your time.** [**I 'm humbly asking you to read it through and consider donating to my campaign for Alabama's next Governor when you're finished.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0fd6dd8102634739ba682d6227d66b4e&_e=CMMhTIhe0ZbUZ3DTx4ojVZo-aG6NOZ4u6RE_zbqqPHnJUOPlL7zAVaQSBPo9r7n1ZEM8_l0s0tsKZIkfqn78A100Ij2Nt1NwrvsuiVNeG4i1DDX78AC0u0RmRnvfA0N2fP6oSYYFly3Cf3bhENQiRXToRKKxVHs2mLMs_2bOOit0LrGjHPy41bvZJuseULQTjAZgLOUg22StiQe2KKdZJdYh_JXc-QGuxQDuGxjK-yOGodO1YiH_teGbYvLLHf4V4gX-RHcNneoAAZb0zAtWXI4pMTekgKmvruw5epcyKexftaq8KGH7eisRUvblH7Xlg29IvFlNKW-BrGHIR4it5iCUexd8lm1mxj7I_SYubcw%3D)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0fd6dd8102634739ba682d6227d66b4e&_e=CMMhTIhe0ZbUZ3DTx4ojVZo-aG6NOZ4u6RE_zbqqPHnJUOPlL7zAVaQSBPo9r7n1ZEM8_l0s0tsKZIkfqn78A100Ij2Nt1NwrvsuiVNeG4i1DDX78AC0u0RmRnvfA0N2fP6oSYYFly3Cf3bhENQiRXToRKKxVHs2mLMs_2bOOit0LrGjHPy41bvZJuseULQT4Iy4yexE1_FYyof8dW6BxdYNFjtPZ4qQWrV5E0FhmSaVYlkaDaqU1XW98lB5hXsM0590adBKPlJvG7j0_DQeWDk0co90rVPBZ4AqRQ7oHr0hiaeS6N0JsXjmff37wVcTdve_ewT9EQjHmbvKDRSQSsUwXAN3D6-leDtrOkHQ4ls%3D)
I was born in Camden, Arkansas, as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to consistently work hard and stand on principle, which I've brought with me every step of my life.

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married three years later and have two amazing children, Tucker and Troy. _**They continue to make me proud every single day.**_

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0fd6dd8102634739ba682d6227d66b4e&_e=CMMhTIhe0ZbUZ3DTx4ojVZo-aG6NOZ4u6RE_zbqqPHnJUOPlL7zAVaQSBPo9r7n1ZEM8_l0s0tsKZIkfqn78A100Ij2Nt1NwrvsuiVNeG4i1DDX78AC0u0RmRnvfA0N2fP6oSYYFly3Cf3bhENQiRXToRKKxVHs2mLMs_2bOOit0LrGjHPy41bvZJuseULQTXNTXK0aHcON8jpsyyQ3yZQwdtM0t_iNo5-8AgL_3BOkrnhJnNoHazVHr24r7KhG-9OLGU_LqTX_RY-n_8ouGtHTs65Ho-TrA8UXQFYgVqI9Ym_D8hSIXf7xM15dZ7CB6Dkb_ths9yUm7wyNbDDNs5jeyhcJUvNXzYU5rOl0_kT0%3D)
After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University.

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0fd6dd8102634739ba682d6227d66b4e&_e=CMMhTIhe0ZbUZ3DTx4ojVZo-aG6NOZ4u6RE_zbqqPHnJUOPlL7zAVaQSBPo9r7n1ZEM8_l0s0tsKZIkfqn78A100Ij2Nt1NwrvsuiVNeG4i1DDX78AC0u0RmRnvfA0N2fP6oSYYFly3Cf3bhENQiRXToRKKxVHs2mLMs_2bOOit0LrGjHPy41bvZJuseULQTRlhe6UUG-v3StnxRk4Des69-2mXkSIVN39ABJhem67kz4s0ITj-1_b8FgdSwx8y76MUpxEQet1meuqrFFs6StoKrEjvgXAIPZWkLhc_NVh9bu7M1J0aqRqf9DOpFMZxCzC1lLFHSt9HAZVDvjerYgXJMIaLSRYl66_e2e6q2648%3D)
I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards.

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

**Throughout my time in Washington, D.C., I 've fought nonstop on President Trump's behalf.** Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts, challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, or working with President Trump to secure our border, protect women in sports, and make our military prioritize readiness over wokeness, I always worked hard. I stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0fd6dd8102634739ba682d6227d66b4e&_e=CMMhTIhe0ZbUZ3DTx4ojVZo-aG6NOZ4u6RE_zbqqPHnJUOPlL7zAVaQSBPo9r7n1ZEM8_l0s0tsKZIkfqn78A100Ij2Nt1NwrvsuiVNeG4i1DDX78AC0u0RmRnvfA0N2fP6oSYYFly3Cf3bhENQiRXToRKKxVHs2mLMs_2bOOit0LrGjHPy41bvZJuseULQT6DLUjoRA6toMEBxCghSU8UBCxZRVacs3_3dNMc_Qd_xBskmXhLijInwfb6zYN9zBbAG2aSdMxiLwcc4-6Hom4p15LU_XgLl5BQYVJA4lmKuplnd_rF5xGxK3-VA9_D1bJ2bw4OF2sRW4G1a5ogZyXmwheZuMQKdAjvQzlfZX9cg%3D)
**Now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama so I can continue making an impact for my community back home.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top gubernatorial targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a political candidate, and I need your help to do so.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and protect America First Alabamian values?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0fd6dd8102634739ba682d6227d66b4e&_e=CMMhTIhe0ZbUZ3DTx4ojVZo-aG6NOZ4u6RE_zbqqPHnJUOPlL7zAVaQSBPo9r7n1ZEM8_l0s0tsKZIkfqn78A100Ij2Nt1NwrvsuiVNeG4i1DDX78AC0u0RmRnvfA0N2fP6oSYYFly3Cf3bhENQiRXToRKKxVHs2mLMs_2bOOit0LrGjHPy41bvZJuseULQTt5ts5c_BkaKdkUJFf_-y96_40ZYmyBkAfw9H6cGzV4BxTDh0hFAf1NWQrapZuXGyvO7de5RpjSKH9zbqN8H1dlfW4gh3XJv5-HxtK03luTLKPVudh82JB5IxLbozHNVdoLv0zJQvT029GqJUOFcDG0MH7b5fGSBxOnqQ5rePX2Y%3D)

I won't take up more of your time.

[**Thank you for reading this all the way through, and please consider donating any amount to help!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0fd6dd8102634739ba682d6227d66b4e&_e=CMMhTIhe0ZbUZ3DTx4ojVZo-aG6NOZ4u6RE_zbqqPHnJUOPlL7zAVaQSBPo9r7n1ZEM8_l0s0tsKZIkfqn78A100Ij2Nt1NwrvsuiVNeG4i1DDX78AC0u0RmRnvfA0N2fP6oSYYFly3Cf3bhENQiRXToRKKxVHs2mLMs_2bOOit0LrGjHPy41bvZJuseULQTU4yxUEninDF2L_01wOwZmk1fePyNVseNAy_pwGC2ra-ACbrKj_UdgVcHijf7bgUa0LQOlMT1uzOPQdNuJKFTQgr3OnGE1i6bQrzMH6XchmMXtSBBPUOIfKgpjUH5v6Smv-GjyF4cx3BxWq3GMsSeaufQ8Vc7cl37bHp_W4QijkE%3D)

Best,
_Coach Tommy Tuberville_

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

subject: This issue is personal to Pramila

body:
If Trump had his way, there would be no international students anywhere in the U.S.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250604-5116-footer&t=1&akid=5116%2E420207%2EgSPVeE)
Peter,
At least 4,700 international students have been impacted by Trump’s attempts to revoke student visas.1 Now, he’s trying to block any foreign students from attending Harvard.
If Trump had his way, there would be _no_ international students anywhere in the U.S.
**This issue is especially personal to Pramila.** As an immigrant who came to America to study, become a citizen, and contribute to the promise of America, she understands what’s at stake.
As Trump continues to target immigrant students, Pramila has led the charge in Congress to stop his unlawful behavior. [**If you agree that foreign students belong in our universities, please chip in $3 to support Pramila today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250604-1?refcode=em20250604-5116&amount=3&refcode2=5116_420207_gSPVeE&akid=5116%2E420207%2EgSPVeE)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250604-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250604-5116&refcode2=5116_420207_gSPVeE&akid=5116%2E420207%2EgSPVeE)**
When Trump rips away student visas and terrorizes students, it hurts our entire country. It weakens our educational institutions and hurts our ability to innovate and attract talent from all over the world. In order to stay competitive in a global market, we cannot close off our colleges and universities.
This is just the latest piece of Trump’s anti-immigrant agenda and his attempt at authoritarian rule. We won’t allow it.
[**If you’re able to, please chip in $3 today to support Pramila and her work to stand up to Trump’s authoritarianism.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250604-1?refcode=em20250604-5116&amount=3&refcode2=5116_420207_gSPVeE&akid=5116%2E420207%2EgSPVeE)
With determination,
Team Pramila

body:
Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL. The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c3f7648d92df403ca28dceb4b03362be&_e=cd2KafL3CPrFN5BufrOyYOPB58PvAGxHBwvYuAm3YtQQx1x0xqDcf_31DcUggRLmGwtZbkp1w88hUa8_dofeUn2Pli8tACbi_Dzrhee-q2Xw-RcQ6e8KUG4D5mGJTq3MP_b1OOQkgrazhjl7NRIjlus525nxTvFfjuIlSKhRY_IpwJCMv1QxE5EXQMdxLY1oPVkcV7c1vLmvJc4fZpv1KEhvFB4RYV1uwvKOQRhSdKO1jrLins5CldDHxozXLda4B0YV3eygk7kM-fHdcJxQFWEaeE-hd0T-FnChaOKY5HZvd0zEomwEmIJ0m1bqLl6Na-Vr4HPsNnqMk-4AW8bTCKOnn5XgZcmJL359Z0BYmC8gV9vXeJQFObb-8nItg9rH6HfbqeYRsDDvyxStkQrQyg%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**I enlisted in the U.S. Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed and led troops around the world, including Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and at our southern border during President Trump’s first term.

**I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and became Doraville’s Chief of Police.** I locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.

**I’m proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL.

[**My name is John King, solving problems is what I do, and I’m answering the call to run for U.S. Senate in Georgia to defeat Jon Ossoff and give President Trump the reinforcements he needs to Make America Great Again.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c3f7648d92df403ca28dceb4b03362be&_e=cd2KafL3CPrFN5BufrOyYOPB58PvAGxHBwvYuAm3YtQQx1x0xqDcf_31DcUggRLmGwtZbkp1w88hUa8_dofeUn2Pli8tACbi_Dzrhee-q2Xw-RcQ6e8KUG4D5mGJTq3MP_b1OOQkgrazhjl7NRIjlus525nxTvFfjuIlSKhRY_IpwJCMv1QxE5EXQMdxLY1oPVkcV7c1vLmvJc4fZpv1KEhvFB4RYV1uwvKOQRhSdKO1jrLins5CldDHxozXLda4ZaPEmtYSFusQyzXOkl6qDcLkc3ad2hB_hmSc34Sd-oWWMh2EmyfK0U9d66OASu1_-qNWO2aIGE3iVMsT0i-UxphQLL0wpJiDJs9bvWfzxruFB3HDPSTu_GXv3UgiNZ5yWCage0BdvfKFKGr37Cdr1A%3D%3D)

Jon Ossoff was AWOL when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. He voted against supporting Israel and for letting men play women’s sports.

**And now he says he wants to impeach President Trump.**

_Ossoff is California’s third senator, not Georgia’s senior senator._

**Enough already.** President Trump needs reinforcements, and Georgia needs a new senator.

**But I can’t do this alone.** I’m not a rich self-funder. [**I’m a soldier and a lawman, and I’m humbly asking you to join our mission >>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c3f7648d92df403ca28dceb4b03362be&_e=cd2KafL3CPrFN5BufrOyYOPB58PvAGxHBwvYuAm3YtQQx1x0xqDcf_31DcUggRLmGwtZbkp1w88hUa8_dofeUn2Pli8tACbi_Dzrhee-q2Xw-RcQ6e8KUG4D5mGJTq3MP_b1OOQkgrazhjl7NRIjlus525nxTvFfjuIlSKhRY_IpwJCMv1QxE5EXQMdxLY1oPVkcV7c1vLmvJc4fZpv1KEhvFB4RYV1uwvKOQRhSdKO1jrLins5CldDHxozXLda4ZoIGtg3FU3gk6pgLVsX_d4nt-Rgji5MctHbA6UTKRhkx8M9S88c7RKihnjrXcqFiWnIkbruv6yaAfQFgXGf21peUTVkkEyfL0fiPhiJukVtmmYa7vZYSpgjbKxYAauP1Lwb7Dj35mRvKEAROZHwcIw%3D%3D)

I deployed and led troops around the world, including Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and at our southern border during President Trump’s first term. I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and became Doraville’s Chief of Police. I locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and was shot and stabbed in the line of duty. I’m proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL. Jon Ossoff was AWOL when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. He voted against supporting Israel and for letting men play women’s sports. And now he says he wants to impeach President Trump. Ossoff is California’s third senator, not Georgia’s senior senator. Enough already. President Trump needs reinforcements, and Georgia needs a new senator. But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder. I’ve walked high crime foot patrol and served in some of the most dangerous parts of the world. I’m not afraid of a fight, but I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to ignore Georgia and put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Dept. of Defense or any Service Branch._

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: Stop DEI Lunacy
body:
It’s time for merit to make a comeback.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/2Q1c6o71dBIdpeYnUc0rzZ2kIaSGqjLPKz62OXp7tiAcNYfCoIHDsD_aMb_Su6C5d1p41RhHYsuYPBJ2YLqYQbF628pWNn5hWXeuAbo1i1Cj-zGOSC0us12xiS1DdpSLejJnHZPc1ebR7349qyzx5ICmrTqrRBpHuwvF0VYsatZid5UHptCqMe2E/c2NcGNI6Whwp_yRNby5JyezA-p68MofU/9)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/zSoK82iA9L-4SPcQLy5KSeub5yppwA_tVc8UiNTktoBFC_FZca2Mj307AOjR1KFTsKorb-oxywkC1XefGK6_MJNhzxjVCiqYvsPfso-xGvewpMMFq4XsxoLxixJoPIgnZp5_-FXTBR_lrgwyf-Dze3lL-5D0XgEXYHHC-7sTtA62NoyN4k4kABYgNKy3FwK2Z_nTxPtYG-APObCU0mZdICV49vsDpVTLpDp9VOptGMKfuPCuuKVye_8IzTt_mU3DD2_ENmT_-iV0773QhJyOhLgNwfri8LqGsHtdmBMrxRT96quyCX-VAhRrbMl8sOFhXU1AQmgBqLz1hZ6pfSH3pypfswTfQDyufspkraZHqRYNT_r0sHwBG1cIGPZrAum8kvuFWc8VgOo5vVcpF6X8lyRgFIqRwwR3z2-zGj2USvpWlKJN0O4KUw/mFVmqM0XYoqSOCConNWCGmTwruJqqRHp/9)
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/elRK9pUnwAWjJK-h5YJjPJx7JPBG5-Wsd79ybEgkylyx12N14KtoopCGtKzbI1u4kVaQNdZONPyhC8-DeV7YYQVuBM67dAoVIshRuMQmfQlr3qGqIp-HfbUqEP3xZKAASC9A-vhexaWLz2JKjuIzzF8_RdeOJUquVQVhcWI4LUbahkC63aahCFnlKRFq8mJsH8qjmjRuOKPm787ppPQi_Uj5BSrqmGtix7qri7FKFiiVLR5Y0sog3aUO0ZmTxMBodO7ciZZIwmwQeXfkMHC9slYKT-UHNGM32bNo4i8XKN-OmGFW6Jqi91ALp1qJbedoze6oiW9irsyB2orHuoShm-IvZxcfD42Hnr_58BMrq2y8xIEu-Hq2pSNtOS0-KCvOv7RwYPAjCh58u_l-DhwAoS-IxvIXK-0O8v7d9i-UMRdOmn_-fyLdgQ/7C7BArhCkncyei612npfeBNEQ9YfWdZD/9).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/3teq-tREDy3IYeCEDtMDUq4rvgoHY3OzSZoB71uJMM2FJkkBHq68dLF6v-OxMory9aOmIKkkqzjgcd1aFlS1__KLwN4hE9Aj6qWgZZVKyUIzuYt3fYroZ0fhWkg2HecB-Im_gry_ke1k87tEDQCC-oztdc-E-mPln5Gp42B9pBvm3w4N5iLbgADB8EQWlFxiU4zfylBPajnz71lVniWRD80lkKtjhe42vPaSrWebq_vrNPk4jEXTsDHqOJxbthA5NsIK8lNCSNlIDN-sOW5NSxlSA_t97dEoEHsJVF0H8_v0VfkDRBq24B1dttWtXTEG3LIEnik9jx31KArEoeedXBZahMETW8LLWKQWCow-oQoQeBiAL9gxsyTmdLO_nQLqRzTQMTmS8tbEjTeTUkaIimssKG-pBcq7ngDGuy13R3HSZtkgXUvxYw/DDPp_dT9VE_Z8EmYWJIHLd5oXC1lDM0K/9)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/wbrIO0kjziA-OzRIFEw5mAjOmHORSXmJtMgEaqswXjVK65zGEDLajmZOu45xgj4O8F9WZuBX8ZIP6xLEh4lcqFV2Nppy40Yjr28eEQR0A8o29AC5MbVZIEWKBNXNcXAcnySi7e-VGXMMj3O-UZBQJ-cyqyFAoxYjwK6UNUVcLEA7OgTT7DxeaVNul6SKN37A2Noq_GUfuzT5Mek9iVqmZzeFDG5EIvDaI4v3PxHZiujO-XDliGfU4r7ERKmAzjyrftbAafFVIJm-c1AyMJJB4J9GoI8OwWt5fHK1KiXJRnEUugQmSsca8o466jcwuY1wc6L19uhSfquSi2ZGcPBAPJWh6VEKHwClzPGALawBmaOg0DJ3o9hhID1-BtoucJtrtkn_td2Y9k2IXSeSQNaVqvRVzfdQlspSz3DjpBFWes723Uz8Bdh-iQ/ips6UyV_P68YjVqgcIm-P62K50OK9XkR/9)

Thank you!

clean_body: It’s time for merit to make a comeback. | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Friend of Liberty, It's time for merit to make a comeback. . Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI." Race grifters and hustlers make millions perpetuating DEI lies, including... America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom. All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist. Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color. DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military. These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself. I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ... Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda. Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty." To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it. So please share your views by completing the DEFEAT DEI SURVEY and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies. Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the DEFEAT DEI SURVEY , which you can access at this secure link: With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Please fill out your DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself. You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time. Thank you! .

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Don’t look away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

Are you trying to tune it all out?
The chaos. The corruption. The cruelty.
Or maybe, in some weird way, is it starting to feel normal?
The headlines blur. The shock wears off.
Authoritarianism doesn’t always march in under martial law.
It creeps in. Through erosion. Through silence. Through resignation. Through the quiet, incremental loss of just enough ground that, over time, our reality starts to feel unfamiliar and the things we took for granted begin to disappear.
That’s why I’m asking you: Don’t look away. Don’t get distracted. Because the next fight is here, and Georgia is the front line.
I’m the only Democratic Senator running for re-election in a state Donald Trump won in 2024. MAGA has made this campaign their #1 midterm target.
[**So if you’re alarmed by what’s happening in our country — and ready to fight back — I’m asking you to rush a contribution to my re-election campaign before our FEC fundraising drive ends this month.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250604&t=1&akid=404%2E5691347%2ESaLMn_)
**Here’s the link:**[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-june25**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250604&t=2&akid=404%2E5691347%2ESaLMn_)
Before I ran for Senate, I investigated corruption and human rights abuses abroad.
I know what authoritarianism looks like. I know this pattern.
Trump and his lieutenants are flaunting corruption, harassing opponents, repressing dissent, and trying to intimidate critics into silence.
The President of the United States of America thinks he’s a king.
Just this month:
* He hosted a private gala to promote his Trump-branded meme coin. The top donors got an exclusive dinner and a tour of the White House.

* He accepted a luxury jet from the Qatari royal family.

* And when asked whether everyone on American soil is entitled to due process — a bedrock principle of our constitution — Trump said: “I don’t know.”

I ran for Senate in 2020 for two reasons: To root out the endemic corruption that enabled Trump’s rise and to help Georgia and our Nation flourish.
Right now I’m doing everything I can in the Senate to confront this Administration’s lawless abuses.
But I’m also in the toughest, most expensive, and most consequential re-election fight of the midterms. MAGA is turning its focus to Georgia to lock in long-term control of the Senate for Trump.
Back when I launched my first Senate campaign, the pundits said flipping a seat in Georgia was impossible, that a millennial investigative journalist couldn’t win a race the GOP had locked down for two decades.
But together, we built one of the most powerful grassroots movements this country has ever seen, and delivered a historic victory that helped Democrats win Senate control.
Now, we have to do it again.
My team is working day and night to rebuild that organizing machine. Our plan is to reach voters in every corner of the state like we did before.
We know how to win here. But we need your help to do it.
[**As summer begins and grassroots supporters get distracted, our fundraising takes a hit — and we’re urgently trying to close the gap. So if you’re able to pitch in a few dollars before the end of the month, it would make a real difference. I’d be incredibly grateful for your support.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250604&t=3&akid=404%2E5691347%2ESaLMn_)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250604&t=4&akid=404%2E5691347%2ESaLMn_)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff
[
---

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=404%2E5691347%2ESaLMn_) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

body:
We're airing our first TV and digital ad in the race for Governor.
| Peter, I have some big news: we're airing our first TV and digital ad in the race for Governor.
---
[](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=mz58dmOTGe76&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-06-04_1&amount=25)
As I say in the ad, "too many politicians talk when they should listen."

From my days as an intelligence officer at the CIA to my time in Congress, I've learned to ignore the noise and focus on the mission at hand. _And that's what I'll do as Governor of Virginia._

But today, as the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat this year, I need your help.

[_**Will you split a contribution between our campaign and Fight for Progress so we can afford to get our ad in front of voters across Virginia?**_](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=nbgNw98MhdH0&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-06-04_1&amount=25)

Well the big, beautiful bill is getting mixed reviews. So far, Elon Musk is the harshest critic, calling it a "pork-filled abomination." In the Senate, Ron Johnson and Rand Paul are holding the line to get spending down, Senator Johnson wants government spending back down to pre-pandemic levels. Congressman Andy Harris is the Chairman of the Freedom Caucus. Rep. Harris initially voted to pass the bill to get it through to the Senate. This time around Congressman Harris says if the Senate rolls back the spending cuts and doesn't get rid of the massive abuse in Medicaid, he and the Freedom Caucus will vote to sink the bill. Congressman Jim Jordan took NPR's CEO to task at a congressional hearing recently. Rep. Jordan exploited how they get stories wrong and have eighty seven Democratic employees and zero Republican employees. The real question is, are we finally done funding NPR and PBS as taxpayers? Will AI be regulated by the government? The BBB has a section that strips states of the right to make laws and regulate AI for 10 years. Will one of Biden's aides blow the whistle on the autopen before the House Oversight Committee? Jim Jordan unpacks it all with us.
Featuring:
**Rep. Andy Harris**
U.S. Congressman | Maryland, District 1
Chairman | House Freedom Caucus
https://harris.house.gov/
**Rep. Jim Jordan**
U.S. Congressman | Ohio, District 4
Chairman | House Judiciary Committee
https://harris.house.gov/

name: Kendra, a Working Families Party member
subject: The human cost of Republican budget cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Hi, Peter — My name is Kendra. I’m a member of the Working Families Party in Iowa, a paralegal, and the mother of four children who I’ve adopted out of foster care. For my children, the safety nets of our public schools and Medicaid really provided them the ability to get out of unsafe homes and get the care that they needed. School is where people noticed their hair was not being combed, that their teeth were not well cared for. They were able to get support — including speech therapy and mental health care — from their school, and see doctors because of Medicaid. But our schools are struggling with less resources to work with every year as inflation goes up, and our Republican Governor gutted the program that my son needs for his speech therapy. **Just a couple of weeks ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a bill that could kick millions of people, including one in five enrolled children, off of Medicaid. 1** My husband and I are worried about what it will mean for our kids’ futures if this bill passes the Senate and is signed into law. There are already so many health care issues in Iowa, so many shortages of doctors and rural hospitals closing. How many more families are going to suffer? How many more children? We are all so much closer to needing government services desperately to survive than we are to being a billionaire. Someday, any one of us could end up needing the critical programs cut in the Republican budget including student loans, nutrition assistance, or Medicaid. **I am sharing my story because people need to understand that _there is a human cost to Republican budget cuts._ In my life, the people most hurt by their greed are my children.** **[How would these cuts impact _your_ life, Peter? Share your story with the Working Families Party here and help show our representatives how important it is to fight back. ](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKNLGpiR8kOXONBw5-4WsJIcbDsRyoBEiVoNuO57-A4H91dLG5VILx9LVCWsEtmrpBczIkb_ICo_hGBimBoyTR5IDbB-2HGN9dr04A600VoCnY3x9vipZ0Gus6DDqhSdomRoG81JXB3x085AFv9ZrftXQlbDZ-lR0tbqVTg2aBrThmOByGD4t9WRprJrVFyB8GJ5mmiOTgcmiezP91faf1OWWn5jNiAmILyWCPq7TtkgzDCIkAIukGWiGCfGnRDvQ1OSbO1EhEXfPu1g4wn-NwN_kY36YcEUbj7Xum9b-5IiQ/4h2/wF4myzsKTHiVLv6X2s-tRw/h0/h001.8AT2TqfDJOKEPrPKjFYoF9S4cA8PAyCMAab5BybaBLc)** **[Share your story](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKNLGpiR8kOXONBw5-4WsJIcbDsRyoBEiVoNuO57-A4H91dLG5VILx9LVCWsEtmrpBczIkb_ICo_hGBimBoyTR5IDbB-2HGN9dr04A600VoCnY3x9vipZ0Gus6DDqhSdomJy4h02EBtag646vwT-R1xuCgYmymGlxkUySnWoWhd7OA-ybv7SOkRDBdI2YLkc5G9HxZxchcdC6t_WL5K8t7sIsGJqflDsa2Ygp7YxDq2UJNMg18T404bWLL3enHU-z1Th-DHAjMzrGAYOggeU5Dog-CdFQwgdUSbRKLyyzJxcA/4h2/wF4myzsKTHiVLv6X2s-tRw/h1/h001.UwkPxbYVQV2DFckmWmRSUmlbvx1JNeYjgigUsCA6jGA)** In solidarity, Kendra

clean_body: | | | Hi, Peter — My name is Kendra. I’m a member of the Working Families Party in Iowa, a paralegal, and the mother of four children who I’ve adopted out of foster care. For my children, the safety nets of our public schools and Medicaid really provided them the ability to get out of unsafe homes and get the care that they needed. School is where people noticed their hair was not being combed, that their teeth were not well cared for. They were able to get support — including speech therapy and mental health care — from their school, and see doctors because of Medicaid. But our schools are struggling with less resources to work with every year as inflation goes up, and our Republican Governor gutted the program that my son needs for his speech therapy. Just a couple of weeks ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a bill that could kick millions of people, including one in five enrolled children, off of Medicaid. 1 My husband and I are worried about what it will mean for our kids’ futures if this bill passes the Senate and is signed into law. There are already so many health care issues in Iowa, so many shortages of doctors and rural hospitals closing. How many more families are going to suffer? How many more children? We are all so much closer to needing government services desperately to survive than we are to being a billionaire. Someday, any one of us could end up needing the critical programs cut in the Republican budget including student loans, nutrition assistance, or Medicaid. I am sharing my story because people need to understand that there is a human cost to Republican budget cuts. In my life, the people most hurt by their greed are my children. In solidarity, Kendra WFP Member in Iowa Source: 1\. , The Commonwealth Fund, May 5, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations
body:
The Holy Spirit has opened the door to these leftist public schools just a tiny bit| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,I’m back from our traveling BRAVE Books church tour and I have important news for you... We got into three public schools where I read BRAVE Books to nearly 1,400 children -- reaching them with the Christian-inspired messages of... ...bravery, humility, and loving your enemies. Can you believe it? The Holy Spirit is stirring hearts and minds in ways we haven’t seen for some time in our country. And that’s why starting today, BRAVE Books is launching a new initiative to bring our mission into public schools and libraries. [**And we can’t do it without you, Friend!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f64b6e7fff9347698c2985a12e19d367&_e=hhlq_RVD6OONhCQdGj22xAYyxmuQ-4BKoXL3U-7nMlPjZWjorCCYC-KVpImgXKYjTBUPXwj2OWUOLKhvECEhKutmDZlvzz2hy-eUKMkzKL0C02m8aUba0P-nu_OM_WIRcs7tMVgTO1muH1Yp_Gv08o5BSJcNHz6vCv_KzQnGtBjbiYjys9xTj7CBXAMBbggL_8sFRAvOTeViato1S-H8dOieoKsSbZQSi5-6CUM9qMe3FLb0i_3RX5aQaxCK4GJ3Nh9YfXHQNjsqvnpNYwqU3tA4MCR6K7wvtQws2Cl_xFSYisV88qZ0sSdYHbL0D6xvbD5K3SGdTXTUMruKmflIDj1ZcAtR07G9gu3_LL9xaYcJvpOAA0NFlohi7HlnTFcUlq7p_HoAVwaAoc36FIfc7A%3D%3D) Specifically, as we prepare for the 250th birthday of our nation, BRAVE Books aims to counter the Left’s lies about America... ...by getting a minimum of 1,000 “Raising Patriots” book bundles into as many schools and libraries as we can by July 4, 2025. Friend, if you haven’t seen the “Raising Patriots” book bundle, it features five BRAVE Books that teach foundational, conservative values to encourage children to be God-loving, patriotic Americans. _Son of Truth_ \-- Honesty.

After all, their school libraries are filled with leftist books, picked by leftist librarians, and endorsed by leftist school boards. In public schools and libraries children are exposed to books like:

| | _The 1619 Project: Born on the Water_ by Nikole Hannah-Jones. Teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And of course, there’s Scholastic Books which has had a monopoly on school libraries since before I was a kid. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. Their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From _Run Away with Me_ , one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to _Escape from St. Hell_ which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. Friend, the fact that we got into three public schools during our church tour is an opportunity we haven’t had before. And we have to take it! **[That’s why I’m asking you to send in your gift of $50, $100, or even $500 if you are able.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f64b6e7fff9347698c2985a12e19d367&_e=hhlq_RVD6OONhCQdGj22xAYyxmuQ-4BKoXL3U-7nMlPjZWjorCCYC-KVpImgXKYjTBUPXwj2OWUOLKhvECEhKutmDZlvzz2hy-eUKMkzKL0C02m8aUba0P-nu_OM_WIRcs7tMVgTO1muH1Yp_Gv08o5BSJcNHz6vCv_KzQnGtBjbiYjys9xTj7CBXAMBbggL_8sFRAvOTeViato1S-H8dOieoKsSbZQSi5-6CUM9qMdCcRDtweLe2_hcqzuhZjXVpTtB7rklTU1ex-g2XNaTtFlDriqRJbGniZ3SQ8g8-SUj-bIuiVAIfDQMnbCZtxKr0a_rF1Ykd6cEhr21nG619JXYLZi5vgxTPya-SZ5HS5zLc9hIw2ofn-FW-SSUUXqNNSzJRtjRCvG2_xg427egFQ%3D%3D)** Friend, if you’d like to sponsor one or more “Raising Patriots” book bundles yourself, that would be such a blessing on our mission. Your gift of $100 gets 1 “Raising Patriots” book bundle to a school or library. Your $200 gift gets 2 “Raising Patriots” book bundles to a school or library. And so on... And Friend, if you’d rather your $100 gift be used to send your family a “raising Patriots” book bundle, that’s an option too. What’s most important is that you respond right away because July 4th is less than two months away. **[And whether your gift is $50, $100, $500 or anything higher or lower -- I thank you](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f64b6e7fff9347698c2985a12e19d367&_e=hhlq_RVD6OONhCQdGj22xAYyxmuQ-4BKoXL3U-7nMlPjZWjorCCYC-KVpImgXKYjTBUPXwj2OWUOLKhvECEhKutmDZlvzz2hy-eUKMkzKL0C02m8aUba0P-nu_OM_WIRcs7tMVgTO1muH1Yp_Gv08o5BSJcNHz6vCv_KzQnGtBjbiYjys9xTj7CBXAMBbggL_8sFRAvOTeViato1S-H8dOieoKsSbZQSi5-6CUM9qMfyQzSlecQlijh08ntw15JgzpMC7hrm8fRKW1aWF05eyRNw5a1HAxn1ULW7NYztj_FYWSXzveHrDuB3-hxsoS16Gb0LocVmw5VAsxJzeS1nToB_lYYuEY2-Qp3JxLPl4GA5Eky4SKAB5OlQFO2aI11rzjagw0PNWiPUGC8-MgzmWQ%3D%3D).** The Holy Spirit has opened the door to these leftist public schools just a tiny bit. We have to seize the opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to these children while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.
---
Thank you!

clean_body: The Holy Spirit has opened the door to these leftist public schools just a tiny bit| | | | | Dear Friend,I’m back from our traveling BRAVE Books church tour and I have important news for you... We got into three public schools where I read BRAVE Books to nearly 1,400 children -- reaching them with the Christian-inspired messages of... ...bravery, humility, and loving your enemies. Can you believe it? The Holy Spirit is stirring hearts and minds in ways we haven’t seen for some time in our country. And that’s why starting today, BRAVE Books is launching a new initiative to bring our mission into public schools and libraries. Specifically, as we prepare for the 250th birthday of our nation, BRAVE Books aims to counter the Left’s lies about America... ...by getting a minimum of 1,000 “Raising Patriots” book bundles into as many schools and libraries as we can by July 4, 2025. Friend, if you haven’t seen the “Raising Patriots” book bundle, it features five BRAVE Books that teach foundational, conservative values to encourage children to be God-loving, patriotic Americans. Son of Truth \-- Honesty. | | More Than Spots and Stripes \--Strong moral character. Unmuzzle Me, Please! \-- Free Speech. Elephants are Not Birds \-- Truth about gender identity. Paws Off My Cannon \-- Second Amendment. | | | More Than Spots and Stripes \--Strong moral character. Unmuzzle Me, Please! \-- Free Speech. Elephants are Not Birds \-- Truth about gender identity. Paws Off My Cannon \-- Second Amendment. | | Friend, you can bet children aren’t getting these lessons in public schools and libraries unless we make it happen! July 4th is only weeks away and the cost of getting 1,000 “Raising Patriots” book bundles into schools and libraries will be about $100,000. If that seems like a lot to you, just think how many children will read one copy of an amazing BRAVE Book.I’m sure for many of these kids, it’ll be the first time they’re hearing the truth about gender identity or the Second Amendment! After all, their school libraries are filled with leftist books, picked by leftist librarians, and endorsed by leftist school boards. In public schools and libraries children are exposed to books like: | | A is for Activist. Occupy Wall Street says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America! | | | A is for Activist. Occupy Wall Street says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.”Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America! | | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. Teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And of course, there’s Scholastic Books which has had a monopoly on school libraries since before I was a kid. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. Their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me , one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. Friend, the fact that we got into three public schools during our church tour is an opportunity we haven’t had before. And we have to take it! Friend, if you’d like to sponsor one or more “Raising Patriots” book bundles yourself, that would be such a blessing on our mission. name: Deb Haaland
subject: I know the anxiety of staring down an empty pantry.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I have a long list of priorities I’m going to tackle head-on as New Mexico’s next governor.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2397%2E400544%2EX-cIbe)
I have a _long list_ of priorities I’m going to tackle head-on as New Mexico’s next governor.
But at the very top?
**Making sure New Mexicans don’t go hungry because they can’t afford food.**
Right now, Trump and his allies are attacking working families by gutting food assistance programs that New Mexican families rely on to survive. His reckless tariffs are hiking up grocery prices. He’s slashing funding for food banks. And now he wants to rip away food stamps to bankroll tax cuts for billionaires like Elon Musk.
It’s cruel. It’s wrong. And to me, it’s personal.
I know what it’s like to stand in a grocery store aisle doing mental math, wondering if there’s enough to feed your kid _and_ make rent. I know the anxiety of staring down an empty pantry. That experience stays with you, and it’s what drives me to fight relentlessly to make life affordable for working families in New Mexico.
**Our state deserves a leader who prioritizes bringing down costs, not padding the pockets of the ultra-rich.**
But to take on the MAGA machine and win this race, we’re going to need a _massive_ grassroots movement.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in $5 to my campaign for governor today. Every dollar helps power our people-first campaign, communicate with voters, and change the game for New Mexico.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250604_1_priorities?amount=5&refcode=em20250604-2397&refcode2=2397_400544_X-cIbe&akid=2397%2E400544%2EX-cIbe)**

Be fierce,
Deb

Last weekend, I had the honor of speaking at the California Democratic Party Convention here in Orange County. **[Before I share more, can I ask you to pitch in $3 or any amount to help keep our campaign strong heading into this critical FEC deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108990697/549653543/2039042026?refcode=em-6.4.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdmZGUxZmMtOTI0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ks8FI56Lj4QEsm1SxgWfaKOYPMCX_v952lPkBKtWQ1Y=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108990698/549653544/2039042026?refcode=em-6.4.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdmZGUxZmMtOTI0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ks8FI56Lj4QEsm1SxgWfaKOYPMCX_v952lPkBKtWQ1Y=) Standing before a room of grassroots leaders and neighbors, I felt the full weight of what it means to serve you. I spoke about Nghia and Kim, my parents who fled communism in search of a better life. I shared how we grew up on food stamps and government-issued milk and cheese. And I talked about why I joined the Army Reserve as a teenager: to give back to the country that gave my family so much. **Now I serve in Congress to protect those same programs – and they’re under attack.** Donald Trump is back in power. His allies in Congress are dismantling Medicaid, enriching themselves, and selling pardons to the highest bidder. They’ve gutted protections for veterans and lined their pockets at the expense of working families. But I’ve seen what people power can do. We beat corruption in Orange County. And with your help, we flipped CA-45 by just 653 votes. We need just three seats to flip the House. But Republicans are going to throw everything they’ve got at us to take this seat back. So I’m asking: Can we win again? Can we defend our freedoms, flip the House, and keep Orange County blue? I believe we can. But not without you. **[If you’re with me in this fight, chip in today to help us hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. Every dollar goes toward knocking doors, running ads, and defending democracy right here in CA-45.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108990699/549653545/2039042026?refcode=em-6.4.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdmZGUxZmMtOTI0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ks8FI56Lj4QEsm1SxgWfaKOYPMCX_v952lPkBKtWQ1Y=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108990700/549653546/2039042026?refcode=em-6.4.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdmZGUxZmMtOTI0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ks8FI56Lj4QEsm1SxgWfaKOYPMCX_v952lPkBKtWQ1Y=)

clean_body: | = Last weekend, I had the honor of speaking at the California Democratic Party Convention here in Orange County. = = Standing before a room of grassroots leaders and neighbors, I felt the full weight of what it means to serve you. I spoke about Nghia and Kim, my parents who fled communism in search of a better life. I shared how we grew up on food stamps and government-issued milk and cheese. And I talked about why I joined the Army Reserve as a teenager: to give back to the country that gave my family so much. Now I serve in Congress to protect those same programs – and they’re under attack. Donald Trump is back in power. His allies in Congress are dismantling Medicaid, enriching themselves, and selling pardons to the highest bidder. They’ve gutted protections for veterans and lined their pockets at the expense of working families. But I’ve seen what people power can do. We beat corruption in Orange County. And with your help, we flipped CA-45 by just 653 votes. We need just three seats to flip the House. But Republicans are going to throw everything they’ve got at us to take this seat back. So I’m asking: Can we win again? Can we defend our freedoms, flip the House, and keep Orange County blue? I believe we can. But not without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, -Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Proud.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
🏳️🌈🏳️⚧️
#
June is Pride Month, so on Sunday Alexandria marched in the New Queens Pride Parade & Multicultural Festival — the second-oldest and second-largest pride parade in New York City — which runs right through her district.
Now more than ever, when so many people in this country don’t know who they are safe with, **one of the most powerful things we can do is speak up**.
When we do, we show that there are people in this world who have not given up.
[This Pride Month, show that you are part of the movement fighting for a better world for all — including our LGBTQ community. Get our new Pride shirt here →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32549?utm_source=em20250604-9006-P_FND_MER_MER&t=1&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32549?utm_source=em20250604-9006-P_FND_MER_MER&t=2&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)
We’re going to keep standing with trans people.
We’re going to keep standing with the LGBT community.
We’re going to keep standing for the working class.
We’re going to keep fighting for a better minimum wage.
We’re going to keep fighting to guarantee healthcare.
They’re relying on us giving up. **Hell no**.
**[Get your Pride shirt here →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/32549?utm_source=em20250604-9006-P_FND_MER_MER&t=3&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)**
**Thank you for standing with us**.
Happy Pride,
Team AOC
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250604-1.u-6rhj&refcode=em20250604-9006-P_FND_MER_MER&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)
_Alexandria at Sunday’s 2025 New Queens Pride Parade & Multicultural Festival._
_Photo courtesy of Corey Torpie Photography_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250604-1?refcode=em20250604-9006-P_FND_MER_MER&t=5&refcode2=9006_2526796_MijUem&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250604-9006-P_FND_MER_MER&t=6&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=9006%2E2526796%2EMijUem)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

These cuts would DECIMATE these safety nets and DESTROY state economies...all so that Donald Trump can further his agenda.

And Republicans are just BOWING AT HIS FEET! Look at what Senator Joni Ernst said when faced with the consequences of these MASSIVE cuts:
